Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

If you’ve saved your payment information with WinRed, your donation will process immediately. | We need your support if we are going to come out on top in 2024. | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. What are you waiting for? Rush $7 now! »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52526?t=7&akid=10373%2E878179%2EMa2VS5) | [**CLICK HERE TO ACTIVATE YOUR PRESIDENT BIDEN MEMBERSHIP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52527?t=8&akid=10373%2E878179%2EMa2VS5)
---
**We’d _hate_ to assume that you DON’T support President Biden...but you’ve left us with no choice.**
**WE TOLD YOU:** ultra-MAGA Republicans are closing in on their fundraising goals with the support of MAGA mega-donors, _but we’re falling behind!_

**NOW WE’RE TELLING YOU:** if we _don’t_ see a donation to activate your President Biden membership by 12 AM this evening, **_your name will fall on the list of Democrats who DON’T support President Biden._**
[**_So please: if you’re still a dedicated Democrat who supports President Biden, join the 89 Democrats who have _already_ submitted their donations – _Active your membership before our strict 12 AM deadline!_ Rush $7 now! »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52526?t=9&akid=10373%2E878179%2EMa2VS5)
[**CLICK HERE TO ACTIVATE YOUR PRESIDENT BIDEN MEMBERSHIP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52527?t=10&akid=10373%2E878179%2EMa2VS5)
---
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10373%2E878179%2EMa2VS5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10373%2E878179%2EMa2VS5).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10373%2E878179%2EMa2VS5) to request fewer emails. | | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2umzAQhZ_G7EBm_INZsOitmy6oKt1W_d1cGXtIJsIGgWmUt6-I0m6_czQ6n8bFZaLx3rHmhQFcKGwMgIl3DKCXLz8_6_5Hb8tfH6-fSquVvB0pvGcA-b7g_-rzSoXR0XTQxhahA2_A-wK7WrcSagNaFJeu0c7IFsTI0bhGKT-IupWDMj4INKMoqAMOgre85bzmCirFa-0Uts0QNHDDmeQ3SlWYk5vCNa97XCo_x2LqLjkv22PSicFpQ7-vWN0orRiOxsHcHyxdxJW8K68zpVyOewqro43SufRzjJQzIoNT8pMf5dD6QYpG6qAEZ-K05_gWMdAembBPX33Abd5Xj0xYT2_uybyLi6NzYsI-ncy_ZE4ZU2bC1hykYqDf0kSBCdsvX18_fFFK4wM-XiLsd3Pvv9Xn19_F2oXlRtNEm26Y5OdjwiH3NwAA___ddoxh)

Friend,
I’m flying to South Dakota – home of the amazing Mount Rushmore – to say hello to some of our incredible supporters!
Some naysayers – who wake up every morning dedicated to finding new ways to attack me – are wondering why I’m flying to South Dakota – a state that I won with a resounding 62% _twice._
They say I should ONLY spend my time winning over new supporters, instead of paying tribute to my base of millions of supporters.
_But that’s what makes me different from your typical politician._
**While every other politician in the country sees you as nothing more than just a “vote” filed away in a database, I will always see you as a loyal supporter and a fellow patriot.**
We all remember what happened when Hillary Clinton thought she was too good to visit “blue” states like Wisconsin and Michigan – all while your favorite President made many, many visits.
Politicians could really use a lesson in humility from me!
**The truth is: I will never take your support for granted. Patriots like you have stood by my side through thick and thin, and I will always remember that!**
Perhaps that’s why our campaign now holds a MASSIVE 50-POINT LEAD in the Republican Primary – because voters know that I’m not in this race for myself, I’m in it for _**YOU**_.
Friend: I’m more committed now than ever before to fulfill our mission to SAVE AMERICA – are you?

Don Jr. here, Fellow American.

Some of my closest friends, including Chairman Steve Daines, asked if I would reach out to some of my father’s most loyal supporters **– so it’s no surprise you came up first.**

I know top America First VIPs like Kellyanne Conway, Senator Ted Cruz, and even my father, Donald J. Trump, have either texted or emailed you to take the [**NRSC Nationwide Census.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9e7631e5ba394c0e9177af9bdabdb8c7&_e=jK-fZ92xuoyUO4vFH5guLfRBpMWt1-z7EGB2z6MhAYcSqWMT_eJyxT6t6sxKjBiVs-1JaYcO2XTnl9P2L6chJGWdZgYblrUon59NtGE1SCWETc3Rj-Gkbj0sx-T3UhaeXX3QklPAYYDpCI20ltjQw0LaBHEYL4AfupO6Htk4tI6IGN9yFrPC2HOO6obpSa8kRFj5sqk7UD3LbLWAtNgBw3U9K-JClNnhq2y0RZa-wlt6Tix4LUEhZZ5RVNeqK03EATXutNEacV07bzKlRBqQMOXh2F9EWY9YwDA1SZSIZsKvIsSvpeEnfhFmNsuleTpGX2vEmhfQbVlpaDnvNxGnqN2W-FQGctxHeVsZ4UN2tnYpqh5vFdL0l8ayaig3vK7Q5wji8rihgP_0YmWVIZPwfnS3VFyiIF4o_PfvB8ucHH6Giu226waNHqfh7lu-5HWY)

I’m reaching out one more time on their behalf because the [**Nationwide Census**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9e7631e5ba394c0e9177af9bdabdb8c7&_e=jK-fZ92xuoyUO4vFH5guLfRBpMWt1-z7EGB2z6MhAYcSqWMT_eJyxT6t6sxKjBiVs-1JaYcO2XTnl9P2L6chJGWdZgYblrUon59NtGE1SCWETc3Rj-Gkbj0sx-T3UhaeXX3QklPAYYDpCI20ltjQw0LaBHEYL4AfupO6Htk4tI6IGN9yFrPC2HOO6obpSa8kRFj5sqk7UD3LbLWAtNgBw3U9K-JClNnhq2y0RZa-wlt6Tix4LUEhZZ5RVNeqK03EATXutNEacV07bzKlRBqQMJ3NgSsqvfxX3g0slqy8GHBAszYuc4pH2Oq4JFyHd5aB6gyTcMLUbhZ-IQYQo2HmPMg_Hkgg86PdDSlnzbRiayUEbr3cbGNuOUPeUNUZkfcwnzQWgnisN2z28xZ4E512zXuAoSMQHCbTETRCkBJgdfvH1OJYFiMFeWkwjkBejefr) is one of the most vital tools Republicans have towards kicking Joe Biden and nut-job Kamala Harris out of office.

clean_body: A.G. Holder; “State legislatures are critical to protecting democracy and the freedoms that come with it” | Team, Virginia’s state legislative elections are just weeks away. If Republicans expand their power, they’ll enact their extreme anti-voting, anti-choice agenda, and roll back all of our progress. = | “State legislatures are critical to protecting democracy and the freedoms that come with it. So when MAGA Republicans in Virginia attempt to roll back fundamental rights – we fight back.” — A.G. Holder = After our movement helped Democrats win full control of Virginia’s state government for the first time in decades, lawmakers passed legislation to expand voting rights, protect reproductive freedom, and more. But if Republicans flip just two state Senate seats this November, they could win the power to roll back this progress! To make matters worse, multi-millionaire Governor Glenn Youngkin is already investing in competitive districts, so there’s no time to waste. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump v. Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I just spoke live on CNN about the latest developments in the state of Georgia’s case against the twice-impeached, four-times indicted ex-president Donald Trump.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3783%2E5257348%2EYc2xuJ)
Derek,
I just spoke live on CNN about the latest developments in the state of Georgia’s case against the twice-impeached, four-times indicted ex-president Donald Trump.
The Georgia grand jury recommended indictments against **twice as many of Trump’s co-conspirators as were ultimately charged** , _including Republican Senator Lindsey Graham and then-Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler of Georgia._
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=sep2023_abs_em.y9rZjs&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230908_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3783%2E5257348%2EYc2xuJ)
The charges against Trump and his 18 indicted co-conspirators, as well as the allegations made against the additional people named in the special grand jury report, are a direct result of the case we built on the January 6 Select Committee, where I led the hearing into Trump’s interference in the state of Georgia.
**Trump has repeatedly attempted to influence the criminal proceedings against him prior to trial — and now Jim Jordan is trying to help him, by using the power of the House Judiciary Committee to interfere in the matter. As a senior member of the committee, I will be doing everything I can to stop him. The criminal trial in Georgia must be allowed to proceed without interference by Congress and in accordance with the rule of law.**
**[Derek, rush a $10 contribution to our U.S. Senate campaign so that I can keep up the fight for truth and accountability. Trump always attacks those who speak out against him, and we must ensure he cannot reclaim the narrative with his lies and attacks on the democratic and legal process.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=sep2023_abs_em.y9rZjs&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230908_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=3783%2E5257348%2EYc2xuJ)**

As a result of the work of the January 6th Committee, accountability is coming for the many crimes Trump is alleged to have committed as a result of his efforts to overturn the election.
And as he prepares to travel to California later this month to fundraise and rally support for the state Republican Party, Trump will no doubt be on the attack against me.
Your support will help me immediately respond to his attacks.
**[If you can, chip in $10 or any amount you can to our U.S. Senate campaign today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=sep2023_abs_em.y9rZjs&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230908_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=12&akid=3783%2E5257348%2EYc2xuJ)**
Thanks so much for your support.
— Adam

body:
The special interest RINOs are coming for us...

The special interest RINOs are coming for us...
| | Friend,

# "In times of market downturn and economic instability, I turn to the experts at Bishop Gold Group”

Bishop Gold Group are trusted experts in the precious metals space, I urge you to call them and find out how they can help you diversify your assets.

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: The essence of what America is about
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Another opportunity for you to get to know me | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=d2ddc0b8b8254816892c285121993259&_t=44tgZpZ0njYMNL80qU_ELOk--y_Fe91EBN-meHJROMBOoHVssUsyID82YzWgcN5p_IYEOT0sLjv8jEd93iE6vVL-T-odrm43TdLe2bmQgVQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=d2ddc0b8b8254816892c285121993259&_t=44tgZpZ0njYMNL80qU_ELOk--y_Fe91EBN-meHJROMBOoHVssUsyID82YzWgcN5p_IYEOT0sLjv8jEd93iE6vVL-T-odrm43TdLe2bmQgVQ%3D)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d2ddc0b8b8254816892c285121993259&_e=1ixfb9qeAcjr75FjmBldR_DP2ICbKycIdJ8ARn2Ddp3YEcZuW2px37M29E0cM2rSTJMcBv2Op0AMJMePqnLbvhY_xBwwjLRRaCrygySzDAFNaOn0Psa2u80RXPVORw-l_vF-lJLcJS9frXltdhdc4wjyySwFlkpp-LBT2Vh7qXnrnu1bnKHk9YTnAQ-jQzeX2Olbko-V3H6-d29CY59TZQ-H1vpkgqAkZ5_xlmymC98bywIpM4iV2yVDFl15F9dFbciskegRONfNzoy3h6FnVZgRYfzmb3e5e39EF0lJpIEHmTtDpHxm_ql-eV7KY-1J5owVT-ppiVw1OscfkWWZdavR1fQe6HABdkUw_XSSYW4raRubUXIM9OKBmOgX4e8YgesoiS358GXcJ6bkgEOR6g%3D%3D)

Peter,

Service in government was once a noble calling. You didn’t run for office for a chance to get rich; it was a chance to serve your fellow Americans. I can’t speak for everyone, but from what I’ve seen coming out of Washington, D.C. we have too many career politicians running for office and not enough public servants – and the career politicians aren’t in it for the right reasons.

**_They run because they want to become famous._**

_**They run because they want power.**_****

Some run because they want to pad their resume on the road to becoming high-powered lobbyists, complete with a $1 million salary.

Not me.

I’m former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. From the time I was a kid, I knew I wanted to join the military – I knew I wanted to be a part of something bigger than myself. Serving other human beings is the highest calling of them all; a truth I’ve tried to live by my entire life.

I’ve been trying to get in touch with you since I launched my Senate campaign on June 27th, but I realize that it’s hard to get to know someone through words in an email. That’s why I’m including a link to my most recent TV AD – we’re calling it “ _**Mission**_ ” – for you to **[watch.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d2ddc0b8b8254816892c285121993259&_e=1ixfb9qeAcjr75FjmBldR_DP2ICbKycIdJ8ARn2Ddp3YEcZuW2px37M29E0cM2rSTJMcBv2Op0AMJMePqnLbvhY_xBwwjLRRaCrygySzDAFNaOn0Psa2u80RXPVORw-l_vF-lJLcJS9frXltdhdc4wjyySwFlkpp-LBT2Vh7qXnrnu1bnKHk9YTnAQ-jQzeX2Olbko-V3H6-d29CY59TZQ-H1vpkgqAkZ5_xlmymC98bywIpM4iV2yVDFl15F9dFawWPfNvJ6pJ6B5vAXdByoC--GxywgrszIQwC9F91ugk-2HuXefam15Mln6VmfkgnWyEslNO-9n0DyKaUACTaFtyAzSrrlZC_04FU3m1t4u9aFfX6SEXk8-0V_4bvKcm5kRyzkfnAqKhOnncHrQV4Bw%3D%3D)**

I have asked – and I will continue to ask – for your time and your support. You might as well get to know me. **[Take a look now, it will only take 60 seconds.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d2ddc0b8b8254816892c285121993259&_e=1ixfb9qeAcjr75FjmBldR_DP2ICbKycIdJ8ARn2Ddp3YEcZuW2px37M29E0cM2rSTJMcBv2Op0AMJMePqnLbvhY_xBwwjLRRaCrygySzDAFNaOn0Psa2u80RXPVORw-l_vF-lJLcJS9frXltdhdc4wjyySwFlkpp-LBT2Vh7qXnrnu1bnKHk9YTnAQ-jQzeX2Olbko-V3H6-d29CY59TZQ-H1vpkgqAkZ5_xlmymC98bywIpM4iV2yVDFl15F9dFXNNcqpGO_kjHBhqL3hPrQGm5Zo5rM5SmFNkzn16wI4NbkaqDBrzdxzXeNHJHo-5Tt3ndqs2UrPoBChzXtLWKzRR5J09kyof9rBPxHVdr92W407dAJMJo0diw-zeWD-owg0eI8vPsFKX9A8yhkCqrcg%3D%3D) **

**From fighting wildfires in the American West to fighting on the battlefields of Iraq and Afghanistan** , I’ve come to understand the essence of what America is about. It’s individual responsibility, accountability, opportunity, and success.

We need people in DC who understand what it means to serve their country and create a better future for our children.

We _**must**_ do better.

For our future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

clean_body: Another opportunity for you to get to know me | | Peter, Service in government was once a noble calling. You didn’t run for office for a chance to get rich; it was a chance to serve your fellow Americans. I can’t speak for everyone, but from what I’ve seen coming out of Washington, D.C. we have too many career politicians running for office and not enough public servants – and the career politicians aren’t in it for the right reasons. They run because they want to become famous. They run because they want power.** Some run because they want to pad their resume on the road to becoming high-powered lobbyists, complete with a $1 million salary. Not me. I’m former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. From the time I was a kid, I knew I wanted to join the military – I knew I wanted to be a part of something bigger than myself. Serving other human beings is the highest calling of them all; a truth I’ve tried to live by my entire life. I’ve been trying to get in touch with you since I launched my Senate campaign on June 27th, but I realize that it’s hard to get to know someone through words in an email. That’s why I’m including a link to my most recent TV AD – we’re calling it “ Mission ” – for you to I have asked – and I will continue to ask – for your time and your support. You might as well get to know me. From fighting wildfires in the American West to fighting on the battlefields of Iraq and Afghanistan , I’ve come to understand the essence of what America is about. It’s individual responsibility, accountability, opportunity, and success. I want to remind Washington what it is to have service and sacrifice at the center of your mission. We need people in DC who understand what it means to serve their country and create a better future for our children. We must do better. Peter,
As the school year kicks off I wanted to remind you that our children's education remains a top priority.

_**That’s why I fully support the Parents’ Bill of Rights:
**_
✅ **Transparent Curriculum Information:** School districts are now required to post curriculum information publicly. This empowers you to stay informed about what your child is learning, allowing you to have meaningful discussions about their education.

✅**Access to Academic Standards:** States are obligated to provide a public copy of any revisions made to the academic standards. This transparency ensures that you are aware of any changes to the educational framework that shape your child's learning experience.

✅**Library Reading Materials:** Schools are mandated to provide a list of books and reading materials available in the school library. This ensures that you can make informed decisions about the content your child has access to, promoting a safe and enriching reading environment.

As a mom, I understand that every child is unique, and their educational needs may vary.

That's why I'm a staunch supporter of school choice, allowing parents to choose the educational path that best suits their child's individual learning style and aspirations.

_**I believe that parents should have the freedom to make the best decision for their family.**_

clean_body: | | | | Did you record your response? Peter, As the school year kicks off I wanted to remind you that our children's education remains a top priority. That’s why I fully support the Parents’ Bill of Rights: ✅ Transparent Curriculum Information: School districts are now required to post curriculum information publicly. This empowers you to stay informed about what your child is learning, allowing you to have meaningful discussions about their education. ✅Access to Academic Standards: States are obligated to provide a public copy of any revisions made to the academic standards. This transparency ensures that you are aware of any changes to the educational framework that shape your child's learning experience. ✅Library Reading Materials: Schools are mandated to provide a list of books and reading materials available in the school library. This ensures that you can make informed decisions about the content your child has access to, promoting a safe and enriching reading environment. As a mom, I understand that every child is unique, and their educational needs may vary. That's why I'm a staunch supporter of school choice, allowing parents to choose the educational path that best suits their child's individual learning style and aspirations. I believe that parents should have the freedom to make the best decision for their family. I want to hear from YOU, Peter. | Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- ==

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Greg Abbott is about to drag Biden through the mud with this lawsuit
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 09, 2023

Greg Abbott is about
to drag Biden through the mud with this lawsuit
President Biden has waged a
war on Greg Abbott. But the Texas Governor isn't putting up with
it.

Because Greg Abbott is about to
drag Biden through the mud with this lawsuit.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Top Republican causes a
world of trouble for Mitch McConnell

Republicans can't let
2024 go to waste. If they want to win, that means putting
pressure on their own, including McConnell.
➞ Continue Reading

This Republican candidate
has come to blows with Donald Trump

The second Republican
primary debate is still upcoming. But that hasn't stopped
candidates from throwing punches.
➞ Continue Reading

Trump just obliterated a
reporter for asking this moronic question

Former President
Trump has always had a low tolerance for stupidity. The media
knows that better than anyone.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Jaiden (Gadsden Flag)
subject: I’m the 12-year-old who got kicked out of class for the Gadsden flag 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjUyLTY0MWU2NWNlZmM3YTRmNmY4NWM2MTAzMjdlYTU2ZmIwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5saWJlcnRhcy5vcmcvYWUtamFpZGVuLWFtZXJpY2FzLWhpc3Rvcnk_dXRtX3Rlcm09TExPMDkwOTIwMjMifQ/pz0XcZTCRMF1xq_torH6Uw "Tuttle Twins")
Dear Fellow American,

I’m guessing you saw me in the news last week. I’m the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a “Don’t tread on me” Gadsden flag patch on my backpack.

The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn’t let me come back to class until I removed the patch.

You might not know why this story got so many views — over 40 million so far!

After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government.

[The Tuttle Twins helped me stand up for what I believe in. I want to help them ship their pro-American history books to schools and families. Can you chip in $25 or more today?](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjUyLTY0MWU2NWNlZmM3YTRmNmY4NWM2MTAzMjdlYTU2ZmIwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5saWJlcnRhcy5vcmcvYWUtamFpZGVuLWFtZXJpY2FzLWhpc3Rvcnk_dXRtX3Rlcm09TExPMDkwOTIwMjMifQ/bnF-p0mKbqtbP1G-QgIIUA)
[Support Tuttle Twins >>](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjUyLTY0MWU2NWNlZmM3YTRmNmY4NWM2MTAzMjdlYTU2ZmIwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5saWJlcnRhcy5vcmcvYWUtamFpZGVuLWFtZXJpY2FzLWhpc3Rvcnk_dXRtX3Rlcm09TExPMDkwOTIwMjM_YW1vdW50PTIwIn0/uU4Zn66QN_wEjnweSToNCA)
I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am:
[](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjUyLTY0MWU2NWNlZmM3YTRmNmY4NWM2MTAzMjdlYTU2ZmIwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5saWJlcnRhcy5vcmcvYWUtamFpZGVuLWFtZXJpY2FzLWhpc3Rvcnk_dXRtX3Rlcm09TExPMDkwOTIwMjMifQ/rmL7dBu-9w0kxNiN45LphQ)
Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated — this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn’t other people care?

Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He’s the author of the Tuttle Twins books — and I’m a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it!

I’m definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers.

I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here’s what I told him:

_“I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts.”_
[](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjUyLTY0MWU2NWNlZmM3YTRmNmY4NWM2MTAzMjdlYTU2ZmIwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5saWJlcnRhcy5vcmcvYWUtamFpZGVuLWFtZXJpY2FzLWhpc3Rvcnk_dXRtX3Rlcm09TExPMDkwOTIwMjMifQ/6tFXo5We1D6Xqhxb5IqJJg)
I’m so happy that Connor shared my story. But what’s next?

Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future.

There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I’ve learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too.

Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas — we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us.

**So here is what we are doing:**

Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They’re so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don’t really teach history with any kind of depth.

**I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country — with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado.** 😀

[Will you stand up with me and help me? I’m super excited by this. Please donate here — every $25 donation covers the cost of the book and shipping to a library or classroom.](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjUyLTY0MWU2NWNlZmM3YTRmNmY4NWM2MTAzMjdlYTU2ZmIwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjUiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5saWJlcnRhcy5vcmcvYWUtamFpZGVuLWFtZXJpY2FzLWhpc3Rvcnk_dXRtX3Rlcm09TExPMDkwOTIwMjMifQ/_msu4CJu0J39FGoLIv4XgA) [Donate $25 = 1 Book Distributed >>](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjUyLTY0MWU2NWNlZmM3YTRmNmY4NWM2MTAzMjdlYTU2ZmIwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5saWJlcnRhcy5vcmcvYWUtamFpZGVuLWFtZXJpY2FzLWhpc3Rvcnk_dXRtX3Rlcm09TExPMDkwOTIwMjM_YW1vdW50PTEwIn0/u-8JWZ3G-Er9E8NDdy_s2Q)

[Donate $50 = 2 Books Distributed >>](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjUyLTY0MWU2NWNlZmM3YTRmNmY4NWM2MTAzMjdlYTU2ZmIwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjciLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5saWJlcnRhcy5vcmcvYWUtamFpZGVuLWFtZXJpY2FzLWhpc3Rvcnk_dXRtX3Rlcm09TExPMDkwOTIwMjM_YW1vdW50PTIwIn0/av-MGd8eXsovgQWNrI2Zug)

[Donate $100 = 4 Books Distributed >>](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjUyLTY0MWU2NWNlZmM3YTRmNmY4NWM2MTAzMjdlYTU2ZmIwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjgiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5saWJlcnRhcy5vcmcvYWUtamFpZGVuLWFtZXJpY2FzLWhpc3Rvcnk_dXRtX3Rlcm09TExPMDkwOTIwMjM_YW1vdW50PTEwMCJ9/z6BhaAX3zMi4FgcQlmfzcw)

[Donate $200 = 8 Books Distributed >>](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjUyLTY0MWU2NWNlZmM3YTRmNmY4NWM2MTAzMjdlYTU2ZmIwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjkiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5saWJlcnRhcy5vcmcvYWUtamFpZGVuLWFtZXJpY2FzLWhpc3Rvcnk_dXRtX3Rlcm09TExPMDkwOTIwMjM_YW1vdW50PTIwMCJ9/tJJMMf5-iOFvJS9bH7m48Q)

[Donate $500 = 20 Books Distributed >>](http://trk.libertyledger.)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](http://trk.libertyledger.)
**What’s super cool about this is Connor has a big donor who is passionate about this, and they agreed to double everyone’s donations!** So, let’s say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you’ll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched!

I knew how to act when my school tried to shut me down because I’d been learning these ideas for years. Because of the Tuttle Twins, I know what my rights are and how to stand up for them. People like Connor and you have been part of my story, and I’m grateful.

Now, we have to use this moment for good, and I hope you’ll stand with me to make a difference. So many other kids need to learn what I have. It’s education — real, true, good education — that will make sure other kids don’t get tread on, too: [](http://trk.libertyledger._2Jl9OCG9UPg)
Let’s use this momentum to find more Jaidens — and get them learning today! I’m pumped to work with the author of my favorite books to help even more kids learn what I have.

[So please support our project today! Donate here:](http://trk.libertyledger.-Sb6oJ_lJP5a0REg) [Donate $25 = 1 Book Distributed >>](http://trk.libertyledger.)

[Donate $50 = 2 Books Distributed >>](http://trk.libertyledger.)

[Donate $100 = 4 Books Distributed >>](http://trk.libertyledger._38BHQ3VkWi6w)

[Donate $200 = 8 Books Distributed >>](http://trk.libertyledger._6Ng)

[Donate $500 = 20 Books Distributed >>](http://trk.libertyledger._VA-l1ikGWlqFlr1Q)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](http://trk.libertyledger.-Rru0vCrdHjag)
I’m just a 12-year-old kid. I have to focus on my school work and my family, but this is a great opportunity for me to make a difference while I get ready for my gubernatorial campaign 18 years from now.

I hope you can support us! In the meantime, stay free and stay strong!

Jaiden (Gadsden Flag)

Paid for by Libertas Institute

So, let's say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you'll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched! name: Jaiden (Gadsden Flag)
subject: I was kicked out of school. Here’s what’s next…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
I’m guessing you saw me in the news last week.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1c81op8dqh3dc2lbcnkksrs67ceepeq8fjltgtg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imcor3chh2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Dear Friend,

I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week. I'm the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a "Don't tread on me" Gadsden flag patch on my backpack.

The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn't let me come back to class until I removed the patch.

You might not know why this story got so many views -- over 40 million so far!

After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government.

[The Tuttle Twins helped me stand up for what I believe in. I want to help them ship their pro-American history books to schools and families. Can you chip in $25 or more today?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zci8qls57tkkcfl3gosnhgf303vrlsac294g8gno_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imcor3chh2bs)

[Support Tuttle Twins >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg6ekfu19j6gc1jqhjgmk616t4tgfnev239lpcd0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imcor3chh2bs)

I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am:

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znv8e342n07aqkt3hf5ap74n9g9bog0e5po12gag_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imcor3chh2bs)

Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated -- this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn't other people care?

Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He's the author of the Tuttle Twins books -- and I'm a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it!

I'm definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers.

I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here's what I told him:

_" I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts."_

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg4d0o3kutm809rav075k0oo4293b5qer5jo7um8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imcor3chh2bs)

I'm so happy that Connor shared my story. But what's next?

Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future.

There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I've learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too.

Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas -- we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us.

**So here is what we are doing:**

Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They're so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don't really teach history with any kind of depth.

**I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country -- with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado.** 😀

[Will you stand up with me and help me? I'm super excited by this. Please donate here -- every $25 donation covers the cost of the book and shipping to a library or classroom.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgh6okl12nj4ns1vfjpic895citjbop7utc4hui0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imcor3chh2bs)

[Donate $25 = 1 Book Distributed >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zomskg0p7cl5i721gshre8nptno4gn9m6s2bokjg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imcor3chh2bs)

[Donate $50 = 2 Books Distributed >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdmpdv5v15nk3hc00ojn2mhnno9m9iabmv2va388_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imcor3chh2bs)

[Donate $100 = 4 Books Distributed >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoqnjgvnlk0ncn76orfud05lm3cq9qmbb1h5tvjg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imcor3chh2bs)

[Donate $200 = 8 Books Distributed >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk6hpul1k6aibnfba89ks7utgl6nc9lp4g5gjbp8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imcor3chh2bs)

[Donate $500 = 20 Books Distributed >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za13uqtb7cec6fp2g03odirc71rr411pfsv2rc60_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imcor3chh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi5ibhoen1sncqdchov6rrqbp1kive1dtpgingko_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imcor3chh2bs)

**What 's super cool about this is Connor has a big donor who is passionate about this, and they agreed to double everyone's donations!** So, let's say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you'll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched!

I knew how to act when my school tried to shut me down because I'd been learning these ideas for years. Because of the Tuttle Twins, I know what my rights are and how to stand up for them. People like Connor and you have been part of my story, and I'm grateful.

Now, we have to use this moment for good, and I hope you'll stand with me to make a difference. So many other kids need to learn what I have. It's education -- real, true, good education -- that will make sure other kids don't get tread on, too:

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zggeisi0eksken4g5pvkgbaprr8aphpuu6ekg81g_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imcor3chh2bs)

Let's use this momentum to find more Jaidens -- and get them learning today! I'm pumped to work with the author of my favorite books to help even more kids learn what I have.

[So please support our project today! Donate here:](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4mmplc4tv0hdaghgqo15n2dj5pr90d524qqld00_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imcor3chh2bs)

clean_body: I’m guessing you saw me in the news last week. "Tuttle Twins" Dear Friend, I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week. I'm the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a "Don't tread on me" Gadsden flag patch on my backpack. The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn't let me come back to class until I removed the patch. You might not know why this story got so many views -- over 40 million so far! After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government. I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am: Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated -- this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn't other people care? Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He's the author of the Tuttle Twins books -- and I'm a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it! I'm definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers. I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here's what I told him: " I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts." I'm so happy that Connor shared my story. But what's next? Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future. There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I've learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too. Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas -- we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us. So here is what we are doing: Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They're so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don't really teach history with any kind of depth. I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country -- with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado. 😀 What 's super cool about this is Connor has a big donor who is passionate about this, and they agreed to double everyone's donations! So, let's say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you'll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched! I knew how to act when my school tried to shut me down because I'd been learning these ideas for years. Because of the Tuttle Twins, I know what my rights are and how to stand up for them. People like Connor and you have been part of my story, and I'm grateful. Now, we have to use this moment for good, and I hope you'll stand with me to make a difference. So many other kids need to learn what I have. It's education -- real, true, good education -- that will make sure other kids don't get tread on, too: Let's use this momentum to find more Jaidens -- and get them learning today! I'm pumped to work with the author of my favorite books to help even more kids learn what I have. I'm just a 12-year-old kid. I have to focus on my school work and my family, but this is a great opportunity for me to make a difference while I get ready for my gubernatorial campaign 18 years from now. I hope you can support us! In the meantime, stay free and stay strong! Jaiden (Gadsden Flag) Paid for by Libertas Institute ICYMI News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: The 10 Causes of the Reagan Boom
body:

---
| | Dear Friend,
In these turbulent economic times, it's evident that concerns weigh heavily on the minds of many. Historically high inflation rates have placed an unprecedented strain on family budgets, while the recent collapses of high-profile banks have only heightened fear and uncertainty.
Amid the search for answers it is clear: America's current policies differ significantly from those that have proved successful in the past.

So, how can we get the country back on track? And should we look to the past or charge ahead with new ideas?

To help address these challenges, the Hoover Institution recently published an eBook called _The Ten Causes of the Reagan Boom: 1982-1997_.

And I’m emailing you today to make sure you get your free copy at this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/the-ten-causes-of-the-reagan-boom](http://trk.secureandprosper.)**

Friend, this resource was adapted from a speech given in 1997 by Martin Anderson, a Hoover fellow who served as a campaign and policy advisor to both Presidents Reagan and Nixon.

When you read this eBook, you’ll revisit ten factors that caused an economic boom that began in 1982 and continued for nearly two decades.

By delving into this insightful material, you will get a clear understanding of how key policies effect a nation’s prosperity—and how they could steer our nation towards economic recovery.

Please be sure to get your free copy of this important eBook right now using this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/the-ten-causes-of-the-reagan-boom](http://trk.secureandprosper.)**

Thank you,
Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

name: American Briefing
subject: The Pivotal Moments that ended the Cold War
body:
Inside, you’ll learn the truth about what happened under an actual socialist regime

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5do2i8djr3eidu3ee5notm1j9anmv1opp4bbfa8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj1cph2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,
Picture the night of November 9, 1989, when East Germans triumphantly surged into West Germany as the Berlin Wall fell. It marked the dawn of the Cold War's end and unequivocal proof of communist rule's failure in East Germany.
Fast forward three decades, and we witness calls for socialism, especially among youth, both in the U.S. and around the globe--just as we did in the period of unrest a century ago.

However, it is crucial to grasp the lessons history has relentlessly taught us--socialism, time and again, meets brutal failure. If we don't learn from history, we are doomed to repeat its mistakes.

That's why we published an eBook that delves deep into the realities of socialism during the Cold War in Germany. Allow me to offer you a FREE copy of _Leaving Socialism Behind: A Lesson From German History_ through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/leaving-socialism-behind/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs18gev2g0l637cqdlqtpte2k0stfjsj08920g4g_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj1cph2bs)**

Friend, this eBook by Hoover Institution senior fellow Russell Berman holds incredible significance for our present society.

Inside, you'll learn the truth about what happened under an actual socialist regime and how the inhabitants of East Germany constantly sought refuge in capitalist West Germany--and were only stopped because of the construction of the Berlin Wall.

You'll discover the essence of socialism--an agenda of repression, not poverty alleviation. The eBook introduces you to Rosa Luxemburg, a socialist activist, who criticized Russian socialism for silencing the people's voice, foreseeing a future of dictatorship, assassinations, and prisoner executions.

You can get your free copy of this eBook here: **[https://resources.hoover.org/leaving-socialism-behind/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zoj9l6oi9vfo0902qer6v5udr47tcbc4is4kmt8o_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj1cph2bs)**

I think you'll find it enriches your understanding in light of the debates in our current society.

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Jaiden=C2=A0=28Gadsden?= Flag)
subject: I’m the 12-year-old who got kicked out of class for the Gadsden flag
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
I’m guessing you saw me in the news last week.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5kfo5n0qq35bpklgfkidp8b5rb0c3bvgp40njl8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Dear Friend,

I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week. I'm the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a "Don't tread on me" Gadsden flag patch on my backpack.

The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn't let me come back to class until I removed the patch.

You might not know why this story got so many views -- over 40 million so far!

After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government.

[The Tuttle Twins helped me stand up for what I believe in. I want to help them ship their pro-American history books to schools and families. Can you chip in $25 or more today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z53klgsm3qjmgsoadrg08lfk5uik5vhoplonkcr0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Support Tuttle Twins >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8cnj60jb5i9uepib1qm4a8vtoa21545v5nkqld0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am:

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb2p74087h56reekokk75gshtr7b5fmrdahh7p40_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated -- this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn't other people care?

Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He's the author of the Tuttle Twins books -- and I'm a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it!

I'm definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers.

I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here's what I told him:

_" I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts."_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjm1vjnfdodl02iibe94o70juqm8lj8hvanlvi4g_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

I'm so happy that Connor shared my story. But what's next?

Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future.

There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I've learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too.

Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas -- we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us.

**So here is what we are doing:**

Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They're so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don't really teach history with any kind of depth.

**I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country -- with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado.** 😀

[Will you stand up with me and help me? I'm super excited by this. Please donate here -- every $25 donation covers the cost of the book and shipping to a library or classroom.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsopeh6a65vfl7vqo5dvm7m4lqlt90m8jvvg4dvo_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $25 = 1 Book Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7e5uio4d3tm748n661vk1fso4tuoj2ppld4kdi8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $50 = 2 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1lt5f01bkivubn1ut7ghgq8l1lrj28bp3ki8qc0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $100 = 4 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvavhcmmvudsos32gbai5r6q512r116b01i8j5jo_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $200 = 8 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjrl1uqlsk1ise29vo0taqmnkbbnc2259dca6hog_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $500 = 20 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkj5c7jc788qn64q06vslu6j6k8m97t2vp8i8uto_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztf1hob2c699ffkn4pfn9tmd5c4hr2herumtjvno_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

**What 's super cool about this is Connor has a big donor who is passionate about this, and they agreed to double everyone's donations!** So, let's say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you'll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched!

I knew how to act when my school tried to shut me down because I'd been learning these ideas for years. Because of the Tuttle Twins, I know what my rights are and how to stand up for them. People like Connor and you have been part of my story, and I'm grateful.

Now, we have to use this moment for good, and I hope you'll stand with me to make a difference. So many other kids need to learn what I have. It's education -- real, true, good education -- that will make sure other kids don't get tread on, too:

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zusmqisdniibdote70h39qhkghcb9ab0o7r9krt8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

Let's use this momentum to find more Jaidens -- and get them learning today! I'm pumped to work with the author of my favorite books to help even more kids learn what I have.

[So please support our project today! Donate here:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhbcnih30bsfijrvcepovdp1rp59taa6gkf0ebdg_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $25 = 1 Book Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsos6l9gbj1h2oifcvo1b2r9ad21olkoncm3u060_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $50 = 2 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb78advneb7ki8bpaf4rr0iq44n7rh2dn61aimig_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $100 = 4 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z51ituptm495bnlejbp8d6rcp0bfu96me1vc1fb8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $200 = 8 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9p662uf3aov5cia0mvfb281msmishirjqgh0vr8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $500 = 20 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl05jnjhgsn67ve3pjg8d80i8mmi8eieds3r21i8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6hdpg3li8380bisr276u6slju22dseq19mt49c8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)

I'm just a 12-year-old kid. I have to focus on my school work and my family, but this is a great opportunity for me to make a difference while I get ready for my gubernatorial campaign 18 years from now.

I hope you can support us! In the meantime, stay free and stay strong!

Jaiden (Gadsden Flag)

Paid for by Libertas Institute

American Action News
---

_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztiqicb4ehmuan55dkbf8pf8191el0hrbcdpdao8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34cdj61ob0s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbvpf1odc92uqa7qjn5v10hu7otuc51ggp9ovam8_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9imeoj6cjh2bs)_

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of best-selling survival food kits.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvldb15o0ldiuuvgjgm01pcn8vk2ekadannpjt00_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9hm0o75chh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.

subject: Joe Biden is horrified about the secret CNN just learned about him
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 09, 2023

Joe Biden is
horrified about the secret CNN just learned about him
President Biden doesn't want
anyone to know the truth. But it's out of his control now.

Because CNN has learned a secret
about President Biden that has him scared to death.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Greg Abbott is about to
drag Biden through the mud with this lawsuit

President Biden has
waged a war on Greg Abbott. But the Texas Governor isn't putting
up with it.
➞ Continue Reading

Top Republican causes a
world of trouble for Mitch McConnell

Republicans can't let
2024 go to waste. If they want to win, that means putting
pressure on their own, including McConnell.
➞ Continue Reading

This Republican candidate
has come to blows with Donald Trump

The second Republican
primary debate is still upcoming. But that hasn't stopped
candidates from throwing punches.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

[Acquisition Program Is Talent Pipeline to Prepare Students for DOD Civilian Careers](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zunhf6numh2hbnhkoqik9i2h2p5pt669vco6t0to_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f834sug61pt46oq7at5meion9dtjmmg74ttn69q3bdd4mpqq2t1hmkpr2td0eio7acdkmeqjb8bnmmg74t9gegp7add6e5qn2d9jm5r7b8pnm9qq2dth6mj39crkm6qb8ctlkoq34t9l69r7f8h1k8gn48n24hhm9ob2cdgm2ob1c8iv0)
The new Defense Civilian Training Corps pilot program provides 100% tuition scholarships and monthly stipends through an ROTC-like development program preparing undergraduate students for a direct path into the Defense Department's acquisition-related civilian careers. The program incorporates a defense-focused, active-learning curriculum along with project-based summer internships at DOD organizations.

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: A Follower of Christ
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
As a true follower of Christ, your job and who you are in Christ are inseparable.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ze5p645lin5deqeumu6rj2loqoi0ubt9kp6m9v9g_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9hm2ob1cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2utgm6otm6hi3at1mm9rb8tj4egpr6dhlmcq3bdtmm1ob0sjmciq33crielqb2c37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphimsqr2ptiehj3applmjjr1db5e8iv0)
As a true follower of Christ, your job and who you are in Christ are inseparable.

|
---
| | | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjh70mk1ltiabictejhj5ept36povk7h9t38pt08_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9hm2ob1cjh2bs)
---

As a true follower of Christ, your job and who you are in Christ are inseparable.

The author C. S. Lewis stated, “I believe in Christianity as I believe that the sun has risen: not only because I see it, but because by it I see everything else.”

This is the truth we all know, for it is through our belief in Jesus Christ that we gain the strength to face what must be faced without resorting to falsehoods.

---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlvgfbdt63qvq7l7bn3s84t7qrslhnaoirghaj1o_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9hm2ob1cjh2bs)
---

_**Our strength granted to us by God is our armor**_ , which permits us to meet the challenges of life and address the problems of our nation and the world.

The lack of faith-driven judgements in our nation’s capital explains why the problems we face as a nation continue to pile up.

Our leaders in Washington are driven by self-interest and lack the moral clarity and courage to meet the challenges of the day.

---
| | [ELECT FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERS](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zfvaiii2o06kmq29t19ehddpo6mph5ek192vrpug_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9hm2ob1cjh2bs)
---

That’s why I’ve been traveling around the country to support faith-driven conservatives who let God - _**not self-interest**_ \- guide them. **[Can you spare just $5 to help me in this endeavor?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zhju6acn4f05hbuasphem5tf0rj7o3re73sodqgo_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9hm2ob1cjh2bs "Can you spare just $5 to help me in this endeavor?")**** **

Though times are tough and the state of our nation is bleak, I know that with a principled, faith-driven Congress we can get America back on track - **_are you with me?_**

God Bless,

---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zfae0o9r8smp3a78cpo23lvc31nqj87nbgu8v3c0_rp22sh2s8i66p71c9hm2ob1cjh2bs)
---

Mike Pompeo

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dominic=20Rapini?=
subject: Connecticut Libraries Approve Content Facebook Bans
body:
Liberals can't get their 'Bans' straight | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=25f42c7af8)
---
|
---
|
---
# Connecticut Libraries Approve
# Content Facebook Bans
|
---
_In towns across Connecticut, schools and public libraries appear to be buying and promoting books targeting young people with**controversial content (pornography)**. Now Facebook says this content cannot be published on their platform. _
|
---
**Why it matters:**_Residents and parents count on their school and public libraries as places children can go to explore and learn. With Facebook’s ban of the content of the controversial books these libraries are buying and promoting, more questions should be asked._
|
---
**Key Details:** √ Town money is being used to buy and promote controversial books that some claim are “essential reading and lifesaving”, while the largest global social media platform Facebook says the same content is “pornographic”. From schools in Greenwich to all the way to Stafford in Northeast Connecticut these books are now in libraries being promoted to students and children (apparently all ages!). It appears many public libraries like the one in Putnam, Connecticut have them too. √ Seeking to highlight some of these controversial books because the Republican Town Committee in Putnam, Connecticut (PRTC) felt that they are inappropriate, the PRTC shared some of the content from the books on their Facebook account. But guess what happened next? Facebook shut it all down. Fast and firm. √ While questions are being asked nationally about the appropriate role of social media companies using content moderation as a pretext for censorship, Facebook’s clear message in this case raises questions for Connecticut public and school libraries, parents, and the public. √ The issue of controversial books targeting young people is a hot debate across the political divide. On one side we have the activists who describe the books as “crucial to ensuring representation” while calling all those who disagree with them “book banners”. On the other side, parents and others are against the inclusion of these books using public funds and being “officially” promoted to young people. √ More troubling are the reports about the treatment of parents who asked questions and complained. Camilo Riano of Westport and a Board of Education candidate explains “The radical left in Westport calls us book banners, but we are just parents trying to protect our kids from pornography, not ban books. It’s good to know that Facebook agrees with us.”
|
---
**Key Takeaways:** √ As public institutions, libraries have Boards for the purpose of oversight and compliance with local, state and federal regulations. Are these boards being kept in the dark?
√ Most town and city Boards of Education (BOE) have policy manuals that directly address controversial content like these books. For example, new content that is to be officially presented to the students within the realm of their academic course of instruction, are usually supposed to be reviewed, approved, and recommended to the BOE for their approval. Did this happen? If so, concerned residents have a right to see the documents and read the rationale for approval. If not, why not? √ Another consideration is BOE Policy Manual requirements for parental notice of the right to “Opt-Out” of “Controversial” content which includes the subject matter of these books. Were parents notified in advance of these controversial books in the schools? Also check out the BOE policy on personal opinions vs. indoctrination. Are books on controversial subjects the personal opinion of the person who placed them in the library or an official public act which could be reasonably viewed as indoctrination? √ We must stop the vilification and personal attacks on parents by a few zealots. If movie theaters do not allow children to see R rated movies how can a few activists force pornography into our libraries using our tax money?
|
---

**Closing thought:** Facebook’s crystal-clear message about this controversial content should be a wake-up call for parents and concerned residents. Start asking questions and demanding answers. See what is in your local and school libraries using this [https://www.gofollett.com/](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=dc3519704e&e=8763c56857)
With many school board elections this November, now is the time for voters to learn more.
**What Can I Do?** Get InvolvedBe Brave, Run For SomethingBuild a community group to monitor your local library Trust, but verify Share this email

|
---
**Special thanks to 2WINCT COO, Chris Coyle for building the gameplan to protect our youth and their precious innocence**
|
---

###
2WINCT is partnered with Freedom Project USA to build a coalition of conservatives across Connecticut. We are committed to Constitutional principles that will reflect in our mission of recruiting and developing strong, conservative candidates; identifying and fighting for key issues that impinge on our freedoms; and to create branding and messaging programs that illustrate our values as citizens of Connecticut.
Founded in 2019, Freedom Project USA’s mission is to defend liberty and free market principles. We advocate, involve, and educate lawmakers, job creators, and the American public about free market principles, personal responsibility, and economic freedom to allow everyone equal opportunity to pursue success.
###

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: The Pivotal Moments that ended the Cold War
body:
Inside, you'll learn the truth about what happened under an actual socialist regime

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2ccc1e943d54310870370ce8ec8cd64&_e=vsxXUpQszmfDl_f2Uq9u3xz_7k8LiY4SHLeGE2jj62NIWkTP7od-fgMQaU7xSAl6fw2na1pJrbL70Hwk2c0Gc9eOWD-bWXQ34PheIJNs1n54rYJlJVC_lopF8rYk8kRNXCYDUClzy3reD3f0rv-Cr1jJpA5v03-ThdIz7gDGGQguDLEIkillJAa2CZWEAPH0dS9Qo4VUWFmDLT8oGRkams1QoK45OxbIYoH62V0_eif3IBogdYwII-SifZ96ChASHA-YBnfSs2HJEIzKyILcqwPg7DZwRzKJxb1UVGBTq9MpDIk3ljlCnO4y5lfQTnffE4dPn93DgcQXUFKCQ7EXonyIgAsfmY8dIWDewOCroMsISPYFpnOGA468cf7-QOVi)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,
Picture the night of November 9, 1989, when East Germans triumphantly surged into West Germany as the Berlin Wall fell. It marked the dawn of the Cold War's end and unequivocal proof of communist rule's failure in East Germany.
Fast forward three decades, and we witness calls for socialism, especially among youth, both in the U.S. and around the globe--just as we did in the period of unrest a century ago.

However, it is crucial to grasp the lessons history has relentlessly taught us--socialism, time and again, meets brutal failure. If we don't learn from history, we are doomed to repeat its mistakes.

That's why we published an eBook that delves deep into the realities of socialism during the Cold War in Germany. Allow me to offer you a FREE copy of _Leaving Socialism Behind: A Lesson From German History_ through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/leaving-socialism-behind/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2ccc1e943d54310870370ce8ec8cd64&_e=vsxXUpQszmfDl_f2Uq9u3xz_7k8LiY4SHLeGE2jj62NIWkTP7od-fgMQaU7xSAl6fw2na1pJrbL70Hwk2c0Gc9eOWD-bWXQ34PheIJNs1n54rYJlJVC_lopF8rYk8kRNXCYDUClzy3reD3f0rv-Cr1jJpA5v03-ThdIz7gDGGQguDLEIkillJAa2CZWEAPH0dS9Qo4VUWFmDLT8oGRkams1QoK45OxbIYoH62V0_eif8Af0L3NwyjlcX6b-YG3D7jSBrdug74JtfwZkaDW5kcL8Y1rKHk0bnBpMRoqhakui3JGuWyGu8RGOEovLpyWrtqrn2iBVLSNwAR-bCzOv24F5isN913AjNCJIWeZFBi885ORdbc2oa70Y106S-Eg4u)**

Friend, this eBook by Hoover Institution senior fellow Russell Berman holds incredible significance for our present society.

Inside, you'll learn the truth about what happened under an actual socialist regime and how the inhabitants of East Germany constantly sought refuge in capitalist West Germany--and were only stopped because of the construction of the Berlin Wall.

You'll discover the essence of socialism--an agenda of repression, not poverty alleviation. The eBook introduces you to Rosa Luxemburg, a socialist activist, who criticized Russian socialism for silencing the people's voice, foreseeing a future of dictatorship, assassinations, and prisoner executions.

You can get your free copy of this eBook here: **[https://resources.hoover.org/leaving-socialism-behind/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2ccc1e943d54310870370ce8ec8cd64&_e=vsxXUpQszmfDl_f2Uq9u3xz_7k8LiY4SHLeGE2jj62NIWkTP7od-fgMQaU7xSAl6fw2na1pJrbL70Hwk2c0Gc9eOWD-bWXQ34PheIJNs1n54rYJlJVC_lopF8rYk8kRNXCYDUClzy3reD3f0rv-Cr1jJpA5v03-ThdIz7gDGGQguDLEIkillJAa2CZWEAPH0dS9Qo4VUWFmDLT8oGRkams1QoK45OxbIYoH62V0_eid8NTEVZJEUTG57YCiJ6WKIGy4dFNlmPw2Z2EE9ugMr2Y3KdAtdlTfoKz3Q9B8tOFb2c0eNe9KQTtQwUyDHcdVlXVWx0lEGs0urpIh-YmH7bWcoIDcM0iKQuWCpKB_lSKyYtixgqZyclapcTDCRMjMn)**

I think you'll find it enriches your understanding in light of the debates in our current society.

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: What do you want to see in our next President?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I am personally asking you to complete our 2024 Presidential Survey

|
---
| | |
Hi, Friend. It's Kellyanne Conway!

subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of best-selling survival food kits.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=72f80d33714c41a585169377c7406ca8&_e=uI7zhRGJZYF6AxCRjj_uulZr5C_nPd3U35CHYzHwbmFKDG2foRMh1uQw5ml_9qm-wXqnqaQ6XvXDQAMidPk4Gb0zo6dkO2m85QikrQQhdQCPNgypVSYN_qzPhcLcCQnUd7azLjmHtDt0h5Z5kf7cAFRTO58joGATMhHSvOtrd_5OkOP_AYoyIuEndL2WgUCqD72gyU9FUJqJ4v2wp0fVwxYhNkLwHAp2Zni3r-EPY67XkWnkAYoYv3gMs72IPPJ0KL5m1NPo621dff_rXyi2n2S7bMT9HUpeYToMzE4q3tA%3D) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.

Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: "Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can. Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _
