name: Jaiden (Gadsden Flag)
subject: I’m the 12-year-old who got kicked out of class for the Gadsden flag 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
[](http://trk.readactnews. "Tuttle Twins")
Dear Fellow American,

I’m guessing you saw me in the news last week. I’m the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a “Don’t tread on me” Gadsden flag patch on my backpack.

The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn’t let me come back to class until I removed the patch.

You might not know why this story got so many views — over 40 million so far!

After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government.

[The Tuttle Twins helped me stand up for what I believe in. I want to help them ship their pro-American history books to schools and families. Can you chip in $25 or more today?](http://trk.readactnews._pJg)
[Support Tuttle Twins >>](http://trk.readactnews._YW1vdW50PTIwIn0/aPcy3Tf9BgYBU4M13iQW6w)
I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am:
[](http://trk.readactnews._Q8F-fPvTA4apa0gvIYw)
Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated — this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn’t other people care?

Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He’s the author of the Tuttle Twins books — and I’m a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it!

I’m definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers.

I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here’s what I told him:

_“I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts.”_
[](http://trk.readactnews._aq8RRoDCEPWBw)
I’m so happy that Connor shared my story. But what’s next?

Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future.

There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I’ve learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too.

Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas — we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us.

**So here is what we are doing:**

Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They’re so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don’t really teach history with any kind of depth.

**I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country — with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado.** 😀

[Will you stand up with me and help me? I’m super excited by this. Please donate here — every $25 donation covers the cost of the book and shipping to a library or classroom.](http://trk.readactnews.) [Donate $25 = 1 Book Distributed >>](http://trk.readactnews._YW1vdW50PTEwIn0/VImk2wGkGfxX4F9UYmhEIA)

[Donate $50 = 2 Books Distributed >>](http://trk.readactnews._YW1vdW50PTIwIn0/5ptuJ1QWC471WIsxmDRNQw)

[Donate $100 = 4 Books Distributed >>](http://trk.readactnews._YW1vdW50PTEwMCJ9/CcyW4vg6AGHwQRE1V4bY-Q)

[Donate $200 = 8 Books Distributed >>](http://trk.readactnews._YW1vdW50PTIwMCJ9/lqpjmWmaYKwhWqqdyz-5eA)

[Donate $500 = 20 Books Distributed >>](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyNTItOTljZmIxNDdmYWVmNDRhNDllNDkxYjFhZDFiMTE2N2QiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5saWJlcnRhcy5vcmcvYWUtamFpZGVuLWFtZXJpY2FzLWhpc3Rvcnk_dXRtX3Rlcm09UkFOTzA5MDkyMDIzP2Ftb3VudD01MDAifQ/bPYGo4CZZZV5FE3IL9r-Uw)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyNTItOTljZmIxNDdmYWVmNDRhNDllNDkxYjFhZDFiMTE2N2QiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5saWJlcnRhcy5vcmcvYWUtamFpZGVuLWFtZXJpY2FzLWhpc3Rvcnk_dXRtX3Rlcm09UkFOTzA5MDkyMDIzP2Ftb3VudD0xMDAwIn0/5bO3SrONU7nno-EHrYb1Dg)
**What’s super cool about this is Connor has a big donor who is passionate about this, and they agreed to double everyone’s donations!** So, let’s say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you’ll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched!

I knew how to act when my school tried to shut me down because I’d been learning these ideas for years. Because of the Tuttle Twins, I know what my rights are and how to stand up for them. People like Connor and you have been part of my story, and I’m grateful.

Now, we have to use this moment for good, and I hope you’ll stand with me to make a difference. So many other kids need to learn what I have. It’s education — real, true, good education — that will make sure other kids don’t get tread on, too: [](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyNTItOTljZmIxNDdmYWVmNDRhNDllNDkxYjFhZDFiMTE2N2QiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5saWJlcnRhcy5vcmcvYWUtamFpZGVuLWFtZXJpY2FzLWhpc3Rvcnk_dXRtX3Rlcm09UkFOTzA5MDkyMDIzIn0/yAN3uEyTKyRmzPN39i0Isg)
Let’s use this momentum to find more Jaidens — and get them learning today! I’m pumped to work with the author of my favorite books to help even more kids learn what I have.

[So please support our project today! clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. "Tuttle Twins" Dear Fellow American, I’m guessing you saw me in the news last week. I’m the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a “Don’t tread on me” Gadsden flag patch on my backpack. The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn’t let me come back to class until I removed the patch. You might not know why this story got so many views — over 40 million so far! After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government. I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am: Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated — this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn’t other people care? Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He’s the author of the Tuttle Twins books — and I’m a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it! I’m definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers. I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here’s what I told him: “I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts.” I’m so happy that Connor shared my story. But what’s next? Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future. There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I’ve learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too. Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas — we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us. So here is what we are doing: Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They’re so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don’t really teach history with any kind of depth. I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country — with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado. 😀 What’s super cool about this is Connor has a big donor who is passionate about this, and they agreed to double everyone’s donations! So, let’s say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you’ll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched! I knew how to act when my school tried to shut me down because I’d been learning these ideas for years. Because of the Tuttle Twins, I know what my rights are and how to stand up for them. People like Connor and you have been part of my story, and I’m grateful. Now, we have to use this moment for good, and I hope you’ll stand with me to make a difference. So many other kids need to learn what I have. It’s education — real, true, good education — that will make sure other kids don’t get tread on, too: Let’s use this momentum to find more Jaidens — and get them learning today! I’m pumped to work with the author of my favorite books to help even more kids learn what I have. I’m just a 12-year-old kid. I have to focus on my school work and my family, but this is a great opportunity for me to make a difference while I get ready for my gubernatorial campaign 18 years from now. I hope you can support us! In the meantime, stay free and stay strong! Jaiden (Gadsden Flag) Paid for by Libertas Institute Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: Campbell Pair
subject: Going Back to School
body:
Peter,

The summer is already coming to a close – can you believe it? As August ends, the school year begins and Liz’s kids go off to college and back to High School, I look back on my time in in school. Rather than remembering the warm feeling I had for the first day of school, it reminds me of the realities that I faced, my friends faced, and my teachers faced.

Going to school should not mean clear backpacks.

It should not be about banning books.

It should not mean lockdown drills.

It should not mean fearing for your life or your child's life.

Liz Whitmer Gereghty served two terms on the Katonah-Lewisboro school board. She is a mother of three. She knows what it means to want to protect your children, your neighbor, your friend. She knows what it’s like to put your child on the school bus in the morning and hope with everything you have that they come home the same way. That’s why she worked with those in her community to pass a bond (the first in over 20 years) that puts in place safety measures to protect those going to school everyday.

We need Liz to continue her hard work and help all in NY-17. Will you join Team Liz by making a contribution today? Go to: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/](https://lizforny-dot-yamm-track.appspot.com/2Txh2gYtfUy0a9tRCV_OM-85lhDt2T5v1iDyoVvxpPejfj_Z6igGgOyBmsdWFGgibYEEOC4LJJOSsp0hMqCpiIG0XQ60krg_wOVGy2QTcadDFVkTKhBcTOs8r6kd5yZZhfs3aUCxoz0uKcXUe2mdKLsVUHCBkhyCo4KAr4XYnfbmYwdAY7u2WZ1DowFv6RtyubHeomNZC).

Thank you for your support and for joining Team Liz.

Best,

**Campbell Pair**
Finance Director | [Liz for NY](https://lizforny-dot-yamm-track.appspot.com/2WQPIePYR4LHjeIYR6C4YpryOQp7UjaIBzAi_HVV0mSD1j_Z6igGHLUvsuN2EmqkNKQMjjesAFwizP0CdhT5v4cNlpScQ4VpeYnTJjAsJNHPdY_3JDo5qDOCKDhf1EZNRLbdANR6oe5eJcSovTzppvNh56GolmBpk5ir37W7N8NKo7A)**
**
[campbell@lizforny.com](mailto:campbell@lizforny.com)
C: (404) 317-0675

[https://app.yamm.com/unsubscribe](https://lizforny-dot-yamm-track.appspot.com/2E8kiQLj-SP2IK3xmakzaT-L2oAd02mRpkLkDTHNuAukjkPZ6igEL6675qOEIkgrh2N59xdfXgDI0OHbNrGekEzsGF8aNi9grjYWNyYKD4CTgKUFy0JZOnORVu7EpB2MhSvnKxyF2M5R8iqHq3tFA3coeFSyvs9X-QrsijoEsFqMzm2i4)

She knows what it’s like to put your child on the school bus in the morning and hope with everything you have that they come home the same way. That’s why she worked with those in her community to pass a bond (the first in over 20 years) that puts in place safety measures to protect those going to school everyday. We need Liz to continue her hard work and help all in NY-17. Will you join Team Liz by making a contribution today? Go to: . Thank you for your support and for joining Team Liz. Best, Campbell Pair Finance Director | mailto:campbell@lizforny.com C: (404) 317-0675

| | |
Mark Levin is sounding the alarm, and we here at House Republicans' HQ have taken note.

**As we speak, top Democrats are trying to disqualify President Trump from appearing on the ballot in 2024.**

| | | [STOP THE WITCH HUNT](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49bb507d66b047e3b1779d8be04eb6c9&_e=a7lNJMQT5FwFkB0amxMr8epMNLexNrRJsLSFkVs_3FLODzwvAbyUlloHy1L0zfSRqxoyvfmXDsF8_aRdT87cLsffjSz60pS363wFX_cgv3lC49krUAOkideShuzi6QmHvWmnevyemK9PoXAxKRiTm0zz4clM5d4db8DDpKSOqXgznwWH0jQEN_K9fWxRAahHcZM_4EW6ELp3tRrE_zo3DLMw9zz-mvpxvm38pFf__uOUFCaosemifB2wynZDYQqb7PTnJ8WlQGSV_OKYM3ncRXzgzBDR2Ynx_YsWoxkHgRxRkOs0zDDXfSOOQQo6EEwmsbfnQpKJ62GVHP5sBwdJ30UBpscGNMjR3Pzo5lkBGaXRfqpa7fkxRH-lBOl3XREjg4FXvyVTNk1MKBJ4EnlwEAot9MIEfXD03wQ1W35NEIxmR0gPRb98-BVl65M1EfbMy3LPCQ6qPl52BBLPdNzQiA%3D%3D "Generic Button")
---

Just look at what Adam Schiff said this weekend:

_**"By the clear terms of the 14th Amendment, [Trump] should be disqualified from holding office"**_

Can you believe this, Friend?

They're terrified that President Trump will beat Biden, so they are running to the courts to prevent Americans from having the choice.

name: Jaiden (Gadsden Flag)
subject: I was kicked out of school. Here’s what’s next…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3a72857310904337af059533764b1f5a&_e=DcAbvrdRcCWb9GAA5vk7fykHLtFxkGZWD6orReOO1F-fmUxCjh0GuHmN8-553NcR24VJkHJUX7StJrI5u1ty5ZG48kyB03EjYRPdYbLWUTLw-oNHuzAuIkes7B5fBVmL9m9QWkEJjK4o173stnVMewmX0_XcwG2pco1qMfCDYpjFgiyr0EcBOwHwRNaKN_6CgFOzIcebPPZbyLAiFCc3fGFgTdjyNU8kiO1TTE_a_VDd5E68xwu6_pCLWlhPuoCLwmnXNYe_c1Jb_XG3fa7D2EwrtkVjuFByf8pXq8drFY8%3D "Tuttle Twins")

Dear Friend,

I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week. I'm the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a "Don't tread on me" Gadsden flag patch on my backpack.

The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn't let me come back to class until I removed the patch.

You might not know why this story got so many views -- over 40 million so far!

After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government.

[The Tuttle Twins helped me stand up for what I believe in. I want to help them ship their pro-American history books to schools and families. Can you chip in $25 or more today?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3a72857310904337af059533764b1f5a&_e=DcAbvrdRcCWb9GAA5vk7fykHLtFxkGZWD6orReOO1F-fmUxCjh0GuHmN8-553NcR24VJkHJUX7StJrI5u1ty5ZG48kyB03EjYRPdYbLWUTLw-oNHuzAuIkes7B5fBVmL9m9QWkEJjK4o173stnVMe-H4UlUyEF8aSIUvDGzDdblfmlc-AMQSBo_HmEZSJ5d5lBPk5VgRoKWq4i_3-JNxRymlrKFT5PtMHkflR92snbHyhv8F5uU9JZAiS-vWr_-bsalYeq9ZaSrAOX4I8acD3sRAU0hWuFnMvlZbAdnjXos%3D)

[Support Tuttle Twins >>](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3a72857310904337af059533764b1f5a&_e=DcAbvrdRcCWb9GAA5vk7fykHLtFxkGZWD6orReOO1F-fmUxCjh0GuHmN8-553NcR24VJkHJUX7StJrI5u1ty5ZG48kyB03EjYRPdYbLWUTLw-oNHuzAuIkes7B5fBVmLdlTxZLkBMLEQi8mLE9UksEfE2zYVHNUpdjId3wwCvzQaq5_RyPo1Ayuqrt-He2odNJUNmkVc02soC3yKSP3DdJSW1aoUBOnwPP6qgpRlXBbTQ79pKmn1WjZq3CL_MR5ySHOon9q7WDTqIt3rnw1yDvt2tArakBSaEHDJk5vzlviuk1ix4A8Hixmjldk5SkYi)

I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am:

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3a72857310904337af059533764b1f5a&_e=DcAbvrdRcCWb9GAA5vk7fykHLtFxkGZWD6orReOO1F-fmUxCjh0GuHmN8-553NcR24VJkHJUX7StJrI5u1ty5ZG48kyB03EjYRPdYbLWUTLw-oNHuzAuIkes7B5fBVmL9m9QWkEJjK4o173stnVMe4HnaWdVKoPbY1ECUy7oA_CtEXfUEwSE7G3BLYoYKQ5Fy69Mf5Gtcr6hUGnAFRqF3IkIxT6xyBMenxrh0-qDspGMwmC0abzvnIvUZdUpN39Zwh_u-u6bLd7ZaL-pjBCgFNz325dEBeV4o-4gFEc5Z_A%3D)

Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated -- this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn't other people care?

Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He's the author of the Tuttle Twins books -- and I'm a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it!

I'm definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers.

I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here's what I told him:

_" I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts."_

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3a72857310904337af059533764b1f5a&_e=DcAbvrdRcCWb9GAA5vk7fykHLtFxkGZWD6orReOO1F-fmUxCjh0GuHmN8-553NcR24VJkHJUX7StJrI5u1ty5ZG48kyB03EjYRPdYbLWUTLw-oNHuzAuIkes7B5fBVmL9m9QWkEJjK4o173stnVMe15qFToI-8d7DxlSUI-Mr5bzpZonf48fWrTPZXFv3T__e7COCzNQkeyM9sEii6lpohxa701pqnjOt_IU-7ThavRi2N6Qy_HAhv4JM-LeqOtsRYSew8AewE7_iZsS1B7T0FspXu1OR9uJXFTJ7EeOj8s%3D)

I'm so happy that Connor shared my story. But what's next?

Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future.

There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I've learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too.

Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas -- we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us.

**So here is what we are doing:**

Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They're so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don't really teach history with any kind of depth.

**I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country -- with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado.** 😀

clean_body: I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week. "Tuttle Twins" Dear Friend, I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week. I'm the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a "Don't tread on me" Gadsden flag patch on my backpack. The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn't let me come back to class until I removed the patch. You might not know why this story got so many views -- over 40 million so far! After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government. I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am: Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated -- this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn't other people care? Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He's the author of the Tuttle Twins books -- and I'm a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it! I'm definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers. I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here's what I told him: " I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts." I'm so happy that Connor shared my story. But what's next? Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future. There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I've learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too. Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas -- we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us. So here is what we are doing: Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They're so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don't really teach history with any kind of depth. I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country -- with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado. 😀 What 's super cool about this is Connor has a big donor who is passionate about this, and they agreed to double everyone's donations! So, let's say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you'll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched! I knew how to act when my school tried to shut me down because I'd been learning these ideas for years. Because of the Tuttle Twins, I know what my rights are and how to stand up for them. People like Connor and you have been part of my story, and I'm grateful. Now, we have to use this moment for good, and I hope you'll stand with me to make a difference. So many other kids need to learn what I have. It's education -- real, true, good education -- that will make sure other kids don't get tread on, too: Let's use this momentum to find more Jaidens -- and get them learning today! I'm pumped to work with the author of my favorite books to help even more kids learn what I have. I'm just a 12-year-old kid. I have to focus on my school work and my family, but this is a great opportunity for me to make a difference while I get ready for my gubernatorial campaign 18 years from now. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Protect this unique landscape before greedy developers destroy it
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1975725?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Along the eastern crest of California’s Berryessa Snow Mountain National Monument sits a stretch of rolling hills, rocky outcroppings, and sprawling wildflower meadows. More than **30 rare plant species** grow here, and the region serves as a critical corridor between the Monument and other protected areas for creatures like **elk, mountain lions, and black bears.** But _**this unique ecosystem is in danger!**_ This is Molok Luyuk, or “Condor Ridge” -- and unlike the nearby monument it remains **unprotected from greedy energy developers!** Molok Luyuk is sacred to the Yocha Dehe Wintun Nation, and they are asking President Biden to expand the nearby Berryessa Snow Mountain National monument to permanently protect this unique landscape. **[Friend, will you help amplify Tribal voices and tell President Biden to PROTECT Molok Luyuk and its rare wildlife from greedy developers?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1975726?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1975727?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Molok Luyuk is steeped in THOUSANDS of years of history. To this day, it holds cultural and religious importance to Yocha Dehe Wintun Nation as a site central to their origin stories.
But **developers are already eyeing this land** \-- and their plans could change Molok Luyuk forever. The good news is that we still have time to convince President Biden to act -- but it will require a BIG push from environmentalists like you. **[If just 1 of every 11 people reading this email takes action, we’ll reach our signature goal. Add your name and help stop the destruction of this unique landscape before it’s too late!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1975728?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | Along the eastern crest of California’s Berryessa Snow Mountain National Monument sits a stretch of rolling hills, rocky outcroppings, and sprawling wildflower meadows. More than 30 rare plant species grow here, and the region serves as a critical corridor between the Monument and other protected areas for creatures like elk, mountain lions, and black bears. But this unique ecosystem is in danger! This is Molok Luyuk, or “Condor Ridge” -- and unlike the nearby monument it remains unprotected from greedy energy developers! Molok Luyuk is sacred to the Yocha Dehe Wintun Nation, and they are asking President Biden to expand the nearby Berryessa Snow Mountain National monument to permanently protect this unique landscape. == | == Molok Luyuk is steeped in THOUSANDS of years of history. To this day, it holds cultural and religious importance to Yocha Dehe Wintun Nation as a site central to their origin stories. But developers are already eyeing this land \-- and their plans could change Molok Luyuk forever. The good news is that we still have time to convince President Biden to act -- but it will require a BIG push from environmentalists like you. == == Standing with you, Raena Garcia Senior Fossil Fuel and Lands Campaigner, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

name: Full Mag News
subject: The Pivotal Moments that ended the Cold War
body:
Inside, you'll learn the truth about what happened under an actual socialist regime

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9292c569f9964c88ba3b1f82abfb2f16&_e=FwBU6VF4-om7k9a8q9COFI8Sl0hGsjlIjnhDmCUIZAi6NyYuqoysIH88SRoa5p6xTtL7dhoyhTfKydYhQN7FckDd7dABs9Dh106sjVjOkrINutHSS_kHUWUZdSFgnVhg_NtoVolQqydwfPuu5OnIwr8FhjL0Wj0LbVcVoEPDlO4XMPml4IP_UHV9hQ4MDqVB-buRrRRMK_sf2MzI6TSIGgjmSH-LCm3OjXfgnO-ha_0avzisVLjY65vA9wCf6S6uoezBpgGWnxdJG2YeqHYFf7o_XO4fUjFCTJ6Os4uKW_7UWTq9GnrYNhpxZ5m6TmYf-0P0aC3ERLYGgGz5ME7xj0MlCiCNhdEscsc-29n1s-nOrtTv_n2PiKw5Kkq5BMUD)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,
Picture the night of November 9, 1989, when East Germans triumphantly surged into West Germany as the Berlin Wall fell. It marked the dawn of the Cold War's end and unequivocal proof of communist rule's failure in East Germany.
Fast forward three decades, and we witness calls for socialism, especially among youth, both in the U.S. and around the globe--just as we did in the period of unrest a century ago.

However, it is crucial to grasp the lessons history has relentlessly taught us--socialism, time and again, meets brutal failure. If we don't learn from history, we are doomed to repeat its mistakes.

That's why we published an eBook that delves deep into the realities of socialism during the Cold War in Germany. Allow me to offer you a FREE copy of _Leaving Socialism Behind: A Lesson From German History_ through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/leaving-socialism-behind/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9292c569f9964c88ba3b1f82abfb2f16&_e=FwBU6VF4-om7k9a8q9COFI8Sl0hGsjlIjnhDmCUIZAi6NyYuqoysIH88SRoa5p6xTtL7dhoyhTfKydYhQN7FckDd7dABs9Dh106sjVjOkrINutHSS_kHUWUZdSFgnVhg_NtoVolQqydwfPuu5OnIwr8FhjL0Wj0LbVcVoEPDlO4XMPml4IP_UHV9hQ4MDqVB-buRrRRMK_sf2MzI6TSIGgjmSH-LCm3OjXfgnO-ha_0foLpb3VdwQBaxSsbtmT9Pb6bkee4QKIfC3A13zlSNRpSCZBENgwH4HoI0C7FXO7uFLS-apnNKkl3OS1fhHTEjcb9CcYlX7UdZX_U2Y4uoALfFshIZ5oypB25vSkB3Yx5VVGfR-XgjVpuU4rs-XAEV)**

Friend, this eBook by Hoover Institution senior fellow Russell Berman holds incredible significance for our present society.

Inside, you'll learn the truth about what happened under an actual socialist regime and how the inhabitants of East Germany constantly sought refuge in capitalist West Germany--and were only stopped because of the construction of the Berlin Wall.

You'll discover the essence of socialism--an agenda of repression, not poverty alleviation. The eBook introduces you to Rosa Luxemburg, a socialist activist, who criticized Russian socialism for silencing the people's voice, foreseeing a future of dictatorship, assassinations, and prisoner executions.

You can get your free copy of this eBook here: **[https://resources.hoover.org/leaving-socialism-behind/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9292c569f9964c88ba3b1f82abfb2f16&_e=FwBU6VF4-om7k9a8q9COFI8Sl0hGsjlIjnhDmCUIZAi6NyYuqoysIH88SRoa5p6xTtL7dhoyhTfKydYhQN7FckDd7dABs9Dh106sjVjOkrINutHSS_kHUWUZdSFgnVhg_NtoVolQqydwfPuu5OnIwr8FhjL0Wj0LbVcVoEPDlO4XMPml4IP_UHV9hQ4MDqVB-buRrRRMK_sf2MzI6TSIGgjmSH-LCm3OjXfgnO-ha_02D04q3d3p2gRZ68_HFykVU7mpljpoI3vvn1IPvfvNGvQMQyqoRjoFA5yU6fFulgbupYXzEudZrewuAC73Ez97tshdNpkIwYRfB8k3R_38CcFBrhmS_0z9TwZ2ZIihU0DRDjtPdu8mOLOauscGipla)**

I think you'll find it enriches your understanding in light of the debates in our current society.

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning...

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. subject: Kamala Harris let her big mouth run wild in this crazy CBS interview
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 09, 2023

Kamala Harris let her
big mouth run wild in this crazy CBS interview
Vice President Kamala Harris
is a problem for the Biden admin. She's proven that time and
again.

And now Kamal Harris' has let her
big mouth run wild putting her in a world of trouble.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Joe Biden is horrified
about the secret CNN just learned about him

President Biden
doesn't want anyone to know the truth. But it's out of his
control now.
➞ Continue Reading

Greg Abbott is about to
drag Biden through the mud with this lawsuit

President Biden has
waged a war on Greg Abbott. But the Texas Governor isn't putting
up with it.
➞ Continue Reading

Top Republican causes a
world of trouble for Mitch McConnell

Republicans can't let
2024 go to waste. If they want to win, that means putting
pressure on their own, including McConnell.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Declaration Center at Ole Miss – update from Mississippi’s leading conservative advocacy organization
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/affirmativeaction-11571104?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**It’s happening! Ole Miss has launched the Declaration of Independence Center for the Study of American Freedom **\- and it is one of the most exciting things to have happened to the liberty movement in this state for years.
---
|
---
| A generation ago, Allan Bloom’s _The Closing of the American Mind_ explained how many US universities were abandoning the Western cannon of thought and literature. **Instead of being places where students were exposed to different ideas, Bloom prophetically warned that there would be a narrowing of curiosity and exploration by university elites.**

Sure enough, over the past couple of decades, students have often been taught that America’s founding documents are somehow obsolete. The founding principles might have suited an agrarian republic in the past, but today, some college academics suggest, they no longer need apply.

**Worse, perhaps, without being anchored in the Western tradition, universities have taken up an assortment of post-modern ideas. This has seen students encouraged to believe that race and gender somehow define their condition. **
---
|
---
_Look at the Lyceum – can anyone see evidence of our Classical past?_
| **How refreshing, therefore, to see a new institution emerging that teaches young Mississippians that they might have something positive to learn from their past. How inspiring it is that here is a collection of scholars prepared to immerse themselves in timeless truths. **I predict that courses at the new Center will prove to be wildly popular as all those Gen Zs discover there is something else on offer besides the sterile prism of ‘wokeness’.

Students will be learning not what to think, but how to think. Above all they will be learning how to have fierce disagreements without being disagreeable.
---
|
---
_Speaking at Ole Miss..._
| **The Center will embrace diversity. Not the patronizing variety that presumes we are each defined by immutable characteristics, but authentic diversity, which encourages a range of opinions and ideas.**

I am thrilled that Senator Tim Scott, one of the most inspiring American success stories I can think of, will be speaking at the **_Ford Center on Friday September 29 th at 7pm. The event is free and open to everyone!_**
---
|
---
| The Declaration Center logo features Paul Revere, who famously warned that “The British are coming!”

This Brit will certainly be visiting the Declaration Center as often as I can. Indeed, I have been invited to give a lecture there this coming Thursday September 14th.
---
| **If you are reading this, I hope you will sign up to come to listen to the Senator Scott and others speak, too!**

The Center is open to ordinary people and has the most stupendous schedule of speakers, who will be talking about a great variety of topics, from Israel to equality.

Please do sign up to some of the Center’s events!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=dadb71a884&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| **Ps. At the State Policy Network meeting in Chicago the other week, I talked about the policy progress we have been making in Mississippi. You can watch here: **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=5c00f896f4&e=5703353baa)
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=94524f8633) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=94524f8633).

_Copyright © 2023 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

subject: This is a crisis

body:
You CANNOT make this stuff UP! 114 gates along the border are WELDED WIDE OPEN
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=0eb88cde764445b6adb25c542a65a49e&_t=LySdvLn1GP9-d2ITPisvSMWn7wphiU9-jzwlG_vEU8iixADSPyavLBRx4FRdb608A5ztvge8jI9E5CmW14x2fO8zA_I-ivQCrfMnFdoex7c%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=0eb88cde764445b6adb25c542a65a49e&_t=LySdvLn1GP9-d2ITPisvSMWn7wphiU9-jzwlG_vEU8iixADSPyavLBRx4FRdb608A5ztvge8jI9E5CmW14x2fO8zA_I-ivQCrfMnFdoex7c%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0eb88cde764445b6adb25c542a65a49e&_e=afVXvja3tAJvVMRhR9im0fpa7dlf7MNJDHjep7E3FOsOu0XucRVirXfMTyBRaLDbgQf_z6E8cBbz3FhkOYWyiH_nnwYJxrFt-PDz2evUMV__wKnlOGmq4AepTxD5cF0KFRQHiwmxVghKXsZKQd5lWYbj-gVuFBcFJOjrolPwkMoNycM5kMop6ru6jBTFMl7aRKwO3PEWQu2p-WTIO4t-XLiXyOcDP7SJNgfAq-z5FsE3TAtdKfvriwKisYRW5ds0jXBM49xdWQu41jxgiW-knm0nY1eYs6XWSLjqV_bNCt7WKrUGo9yzzIYvp7rncHeaPiY5wX0cRyFM2qHyAnTbm5RhVDR7sFuMsou0alqI9_M-J0OJZEBoTvVGR9hCLrvtl9tcCHyTMZtgIpvXIFA5QQ%3D%3D)
|
Peter,

Are we going to continue to be a country of law and order, _**or are we fine becoming a borderless, anarchic society with no rules and even less order?**_

I have no idea what the Biden Administration is thinking most days, but how in the world did they think **WELDING OPEN** flood gates along the U.S.-Mexican border was a good idea?

_**“Each of the 114 gates in Arizona, which have been open for nearly two months, has 12-foot doors wide enough for a motorcycle to drive through. Smugglers drive busloads of migrants to the Mexican side of the border, where they get off and simply walk into the US.”**_
**We thought the agents were going to tell us something,** ” one Ecuadorean migrant said. “**But we just walked in,** ” according to the _New York Post._

**As someone who has personally pulled the dead bodies of immigrants out of ditches, I cannot express my dismay at Biden’s failure to secure the border. **

As a candidate for the U.S. Senate and a Sheriff in my own right, **[I’m putting together a petition to send to President Biden demanding action at the border.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0eb88cde764445b6adb25c542a65a49e&_e=afVXvja3tAJvVMRhR9im0fpa7dlf7MNJDHjep7E3FOsOu0XucRVirXfMTyBRaLDbgQf_z6E8cBbz3FhkOYWyiH_nnwYJxrFt-PDz2evUMV__wKnlOGmq4AepTxD5cF0KFRQHiwmxVghKXsZKQd5lWYbj-gVuFBcFJOjrolPwkMoNycM5kMop6ru6jBTFMl7aRKwO3PEWQu2p-WTIO4t-XLiXyOcDP7SJNgfAq-z5FsGvPbxNSs8PDUD-S0cR3BlLfyftrLnOJ5Jk-CjwP6bu6yBcIAoEq_Pa926rntXFO9-C1oqK-iHcbjimG9HZGoutlODy8YM758DBU2AGj40gZia6c5lQivHzfg6mqjuo4vCtmUeL76WdDwgQFFMxkod3Hx_uqTx30jpmWlv1y8iMEg%3D%3D)

[[sign it now]](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0eb88cde764445b6adb25c542a65a49e&_e=afVXvja3tAJvVMRhR9im0fpa7dlf7MNJDHjep7E3FOsOu0XucRVirXfMTyBRaLDbgQf_z6E8cBbz3FhkOYWyiH_nnwYJxrFt-PDz2evUMV__wKnlOGmq4AepTxD5cF0KFRQHiwmxVghKXsZKQd5lWYbj-gVuFBcFJOjrolPwkMoNycM5kMop6ru6jBTFMl7aRKwO3PEWQu2p-WTIO4t-XLiXyOcDP7SJNgfAq-z5FsFNCAUFN4t-ZmRLD00Fi4Fy9g605ioJ6d-ijX6OTTW-YQZtcRlXidQDId58NycHQXdjziy2rmomb4UzU3PzQhoqL88tAk_HzSdp58yszp9WzG5sq4QHgT6SdaWhM0Wd5lCdJiBKxXdmKje-JapEPkmBfCaQKyQJuQq8mqBH1pMwFQ%3D%3D)**

Democrats have utterly failed us; I’m standing up today to say that _**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH**_.

**[My goal is to gather 1,000 signatures of Americans who are scared, bewildered, and just down-right angry that Joe Biden and Washington Democrats refuse to abide by our nation’s laws.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0eb88cde764445b6adb25c542a65a49e&_e=afVXvja3tAJvVMRhR9im0fpa7dlf7MNJDHjep7E3FOsOu0XucRVirXfMTyBRaLDbgQf_z6E8cBbz3FhkOYWyiH_nnwYJxrFt-PDz2evUMV__wKnlOGmq4AepTxD5cF0KFRQHiwmxVghKXsZKQd5lWYbj-gVuFBcFJOjrolPwkMoNycM5kMop6ru6jBTFMl7aRKwO3PEWQu2p-WTIO4t-XLiXyOcDP7SJNgfAq-z5FsGFRJiNIAPiUwCAjBFGYUeUx1n3a56Z3NxA3tDEk5Eo_NEfxFvPsFtqjnEkFfg-yQ-1A8TBzauTKh8kozm0ONkdB4O9xMUElb8PTcc8LJ8D0brEzjWqHfjVX_ElVPFMLnaGsCFIwrkxYtiTmPcHIYfMqihNL8PkLJt_6jEufu9OxQ%3D%3D)**[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0eb88cde764445b6adb25c542a65a49e&_e=afVXvja3tAJvVMRhR9im0fpa7dlf7MNJDHjep7E3FOsOu0XucRVirXfMTyBRaLDbgQf_z6E8cBbz3FhkOYWyiH_nnwYJxrFt-PDz2evUMV__wKnlOGmq4AepTxD5cF0KFRQHiwmxVghKXsZKQd5lWYbj-gVuFBcFJOjrolPwkMoNycM5kMop6ru6jBTFMl7aRKwO3PEWQu2p-WTIO4t-XLiXyOcDP7SJNgfAq-z5FsHz_LfJoOTDJ1wnsAhzGhSaa4H7dAXDR0EChFiJxNlIc0FvKQtZrwXaEnNH2m08QiO3zvolnigYCakyzOhmMl2vuYVURqbvVl7tVA83fTbcn-_o5k-dR9qhbo3LuFl47NBgKih2_mxfcAYfnXqVeANnLvN-rCnWASg38SBpzVkbaA%3D%3D)

[**TELL BIDEN
STOP PUTTING OUR LIVES AT RISK->**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0eb88cde764445b6adb25c542a65a49e&_e=afVXvja3tAJvVMRhR9im0fpa7dlf7MNJDHjep7E3FOsOu0XucRVirXfMTyBRaLDbgQf_z6E8cBbz3FhkOYWyiH_nnwYJxrFt-PDz2evUMV__wKnlOGmq4AepTxD5cF0KFRQHiwmxVghKXsZKQd5lWYbj-gVuFBcFJOjrolPwkMoNycM5kMop6ru6jBTFMl7aRKwO3PEWQu2p-WTIO4t-XLiXyOcDP7SJNgfAq-z5FsGiygyDF7A_Oo2-rOOjOJa_c86PIIz6rwLfjY7tv1hNfMH_icij83nmvksW7he6xFN0T-3uXNSdW-ucIjuBSq1OaLdgvIg7mOeEurG77ExhhWCah2qivJksGmCFyzP_OtE1kN2i8T_s-KfnN3q72RiunNj2BSyQiGTe9jFmPCytOA%3D%3D)

Peter, we must stop the invasion. It’s as simple as that.

We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs.

Thanks for standing with me today.

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: You CANNOT make this stuff UP! 114 gates along the border are WELDED WIDE OPEN | | Peter, Are we going to continue to be a country of law and order, or are we fine becoming a borderless, anarchic society with no rules and even less order? I have no idea what the Biden Administration is thinking most days, but how in the world did they think WELDING OPEN flood gates along the U.S.-Mexican border was a good idea? “Each of the 114 gates in Arizona, which have been open for nearly two months, has 12-foot doors wide enough for a motorcycle to drive through. Smugglers drive busloads of migrants to the Mexican side of the border, where they get off and simply walk into the US.” We thought the agents were going to tell us something, ” one Ecuadorean migrant said. “But we just walked in, ” according to the New York Post. As someone who has personally pulled the dead bodies of immigrants out of ditches, I cannot express my dismay at Biden’s failure to secure the border. As a candidate for the U.S. Senate and a Sheriff in my own right, [[sign it now]]() Democrats have utterly failed us; I’m standing up today to say that ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. Peter, we must stop the invasion. It’s as simple as that. We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs. Thanks for standing with me today. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want to know your thoughts
body:
I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart

|
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=eccbf0a671244964973823e570225f66&_e=smdLF6MA2iw20LzvsT2LYU4fwT5WHZreSgs40qWpqNCqGc89oGyfS_jZXsWXaWqn0HV8Li2koKb0otBxsA_iOiHYdMv9F-9PQgWGioxnhwXLJ1A2X0pwTNyzhePr8yIr72HEBY1KfAaL8sJRffIUgdSfbKO--eOGcTapTvMn0ZvQGjVXe1VlmaffigDhgMGPWRnYBGXnajwEKRuVagMzXTJOlQxc4lJfQuIPMUgVBv78oQxZLMn-LThCuPdPxnOLHM58xfUFC9Ao38BUSYwZ9U-Ky5K-CtPo1QbLSP-fBcyGgmdLCR95vIWR3lxG0Tm_m2hMgGXrqlW63--An9cy8LGW3ENIM8nzZ2PYf8QYhTAYpc5XSeegiOcrJ4Ft0G6DDecE9PPxCoxhS__lKZY-BbonI2Y7f7av_7gR5G5Fz04%3D)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart and, I believe, relevant to all of us.

In the current climate, our religious liberty, a foundational tenet of our nation, faces an increasing number of challenges. These are especially concerning for those of us who hold to biblical and faith-based values. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=eccbf0a671244964973823e570225f66&_e=smdLF6MA2iw20LzvsT2LYU4fwT5WHZreSgs40qWpqNCqGc89oGyfS_jZXsWXaWqn0HV8Li2koKb0otBxsA_iOiHYdMv9F-9PQgWGioxnhwXLJ1A2X0pwTNyzhePr8yIr72HEBY1KfAaL8sJRffIUgdSfbKO--eOGcTapTvMn0ZvQGjVXe1VlmaffigDhgMGPWRnYBGXnajwEKRuVagMzXTJOlQxc4lJfQuIPMUgVBv78oQxZLMn-LThCuPdPxnOLHM58xfUFC9Ao38BUSYwZ9VRwRjpdwZA29hposkZNn2nWXV0XBFr-IVfWNuLUQjmX_3ZW6GB2rRMV9Ffw4n6KhutpPBva3pYYVeJyStPCogQEqG8LCgDDoN3o0ngR4uOXEZ_oIBvuiqyxLlXBTE4wlTeYa18fqlDisSik2qNzaXs%3D)
With societal shifts and new legal precedents, including the recently passed Respect for Marriage Act, the ability to practice and express our faith openly may face unprecedented threats.

These changes may allow the federal government to exert pressure on schools, businesses, and organizations that adhere to their religious beliefs. I fear this might lead to intensified legal persecution against those wishing to live according to their faith.

As engaged citizens, it's crucial we understand this situation and its potential impact on our religious freedom.

Please take a moment to share your insights by completing this 2-minute survey: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=eccbf0a671244964973823e570225f66&_e=smdLF6MA2iw20LzvsT2LYU4fwT5WHZreSgs40qWpqNCqGc89oGyfS_jZXsWXaWqn0HV8Li2koKb0otBxsA_iOiHYdMv9F-9PQgWGioxnhwXLJ1A2X0pwTNyzhePr8yIr72HEBY1KfAaL8sJRffIUgdSfbKO--eOGcTapTvMn0ZvQGjVXe1VlmaffigDhgMGPWRnYBGXnajwEKRuVagMzXTJOlQxc4lJfQuIPMUgVBv78oQxZLMn-LThCuPdPxnOLHM58xfUFC9Ao38BUSYwZ9cT9AN_VmKX_vMlxlPpTOiWvU2NXj3yl5fZK-ukybTTSbbs8qIu8Qu5LbvANn22nNkizMk9V2fvV-n--RIXxTDC3sCrPKbG3oMIRKKI9lJtgtLbfNQ_WgmoOLmLA-ISXw5up2GUJGhW-MtzW7-uJrWg%3D)

Your contribution will guide our efforts to alert fellow Americans of the threats to our religious liberty and defend our First Amendment rights.

Let's uphold the integrity of our Constitution and protect the pillars that make our nation great: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Yours sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

body:
Voting rights are under attack.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69445857/426185212/823540626?refcode=ea.37890acb-104f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.37890acb-104f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzg5MGFjYi0xMDRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kaoC1jV_7pHODVTD1Pb9nQWmTBrDPQqDd4tkA26IHEw=&emci=ddd20f04-734e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=37890acb-104f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=1049176)
_There is a critical threat facing North Carolina, and I want you to hear about it from me. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to read this longer email and then**[donate what you can](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69445858/426185213/435245919?refcode=ea.37890acb-104f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.37890acb-104f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzg5MGFjYi0xMDRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kaoC1jV_7pHODVTD1Pb9nQWmTBrDPQqDd4tkA26IHEw=)** to help me fight back._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69445859/426185214/435245919?refcode=ea.37890acb-104f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.37890acb-104f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzg5MGFjYi0xMDRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kaoC1jV_7pHODVTD1Pb9nQWmTBrDPQqDd4tkA26IHEw=)
* * *
Peter, we cannot for one second overlook the ongoing Republican assault on our democracy. GOP legislators — including those here in North Carolina — would prefer you forget about their attacks on our rights. **We cannot afford to.** That’s why I wrote an op-ed for CNN, warning about the threat to our state. As I said in the piece for CNN, Republicans in North Carolina — ironically a state that Trump won — are moving to limit access to the ballot box and sow chaos in our election certification process. Republicans here are armed with a legislative supermajority and a court system stacked with ultra-partisan Republican judges. North Carolinians and people across the country must take heed. One of the GOP’s most pernicious bills is a blatant attempt to entrench its power further by targeting young and nonwhite voters who tend to vote more often for Democrats. I recently vetoed this bill. However, Republicans have pledged to use their veto-proof legislative supermajority to override my veto. And here’s potentially the biggest threat inside this Trojan horse. Deadlock at the State Board of Elections means contested elections and electoral disputes can be decided by the supermajority Republican Legislature and the highly partisan Republican majorities in our appellate courts. Of the states Trump won in 2020, North Carolina was the closest. In 2024, it’s not hard to imagine a narrow Joe Biden victory that is overturned by right-wingers in the Legislature or the courts when there is gridlock at the State Board of Elections. The dangers of these bills reach far beyond the borders of our state. And if past is prologue, it’s not long before Republicans in other states launch similar attacks. For years, on matters from anti-LGBTQ legislation to technologically diabolical gerrymandering, we’ve seen legislatures around the country moving to copy right-wing legislation out of North Carolina. Sinister, anti-voter efforts aren’t new, and we’ve stopped many of them before in the state. We must do so again now. We CAN’T let them get away with it. **[Peter, I’m asking you personally to donate what you can to help me defeat anti-voter, anti-democracy candidates next year. Together, we can elect leaders who will uphold our rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69445860/426185215/435245919?refcode=ea.37890acb-104f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.37890acb-104f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzg5MGFjYi0xMDRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kaoC1jV_7pHODVTD1Pb9nQWmTBrDPQqDd4tkA26IHEw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69445861/426185216/435245919?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.37890acb-104f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.37890acb-104f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzg5MGFjYi0xMDRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kaoC1jV_7pHODVTD1Pb9nQWmTBrDPQqDd4tkA26IHEw=)

clean_body: Voting rights are under attack. | There is a critical threat facing North Carolina, and I want you to hear about it from me. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to read this longer email and then= to help me fight back. = Peter, we cannot for one second overlook the ongoing Republican assault on our democracy. GOP legislators — including those here in North Carolina — would prefer you forget about their attacks on our rights. We cannot afford to. That’s why I wrote an op-ed for CNN, warning about the threat to our state. As I said in the piece for CNN, Republicans in North Carolina — ironically a state that Trump won — are moving to limit access to the ballot box and sow chaos in our election certification process. Republicans here are armed with a legislative supermajority and a court system stacked with ultra-partisan Republican judges. North Carolinians and people across the country must take heed. One of the GOP’s most pernicious bills is a blatant attempt to entrench its power further by targeting young and nonwhite voters who tend to vote more often for Democrats. I recently vetoed this bill. However, Republicans have pledged to use their veto-proof legislative supermajority to override my veto. And here’s potentially the biggest threat inside this Trojan horse. Deadlock at the State Board of Elections means contested elections and electoral disputes can be decided by the supermajority Republican Legislature and the highly partisan Republican majorities in our appellate courts. Of the states Trump won in 2020, North Carolina was the closest. In 2024, it’s not hard to imagine a narrow Joe Biden victory that is overturned by right-wingers in the Legislature or the courts when there is gridlock at the State Board of Elections. The dangers of these bills reach far beyond the borders of our state. And if past is prologue, it’s not long before Republicans in other states launch similar attacks. For years, on matters from anti-LGBTQ legislation to technologically diabolical gerrymandering, we’ve seen legislatures around the country moving to copy right-wing legislation out of North Carolina. Sinister, anti-voter efforts aren’t new, and we’ve stopped many of them before in the state. We must do so again now. We CAN’T let them get away with it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thank you, Roy Cooper = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. ---
$9.

I know it doesn't sound like much, Peter, but my _entire_ fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. [**That's why I'm going to ask you to donate $9 to my campaign today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69446646/426187098/-2022127741?&amounts=9,15,25,50,100,500&amount=9&refcode=jtk1172-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjA0Y2I3ZC0xMTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U-bMY4JRkswShkjG6Dome0QnPRIBtfF0YgbF5VFxomA=) – but first I wanted to explain why your investment in my work is so important.
Growing up in Brooklyn meant that I didn't have any real power or privilege. I could do nothing as I watched corrupt government officials favor the powerful and wealthy over families like my own time and time again. I really, truly, felt voiceless.

**But when I made history in 2018 and became New York's first Black woman attorney general, I swore to never let another New Yorker feel the same way. So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work.**
And throughout my time in office, I have been able to secure _real_ wins for everyday, working families. From holding Big Pharma accountable for their role in the opioid epidemic to going toe to toe with far-right attorneys general around the nation, I have made it clear that New York is _not_ up for sale.
As you can imagine, my work has made me enemies. Thanks to supporters like you, I've been able to withstand their attacks so far – but as we head into the next half of 2023, I _must_ keep that momentum going.
**[That's why I'm asking you to invest just $9 for the first nine days of the ninth month of the year to help me continue my fight for progress. Can I count on you to chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69446648/426187100/-2022127741?&amounts=9,15,25,50,100,500&amount=9&refcode=jtk1172-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjA0Y2I3ZC0xMTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U-bMY4JRkswShkjG6Dome0QnPRIBtfF0YgbF5VFxomA=)**

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: On January 6th, I was ready to fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
As a Marine Corps veteran, I never imagined having to use my training to protect myself and my colleagues on the House floor.
#

See this? That's me on January 6:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230909-1-asp&t=1&akid=1166%2E734936%2Eq-E9ZU)
As a Marine Corps veteran, I never imagined having to use my training to protect myself and my colleagues on the House floor.
I never imagined teaching my House colleagues how to put on a gas mask and regulate their breathing.
I never imagined I’d be helping frightened colleagues move to safety as insurrectionists started streaming into the Capitol.
I never imagined I’d stay behind after the Capitol security came in to do one more sweep for colleagues who might have frozen and gone to cocoon somewhere hard to find.
I never imagined I would ever have to teach my staff how to knock on the door of our office a certain way to signal it was them and not some attacker -- something we did in the Marine Corps when surrounded by insurgents and you didn’t know who was good and who was bad.
And I never imagined I’d have to text members of the House and urge them not to get on buses ready to evacuate us from the Capitol because if we left we’d lose the building to the coup.
Maybe it is the Marine in me, but I will always fight for our democracy. I'd done it in the Capitol that day -- and I will fight as hard as I can to win this race and keep GOP election-deniers out of the Senate.
Nothing less than our democracy is at stake in this election. If Republicans win Arizona, they win the presidency and they take control of the Senate. We can't let that happen, and I can't do it without you.

subject: A Republican opponent has entered the race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=672%2E135344%2EuSXw8j)

Friend --
We recently had some big news in our Senate race: **Former Michigan Congressman, Mike Rogers, announced he is running for the Republican nomination for the open Senate seat here in Michigan.**
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sep23.hbnlDo&refcode=em230909&t=2&akid=672%2E135344%2EuSXw8j)**
So what does this mean for us?
Mike Rogers’ announcement sets up a competitive and expensive election for the U.S. Senate in Michigan. **Recent polling has shown that the Presidential and Senate races are both statistical dead-heats, which means we’ll have two close races to win in Michigan next year.**
We know Mike will try to paint himself as a moderate in this race – but his record in Congress speaks for itself. He was repeatedly one of the top recipients of corporate PAC money in all of Congress, and the special interests always got a great return on their investment: Mike protected the companies that shipped Michigan’s jobs to China, supported Big Pharma’s efforts to keep drug prices high, and even voted to cut Medicare and Social Security.
**We know that Mike supports extreme bans on abortion even in the cases of rape, incest, and a common miscarriage if it came to a vote in the Senate.**
While there are still other candidates who might jump in the race, National Republicans have made it clear that Michigan is one of their top priorities in their efforts to take control of the Senate and the White House. **That means we need to use this moment and send a clear message that, no matter who our eventual opponent is, this will not be an easy seat to flip in 2024.**
So given this important inflection point in the campaign: **[Would you consider a donation of $3 or whatever you can afford to Elissa Slotkin’s campaign for Senate? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself, because every one sends a message about the strength of our grassroots campaign.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sep23.hbnlDo&refcode=em230909&amount=3&t=3&akid=672%2E135344%2EuSXw8j)

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: Some encouraging news:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
The federal government is taking action to loosen restrictions on marijuana.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69448068/426190214/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230909CB_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjcyZTgzMC0xMjRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M9wwsssrbhtSM2IJ5pT9-rN_gRkxMzTleL0siphOILY=)
---
We got some really encouraging news last week:

The Biden administration officially recommended reclassifying marijuana from a Schedule I to Schedule III substance. This would substantially loosen federal restrictions on marijuana, and represent one of the biggest changes to national drug policy in decades.

I want to be clear: I believe that marijuana should be fully legalized. Criminalizing it perpetuates racial inequities in our justice system (Black Americans are nearly four times more likely than white Americans to be arrested for marijuana possession), and it takes up valuable time and resources that should be used for tackling the violent crimes that actually pose a threat to our communities.

**I was proud when Virginia legalized marijuana two years ago, and I will continue to fight for legislation to do the same on the national level.** The government’s latest action (coming less than a year after President Biden announced pardons for federal marijuana possession convictions) shows that our cause continues to gain momentum.

But I’ve faced my share of opponents who see things differently. Last year, the Republican nominee in VA-10 took a clear stand in favor of the unequal and unsustainable status quo – while refusing to do anything about gun violence.

I’ll bet you something: whoever the Republican nominee is in 2024 they will continue to parrot the failed GOP policies on criminal justice.

Northern Virginians deserve a representative who's serious about making our criminal justice system more efficient. **They and you, deserve a leader who's willing to take on the gun lobby to address violent crime.**

**[Will you pitch in to help me keep fighting for the policies that will make our country stronger? Our mid-month deadline is coming up this week, and every grassroots contribution makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69448069/426190215/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230909CB_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjcyZTgzMC0xMjRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M9wwsssrbhtSM2IJ5pT9-rN_gRkxMzTleL0siphOILY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69448070/426190216/-772585877?express_lane=true&refcode=EM_FR_230909CB_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_EB10&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjcyZTgzMC0xMjRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M9wwsssrbhtSM2IJ5pT9-rN_gRkxMzTleL0siphOILY=)**

body:
House Republicans just launched a NEW PROBE into the Far-Left Atlanta DA that just ARRESTED President Donald J. Trump.

| |

---
| | | **Fox News Update: Republicans turn the tables on Fulton County DA after Trump indictments**
_Get ready, Friend - it's about to get interesting!_

House Republicans just launched a NEW PROBE into the Far-Left Atlanta DA that just ARRESTED President Donald J. Trump.
- Did she coordinate her indictment with federal law enforcement?
- Is there hard evidence this case is purely political?
- Is it just a coincidence the DA launched a fundraising website HOURS before dropping the indictment?
**No matter how hard the Radical Left tries to hide the truth, House GOP investigators WILL uncover every last detail surrounding this corrupt investigation. **

_But when you come for the Deep State, it always fights back._

(David got two thumbs up even _after_ explaining he couldn’t make ice cream free for every kid as Senator!) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69450780/426195436/-1293773802?hl=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTk0NjJiNi0xMzRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GumA2b-3P9j1VSOMncR8b6diR50ycjujxvkYzJcZF28=&emci=6e87a1ff-c54d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ce9462b6-134f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=25681160) Finally, a sure way to make David smile is by offering him a corndog for his right hand and a soft serve cone for his left! He had a great time meeting supporters at the Greenbelt Festival this past weekend. For more fun photos like these, be sure to give David a follow on social media. body:
| | | Courage. **[Humility](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=e3ab7be5f88a46849b20171cc7f2de50&_e=PRmx11X5BSYO1gGvj_LtjNF_PA8XcRKZMVgB6vT_kWYq7pAJIRawkBUDPwl5-2_p84WIIrEx59ODBb2k6oR8rD-UcDneS24Yj-Api3hnDHrtHCu4tSt2kFDwVyRD7RoHlqhndq2iksBOuVYgAl1ZTZY1wHG3Ej2cy-1FfV2syYV1TKDVSgwjM7mkkF4ThbfK_d-znt_7DLF1TsAQfSihXZeI7j6N0eBAJHgKgMFRtqF2i-N98OK5xyolYdrizksg6NIAeMQuKSuF5qw5Jbp6ZoACalOel5-JzIVlV6xxUUymFIZWAVGxwWfzMVGT2TNcj43p8IW26rV_iqxZ4fIwtCSykqYwHDrnI60oxZ3a5-JIvFTlwsEgS-_x_cXCGbfi)**. _Grit._
---
When I think of Hung Cao, those are the first three words that come to my mind.

They symbolize his commitment to our country, and his unwavering dedication to protecting the American Dream for the next generation.

_But they’re words that seem like a foreign language to career politicians in Washington today._

I’m on Team Cao because I’m ready to see REAL leaders in the U.S. Senate, and I need patriots like you standing by our side.

**[Will you join Team Cao today and help elect leaders who live by REAL American values?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=e3ab7be5f88a46849b20171cc7f2de50&_e=PRmx11X5BSYO1gGvj_LtjNF_PA8XcRKZMVgB6vT_kWYq7pAJIRawkBUDPwl5-2_p84WIIrEx59ODBb2k6oR8rD-UcDneS24Yj-Api3hnDHrtHCu4tSt2kFDwVyRD7RoHlqhndq2iksBOuVYgAl1ZTZY1wHG3Ej2cy-1FfV2syYV1TKDVSgwjM7mkkF4ThbfK_d-znt_7DLF1TsAQfSihXZeI7j6N0eBAJHgKgMFRtqHJTFlg20GownZcDdsqgUEwUuSiCtDvEjAsF9lLMlv7C37fl-teDSSDWEtVP-xxW93vwtBxaWcboIiUMjSyYKKL5_r6IcxqJvKyi4vtcNoByqERn1aQkCSomr80E4MSQLghknmtW5LFfmmxesyueXrQ)**
---
[**JOIN TEAM CAO >>**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=e3ab7be5f88a46849b20171cc7f2de50&_e=PRmx11X5BSYO1gGvj_LtjNF_PA8XcRKZMVgB6vT_kWYq7pAJIRawkBUDPwl5-2_p84WIIrEx59ODBb2k6oR8rD-UcDneS24Yj-Api3hnDHrtHCu4tSt2kFDwVyRD7RoHlqhndq2iksBOuVYgAl1ZTZY1wHG3Ej2cy-1FfV2syYV1TKDVSgwjM7mkkF4ThbfK_d-znt_7DLF1TsAQfSihXZeI7j6N0eBAJHgKgMFRtqHOUQ9pA6T3UpiiKPoVTST_35Ub_d6V6YUrVn0AgKS2DwcUjo_DusvrKCyEigS1tRJrimTwJkr9r69rs_oPtBl2YJw3bMNFf7FoZ8FNk70n-SBUCQ1ll9XEPvZa7lvUZd0kbaqAAXa_EveDC68V-XUf)
---
Hung isn’t a career politician, Peter.

He spent his career fighting in the U.S. Navy in some of the most dangerous corners of the world for 25 years.

And when he finally retired after an incredible career, he knew his fight wasn’t done yet.

As a refugee from Communist Vietnam, Hung owes his life to America - and he’s not going to let Joe Biden drag it through the mud.

Now, he’s ready to bring courage, humility, and grit to the U.S. Senate, but he can’t do it alone.

**[Please, pitch in NOW so we can send Hung to the U.S. Senate and DEFEND American values!](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=e3ab7be5f88a46849b20171cc7f2de50&_e=PRmx11X5BSYO1gGvj_LtjNF_PA8XcRKZMVgB6vT_kWYq7pAJIRawkBUDPwl5-2_p84WIIrEx59ODBb2k6oR8rD-UcDneS24Yj-Api3hnDHrtHCu4tSt2kFDwVyRD7RoHlqhndq2iksBOuVYgAl1ZTZY1wHG3Ej2cy-1FfV2syYV1TKDVSgwjM7mkkF4ThbfK_d-znt_7DLF1TsAQfSihXZeI7j6N0eBAJHgKgMFRtqH3DyMGLbUjRAp5JgaMg60MylPeEHtsF-PwoOfOXAp4N1GvYSrvVEO_7_8DN309h9v2W98ZY1lIFK1crgVLHgxn6ZrWO5GivBWyZjNbxNmsYyJFKZ234TiMX0MlYH0U9-d_f2pggcCY40tWRB12lzGa)**
---
[**SEND HUNG TO THE U.S. SENATE**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=e3ab7be5f88a46849b20171cc7f2de50&_e=PRmx11X5BSYO1gGvj_LtjNF_PA8XcRKZMVgB6vT_kWYq7pAJIRawkBUDPwl5-2_p84WIIrEx59ODBb2k6oR8rD-UcDneS24Yj-Api3hnDHrtHCu4tSt2kFDwVyRD7RoHlqhndq2iksBOuVYgAl1ZTZY1wHG3Ej2cy-1FfV2syYV1TKDVSgwjM7mkkF4ThbfK_d-znt_7DLF1TsAQfSihXZeI7j6N0eBAJHgKgMFRtqGmrQcUCkufMwjW7Ruz0QYqqAXI7ZRJA5ypCJ-LANU2v-dHLRLMyebOcmf2OZ_bgsBhH-t-nSOm_6-_gDM32VrG-gl9m5ps8AzS9qB5q06Lv4L0z-uKI66lRhau_TbZiB99giKmJ0IPhCIHvXc6xHCC)

clean_body: | | | Courage. . Grit. When I think of Hung Cao, those are the first three words that come to my mind. They symbolize his commitment to our country, and his unwavering dedication to protecting the American Dream for the next generation. But they’re words that seem like a foreign language to career politicians in Washington today. I’m on Team Cao because I’m ready to see REAL leaders in the U.S. Senate, and I need patriots like you standing by our side. Hung isn’t a career politician, Peter. He spent his career fighting in the U.S. Navy in some of the most dangerous corners of the world for 25 years. And when he finally retired after an incredible career, he knew his fight wasn’t done yet. As a refugee from Communist Vietnam, Hung owes his life to America - and he’s not going to let Joe Biden drag it through the mud. Now, he’s ready to bring courage, humility, and grit to the U.S. Senate, but he can’t do it alone. Thank you, JuliaTeam Cao P.S. I know how hard Virginians are suffering under Joe Biden and Tim Kaine’s leadership. If you are one of them, please ignore this request for a donation. Save your money and let’s get ready for a huge election in 2024. Thank you. | Please mail checks made out to "Hung Cao for Virginia" to this address: PO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134 | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69459433/426213688/2043242937?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTg0ZjQ1MC0xOTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EX_Rf5fdW3IZ4ZiMHg2-koc71vWkDCJJ1CD0Z8Ukjmo=)
Peter, With dangerous abortion bans and restrictions on reproductive rights cropping up in states across the country, it's never been more urgent for us to stand united in our fight for reproductive freedom. Thankfully, states like Illinois have stepped up to protect and even lower the barriers to receive reproductive care, but the truth is we're still on precarious ground here in the Prairie State. It was only months ago that a Planned Parenthood clinic in Peoria, Illinois -- my home district -- was nearly burned to the ground in a despicable act of political vandalism. **As far as my 2024 reelection campaign goes, my Republican opponent just made his position unequivocal at a recent campaign event, stating: "I am pro-life."** In today's Republican Party, we know exactly what being "pro-life" means: _It means voting along with a House-led push for a nationwide abortion ban._ _It means accepting a country where women are forced to carry pregnancies against their will. _ _It means creating the circumstance where thousands of American women have to travel across state lines to receive abortion care._ In Congress, I'm committed to fighting for legislation like the Women's Health Protection Act to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law, and I'm proud to have been endorsed by groups like NARAL Pro-Choice America for the work I’m doing. [When it comes to reproductive rights, the contrast in IL-17 couldn't be clearer. But this is a critical swing seat that could decide the House majority -- and our ability to halt the right-wing assault on a woman’s right to choose. Please chip in $3 or more to my re-election campaign today. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69459435/426213692/2043242937?refcode=em-9.09.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTg0ZjQ1MC0xOTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EX_Rf5fdW3IZ4ZiMHg2-koc71vWkDCJJ1CD0Z8Ukjmo=)

⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️
**Fauci ‘concerned’ people won’t comply if masking recommendations return - Fox News**
Fauci and his liberal cronies helped fund gain-of-function research in Wuhan, and once COVID started, tanked our economy and ruined our children’s lives.

name: Georgia House Democrats
subject: About That Grand Jury Report …
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC
body:
Peter,

Yesterday saw the release of the report from the special grand jury convened in Fulton County to investigate 2020 election interference. And aside from naming the 19 GOP members already indicted, the report contained a few surprises.

For instance, the special grand jury recommended indicting two former GOP Georgia Senators, David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler. Thankfully, sensible Georgians had the foresight to vote them out of office.

Another recommendation? Current Lieutenant Governor Burt Jones, who also served as a fake elector for the former MAGA President Trump. Luckily, a prosecutor has already been assigned to continue investigating Mr. Jones.

YOU can help us do that. Every dollar you give moves us closer to reestablishing a Democratic Majority in the Georgia House. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=090923_GrandJuryReport_link]

name: John James
subject: It’s “Guardian” for a reason
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
| | | Friend, **My name is John James, I flew an Apache Helicopter in combat missions across the Middle East. Just between you and me, I wanted to fill you in on something most folks don’t know about my job.**

It takes a crew of two to pilot an Apache Helicopter - one pilot flying and the co-pilot providing critical spotting/gunnery support.

We used to nickname them “Guardians” for their role in safeguarding troops on the ground.

**This may come as a surprise, but there’s more overlap than you’d think between piloting an Apache Helicopter and running a campaign against radical Left Democrats.**
* My conservative values make me a HUGE target. The Democrat Establishment always has its crosshairs on me—ready to strike.
* I need fellow Patriots to watch my six to scan for Leftist attacks.
* Most of all, I need a Co-Pilot to join me in guarding the America-First agenda and upholding the American values that built our nation.

Our campaign against the radical Left in Washington, D.C. has been one of the hardest missions I’ve ever had. **If I don’t get reinforcements soon, our mission could be a failure.**

**[The attacks from the radical Left are mounting. I NEED allies if I’m going to stay airborne.
