clean_body: | | | Friend, My name is John James, I flew an Apache Helicopter in combat missions across the Middle East. Just between you and me, I wanted to fill you in on something most folks don’t know about my job. It takes a crew of two to pilot an Apache Helicopter - one pilot flying and the co-pilot providing critical spotting/gunnery support. We used to nickname them “Guardians” for their role in safeguarding troops on the ground. This may come as a surprise, but there’s more overlap than you’d think between piloting an Apache Helicopter and running a campaign against radical Left Democrats. My conservative values make me a HUGE target. The Democrat Establishment always has its crosshairs on me—ready to strike. I need fellow Patriots to watch my six to scan for Leftist attacks. Most of all, I need a Co-Pilot to join me in guarding the America-First agenda and upholding the American values that built our nation. Our campaign against the radical Left in Washington, D.C. has been one of the hardest missions I’ve ever had. If I don’t get reinforcements soon, our mission could be a failure. On the battlefield, you need a team of warriors you know will support you when the going gets tough. Thank you for your time, John James | | | Paid for by John James for Michigan John James for Michigan P.O. Box 628 St. Clair Shores, MI 48080 ** Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by John James for Michigan

She’ll be extremely well-funded by the same donors who’ve spent tens of millions attacking me. Hey Peter,
**I wanted to ask you personally if you’d join me in supporting my friend – Congresswoman Summer Lee – as she launches her campaign for re-election.**
Summer made history last year when she became the first Black Congresswoman elected in Pennsylvania, despite millions of dollars in corporate PAC money spent against her.
She didn’t let it slow her down one bit — since taking office, she has spent every day fighting for working families in her Pennsylvania and nationwide. It’s so critical that we keep amazing, progressive leaders like Summer in Congress.
**I want to tell you more about Summer in a second.[But first, I wanted to ask you personally: can you split a donation to help ensure Summer Lee and I can keep fighting for working families in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69462258/426224032/1295427985?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmVmMjM2OS0xZDRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pa8belO9D9lL6u6_E4WwXBCWvCn0J0qj9aG8JhLhIBA=)**

**So why am I supporting Summer? **
**Summer has always taken on the tough fights with big corporations who exploit workers and their families,** and even led the call for accountability for Norfolk Southern after the East Palestine Train Derailment.
Summer has introduced three crucial bills in her short time in office—the Hazard Pay for Health Care Workers Act, the Equality in our Laws Act, and the Bipartisan Abandoned Well Remediation Act—all passing through committee with a unanimous, bipartisan vote. She’s also co-led over a dozen bills, including legislation to make sure billionaires pay their fair share in taxes.
**And this is all in just the 9 months since she and I took office. Imagine what we can accomplish together with another term and a Democratic majority!**
Right-wing corporate super PACs will spend millions to stop our movement for working families in 2024 — but we can’t let them win. We’ve won before, we can do it again—but only with your help.
[**Peter****, support our movement for the people by splitting a donation to Summer Lee and Team Casar today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69462263/426224037/1295427985?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmVmMjM2OS0xZDRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pa8belO9D9lL6u6_E4WwXBCWvCn0J0qj9aG8JhLhIBA=)

Thank you for putting people first,
-Greg

clean_body: Hey Peter, I wanted to ask you personally if you’d join me in supporting my friend – Congresswoman Summer Lee – as she launches her campaign for re-election. Summer made history last year when she became the first Black Congresswoman elected in Pennsylvania, despite millions of dollars in corporate PAC money spent against her. She didn’t let it slow her down one bit — since taking office, she has spent every day fighting for working families in her Pennsylvania and nationwide. It’s so critical that we keep amazing, progressive leaders like Summer in Congress. I want to tell you more about Summer in a second.= = **= So why am I supporting Summer? Summer has always taken on the tough fights with big corporations who exploit workers and their families, and even led the call for accountability for Norfolk Southern after the East Palestine Train Derailment. Summer has introduced three crucial bills in her short time in office—the Hazard Pay for Health Care Workers Act, the Equality in our Laws Act, and the Bipartisan Abandoned Well Remediation Act—all passing through committee with a unanimous, bipartisan vote. She’s also co-led over a dozen bills, including legislation to make sure billionaires pay their fair share in taxes. And this is all in just the 9 months since she and I took office. Imagine what we can accomplish together with another term and a Democratic majority! Right-wing corporate super PACs will spend millions to stop our movement for working families in 2024 — but we can’t let them win. We’ve won before, we can do it again—but only with your help. = Thank you for putting people first, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

name: =?utf-8?q?Trump_Trial_Alert_=E2=9A=96=EF=B8=8F_=28via_Courier_Newsroom=29?=
subject: re: Should Trump's trials be televised?
body:
In case you missed it.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1535%2E120351%2EghM4el)
Since Donald Trump was first indicted, his growing legal issues have largely only been visible to the public from outside the courtroom.
**But that's about to change, Peter.** In Georgia, where Trump was indicted for his alleged actions in attempting to overturn the 2020 election, Fulton County Superior Court Judge Scott McAfee granted a request from four local media outlets to broadcast and livestream the upcoming trial.
This may be the **only chance** the public will get to witness what might be the “trial of the century.” But more is needed. For transparency and the health of our democracy, all of Trump’s trials _must be_ televised.
**Televising these trials is the _only_ solution to combat the inevitable right-wing misinformation campaigns that will follow these proceedings, and will provide voters with an unfiltered view of the unprecedented crimes Trump is alleged to have committed. **
That’s why Courier is keeping the pressure on federal and New York state courtrooms to broadcast his other trials. If you have time, you can read more about our push for transparency in Trump’s trials below. **[Peter, if you don't have the time and still want to make an impact, add your name to our petition calling for Trump's trials to be televised.**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/petition/televise-trumps-trials/?source=em-20230909&t=2&akid=1535%2E120351%2EghM4el)
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Trump Trial Alert** ⚖️ (via Courier Newsroom) [info@e.couriernewsroom.com]
Date: Fri, Sept 1, 2023 at 4:40 PM
Subject: Re: Sign the petition ✍️: Televise Trump's Trials
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
This week, it was announced that the first of Donald Trump's pending criminal trials will begin on March 4th, 2024, for his alleged actions in attempting to overturn the 2020 election.
Trial dates have additionally been set for March 24th and May 20th over Trump’s purported hush money payments to adult film actor Stormi Daniels and for Special Counsel Jack Smith’s case for Trump’s alleged mishandling of classified documents.
Peter, we know that Trump and his allies at Fox News and other conservative-friendly outlets are going to do everything they can to push out a steady stream of disinformation in a blatant attempt to undermine the judicial system and the criminal cases against him.
But there’s one solution that would cut through the right-wing’s lies and false spins and give the public a transparent look into an unprecedented criminal trial — _televising Trump’s trials live._
**[Peter, if you agree that Trump's trials should be televised, can you take a moment and add your name to our petition?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/petition/televise-trumps-trials/?source=em-20230909&t=3&akid=1535%2E120351%2EghM4el)
We’re not the only ones calling for Trump’s trials to be televised. Earlier this month, a group of 38 House members sent a letter asking for an exception to be made to both the D.C.-based 2020 election case and Florida-based case involving Trump’s improper handling of classified documents given the extraordinary importance to our democratic institutions and the need for transparency.
Currently, cameras are not allowed in federal courtrooms or in New York state courtrooms, where Trump’s hush money payment trial is taking place. Georgia is a different story however — earlier this week, Fulton County Superior Court Judge Scott McAfee granted a request from four local Atlanta news stations to allow cameras in the courtroom.
**For the sake of transparency and for our democracy, Trump’s trials must be televised in full to allow the public to witness these historic proceedings.** This will not only serve to uphold the rule of law but also reaffirm faith in the process of finding out the truth.
The dangers of choosing not to televise these trials cannot be understated, Peter. Outlets like Fox News and bad actors like Donald Trump and Tucker Carlson are engines of misinformation for right-wing propaganda and we cannot allow their narratives to become dominant.
At a moment when our democracy’s future is at stake, we must fight to demand the truth.
**[You can join us in our demand for transparency by signing our petition to have Trump's trials televised:**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/petition/televise-trumps-trials/?source=em-20230909&t=4&akid=1535%2E120351%2EghM4el)
**[Sign the petition ➡️](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/petition/televise-trumps-trials/?source=em-20230909&t=5&akid=1535%2E120351%2EghM4el)**
Thank you for taking action today.
More to come,
— Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer--1535&t=6&refcode2=1535_120351_ghM4el&akid=1535%2E120351%2EghM4el)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1535%2E120351%2EghM4el)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: GIFFORDS
subject: This isn’t what back to school season should look like...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
When it comes to school supplies, our kids should be picking out pencils, folders and notebooks--tools to help them learn.
But now, an increasing number of school districts across the nation have put a new item on their back to school shopping lists:
Clear backpacks.
According to reporting from _Axios_ , an "increasing number of districts" are requiring clear backpacks as an "umbrella policy."
Is this the country we want to be? Do we want to be a nation that can’t allow students to carry regular backpacks because we are worried that someone will show up to school armed with a gun?
We need to do better.
What if we passed commonsense solutions to keep guns out of the wrong hands--like universal background checks, extreme risk protection orders, and safe storage laws--instead of putting the burden on our kids? Our elected officials need to have the courage to pass these lifesaving measures. Children’s lives depend on it.
[**So please, help us hold them accountable. Chip in $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us work towards a future where no child is afraid to go to school due to gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep23.BeCgjV&refcode=em230909-1-30&t=1&akid=6500%2E3935704%2E_k4yC_)

subject: [ NEW POLL ] Lucas in a DEAD HEAT with Hawley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Josh Hawley (R): 44% | Lucas Kunce (D): 43% | Undecided: 12%
#
**_BREAKING: MISSOURI’S U.S. SENATE RACE IS IN A DEAD HEAT_**
**Josh Hawley (R): 44% | Lucas Kunce (D): 43% | Undecided: 12%**
_First reported by the St. Louis Post Dispatch, 9/7/2023_
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36367?refcode=em20230909-3723&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3723%2E614464%2E76_Jgu)**
* * *

Peter: GOP insiders have worried about what Lucas Kunce means for their grip on Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat since the day he got into this race — and now, a new poll proves they’re right to be scared.
**We have a real chance to flip this Senate seat, and your support right now could be what tips the scales in this neck-and-neck race.[So please, will you rush a donation of any amount to our campaign today so we’ll have what it takes to take the lead, defeat Josh Hawley, and send Lucas to the Senate?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36367?refcode=em20230909-3723&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3723%2E614464%2E76_Jgu)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36368?refcode=em20230909-3723&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=3723%2E614464%2E76_Jgu) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36368?refcode=em20230909-3723&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=3723%2E614464%2E76_Jgu) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36368?refcode=em20230909-3723&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=3723%2E614464%2E76_Jgu) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36367?refcode=em20230909-3723&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3723%2E614464%2E76_Jgu)
---
This poll is HUGE. After nearly eight months of holding Hawley accountable for betraying our country and getting Lucas’ message in front of voters across the state, we’re putting this race on the map — and we’ve shown everyone that the record-breaking, people-powered, and worker-led movement we’re building together is a real force to be reckoned with.
**But let’s be clear: this isn’t _just_ good news for our campaign.** GOP insiders and corporate mega-donors have already made our race one of their top defensive targets for 2024. And now that they’ve seen how real of a threat we are, they’ll do whatever it takes to maintain Hawley’s lead.
You know how it goes. Political insiders and corporate elites like Hawley, the same ones who’ve spent decades stripping our communities for parts, will do, say, and spend anything it takes to keep their grip on power. They’ve even already set up a brand new Super PAC with more than $1 MILLION to make Hawley look strong and fund their desperate attacks about Lucas.
So if we’re going to close the gap in this neck-and-neck race, we need the resources to cut through their inevitable onslaught of new attacks and keep reaching voters with Lucas’ unifying vision for Missouri. **That’s why we’re asking for your help today, Peter:**
**[Will you please rush a donation of $25, $10, or anything you can afford toward our grassroots campaign to elect Lucas Kunce? This race is our best, and one of our only, opportunities to flip a GOP-held Senate seat, so this could be your opportunity to make a real difference in 2024.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36367?refcode=em20230909-3723&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=3723%2E614464%2E76_Jgu)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36368?refcode=em20230909-3723&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=8&akid=3723%2E614464%2E76_Jgu) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36368?refcode=em20230909-3723&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=9&akid=3723%2E614464%2E76_Jgu) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36368?refcode=em20230909-3723&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=10&akid=3723%2E614464%2E76_Jgu) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36368?refcode=em20230909-3723&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=11&akid=3723%2E614464%2E76_Jgu) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36368?refcode=em20230909-3723&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=12&akid=3723%2E614464%2E76_Jgu) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36368?refcode=em20230909-3723&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=13&akid=3723%2E614464%2E76_Jgu) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36367?refcode=em20230909-3723&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=14&akid=3723%2E614464%2E76_Jgu)
---
GOP insiders, corporate elites, Hawley’s own campaign — they’re all about to get _even more_ worried that they might actually lose this seat to a real warrior for working people like Lucas Kunce.
But you know what they should be worried about instead? What Lucas is going to do to them when he gets there — because on November 5, 2024, we’re flipping this U.S. Senate seat and taking back power for everyday Missourians.
Thanks for standing with us,
Team Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230909-3723-footer&t=15&refcode2=3723_614464_76_Jgu&akid=3723%2E614464%2E76_Jgu)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=16&akid=3723%2E614464%2E76_Jgu). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Peter, we'll soon hit the one-year mark until the most consequential presidential election in modern history, and it's becoming more likely that we will see a Trump-Biden rematch.

Let's be perfectly clear: the twice-impeached, four-times-indicted former president spent his time in the White House nearly destroying our democracy, spreading hatred and division, and even inciting a deadly insurrection. He's unfit to be commander-in-chief.

On the other hand, President Biden entered the Oval Office with a multitude of crises—the raging COVID pandemic, a broken economy, and our democracy in peril. But that didn't stop Joe from rolling up his sleeves to rebuild America.

His efforts have resulted in a stronger, more hopeful America today, and he's delivering on his bold agenda. But all of this could be undone by a Trump re-election.

That's why the potential 2024 rematch between Trump and President Biden won't be just another election. It's a historic fight for abortion rights, democracy, the freedom to vote, social security, healthcare access, and everything our country stands for.

It's time to ask ourselves: who do we want leading our country? Who will stand up for our values and protect the progress we've made? **That's why we're urgently polling voters in your area and counting on you to respond.**

clean_body: President Biden or Trump? | = Who will you vote for in 2024? = | = | = ---|--- Peter, we'll soon hit the one-year mark until the most consequential presidential election in modern history, and it's becoming more likely that we will see a Trump-Biden rematch. Let's be perfectly clear: the twice-impeached, four-times-indicted former president spent his time in the White House nearly destroying our democracy, spreading hatred and division, and even inciting a deadly insurrection. He's unfit to be commander-in-chief. On the other hand, President Biden entered the Oval Office with a multitude of crises—the raging COVID pandemic, a broken economy, and our democracy in peril. But that didn't stop Joe from rolling up his sleeves to rebuild America. His efforts have resulted in a stronger, more hopeful America today, and he's delivering on his bold agenda. But all of this could be undone by a Trump re-election. That's why the potential 2024 rematch between Trump and President Biden won't be just another election. It's a historic fight for abortion rights, democracy, the freedom to vote, social security, healthcare access, and everything our country stands for. It's time to ask ourselves: who do we want leading our country? Who will stand up for our values and protect the progress we've made? That's why we're urgently polling voters in your area and counting on you to respond. Who will you vote for in 2024? = | = ---|--- We appreciate your input, Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, we’ve been working around the clock to uplift President Biden’s message to the American electorate and elect Democrats who will continue to fight for his ambitious agenda. President Biden and the Democrats are fighting tooth-and-nail to move our country forward, but Republicans are threatening to derail everything. = | = = Follow along: | ---|--- | Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. clean_body: The special interest RINOs are coming for us... The special interest RINOs are coming for us... | | Friend, Remember how I told you that the special interest RINO's who already pledged to spend $370 million against us in the primary are now plotting to add another $50 million to that total this month? And remember how leaked reports revealed that behind closed doors they even said, " We've got to beat [Trump] in the next 60 days"? Well, I've been thinking... What would be the best way to show these cowards that their plot to cancel out YOUR vote BACKFIRED beautifully? And I know just the thing... We 're going to kick off our largest fundraising SURGE of the entire campaign to date! Which is why I've set an ambitious new goal for our Primary Victory Fund of 60,000 grassroots donations over the RINO's "60-day window." Because what we 've PROVEN to be true time and again is that no amount of special interest money from shadowy RINO Super PACs can stop our beautiful movement of more than 74 MILLION patriots. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Sun, September 3, 2023 Subject: Another $50 MILLION?! To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | Friend, The amount of money the special interest "Republicans" (RINOs, as we like to call them) are spending to try and defeat OUR beautiful movement instead of Crooked Joe is utterly absurd. By now, I'm sure you're already aware of the $370 million that they've pledged to spend against us in the primary... ...But LEAKED reports now reveal that the RINOs' chief Super PAC is plotting to add *ANOTHER $50 MILLION THIS MONTH ALONE! These cowards were even caught saying... " Now let me tell you a secret -- don't leak this... We're making a move now. We have to beat [Trump] and we've got to beat him in the next 60 days." How can any Republican spend hundreds of millions of dollars against their own Party's undisputed FRONTRUNNER leading by 50 and even 60 points? Not to mention these cowards just watched as Crooked Joe weaponized our country 's justice system to try and JAIL his leading opponent for LIFE like a Third World dictator. Well, here's the TRUTH about them: They don 't care at all about Republicans winning back the White House. These special interest RINOs have made a fortune off selling out our country at YOUR expense for decades! And the only thing they really care about is preserving their uniparty globalist agenda - and nothing more. Which is why they will go to unimaginable lengths to try and nominate their Deep State-approved puppet and HELP Crooked Joe remain in power, so long as it means the ONLY candidate who puts AMERICA FIRST (yours truly) never again steps foot in the White House. Friend, these people are just as sick and twisted as Crooked Joe and his accomplices. But, as we 've already proven to be true, even their millions in dark money is no match for our grassroots movement of more than 74 MILLION Americans giving just $1, $5, $10, even $24 alongside your fellow patriots. And now, we need to show these RINOs that every time they attempt to BUY this nomination, our movement will stop them dead in their tracks. Because every dollar they continue to waste attacking us , is another dollar of life support given straight to Crooked Joe's flailing campaign. | Thank you, | Donald J. Analysis: Could Ted Cruz Lose Re-Election?
A new analysis from Real Clear Politics shows that Ted Cruz could lose re-election in 2024.
Due to massive population growth in major cities such as Dallas and their surrounding suburbs, and given the national trends towards Democrats in those areas, Cruz could be in trouble.
“If the suburbs continue to shift against Republicans in 2024, Texas could be a highly competitive state. This is very possible.”
The analysis also shows that Ted Cruz’s loathsome reputation could drag down voter turnout among Republicans and juice turnout for Democrats.
Here’s the bottom line: Ted Cruz is beatable. And Roland Gutierrez, the Democratic TX State Senator representing Uvalde, is the man to do it.

Peter, it's been over a year since the Supreme Court struck down _Roe v. Wade_ – stripping away reproductive freedom from millions of Americans.
In the time since, we've seen one disastrous decision after another. This ultraconservative majority – stacked with justices appointed by Donald Trump – has handed down rulings that attack LGBTQ+ rights, affirmative action, student loan forgiveness, and so much more.
**This much is clear: The direction of the current Supreme Court is far from the will of the American people.**
In this urgent moment, our mission to get more fierce Democratic women in office who will defend our fundamental rights and safeguard the future of our democracy is as important as ever. That’s why we launched our Gavel In training this year – to train jurists who want to serve in judgeships to run successful and strategic political campaigns. But it's going to take all of us fighting together, side by side.
**That's why we're counting on 53 more Emerge community members – including you – to take a stand alongside us today. So please, before our live poll closes at midnight, tell us: **
**Do you approve of the current Supreme Court?**

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Writing to ask you to split a $3 contribution between Summer Lee and my re-election campaign today.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Summer Lee has always taken on big fights with wealthy and powerful corporations who put profits over the lives of working people
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=520%2E791427%2EFdrtMS)

**Friend, I’m so proud to support Summer Lee as she launches her campaign for re-election.**
Summer made history last year when she became the first Black congresswoman elected in Pennsylvania, beating out millions of dollars in corporate PAC spending against her. She didn’t let it slow her down one bit — she got to Washington and has been fighting for working class people day and night since taking office in January. Now it’s time to ensure she keeps that seat for the people of Western PA.
**[Before I go any further about why we need more progressive champions like Summer in the House, can you split a $3 donation between our campaigns to make sure Summer can continue fighting for working families in Congress?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sept23-summer-split.EyCFIh&refcode=em230909-1-t2&t=2&akid=520%2E791427%2EFdrtMS)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your split contribution between Summer Lee and Ilhan Omar will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/14?c0=io-em-sept23-summer-split.y8v97-&refcode=em230909-1-t2&t=21&akid=520%2E791427%2EFdrtMS)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-sept23-summer-split.jTbj9J&refcode=em230909-1-t2&t=22&akid=520%2E791427%2EFdrtMS)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-sept23-summer-split.QY3Z_E&refcode=em230909-1-t2&t=23&akid=520%2E791427%2EFdrtMS)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-sept23-summer-split.W7uYG0&refcode=em230909-1-t2&t=24&akid=520%2E791427%2EFdrtMS)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-sept23-summer-split.iA7XUB&refcode=em230909-1-t2&t=25&akid=520%2E791427%2EFdrtMS)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-sept23-summer-split.tXKbKn&refcode=em230909-1-t2&t=26&akid=520%2E791427%2EFdrtMS)**
---
****
**So why am I supporting Summer?**
As a true advocate for the people, **Summer Lee has always taken on big fights with wealthy and powerful corporations who put profits over the lives of working people.** She even led the call for accountability for Norfolk Southern after the East Palestine Train Derailment earlier this year.
Summer has also introduced three crucial bills in her short time in office — _the Hazard Pay for Health Care Workers Act, the Equality in our Laws Act, and the Bipartisan Abandoned Well Remediation Act_ — which passed through the Science, Space, and Technology committee with a unanimous, bipartisan vote. She's also co-led over a dozen bills, including legislation to make sure billionaires pay their fair share in taxes.
**And this is all in just the 9 months since she took office.**
We’re already seeing right-wing, billionaire-backed super PACs pour money into stopping our movement's fight for justice this cycle, but we can’t let them win. We’ve beat them before — we _must_ do it again.
**[Please use this link to support our movement for the people by splitting a $3 donation to my friend Summer Lee and our campaign today.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sept23-summer-split.EyCFIh&refcode=em230909-1-t2&t=27&akid=520%2E791427%2EFdrtMS)**
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sept23-summer-split.EyCFIh&refcode=em230909-1-t2&t=28&akid=520%2E791427%2EFdrtMS)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=520%2E791427%2EFdrtMS)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=520%2E791427%2EFdrtMS)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=31&akid=520%2E791427%2EFdrtMS)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=32&refcode2=520_791427_FdrtMS&akid=520%2E791427%2EFdrtMS)**.
Ilhan for Congress

Washington D.C., 20033

name: Petitions Team @ HER Time
subject: We’re preparing for the mifepristone case to go all the way to the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69466114/426237553/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzY3MmZkZWEtMjM0Zi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zpy6enlmfK6wC8NK5heu_1c3bnfIfToGRIQvqklOUWI=)
---
Peter, The accessibility of mifepristone is likely to be decided by the Supreme Court this term — and we can’t help but be worried about how the justices will rule when it does. It was almost exactly a year ago that the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and opened the country up to the onslaught of regressive, dystopian abortion restrictions we see in place all over the country. This Court is sending our country backwards — that’s why we’re calling for Court reform before it’s too late. Our Supreme Court is broken. MULTIPLE seats were stolen by Mitch McConnell’s obstruction in the Senate. Clarence Thomas is allowed to accept (and lie about) obscenely expensive gifts from a Republican mega donor, while his wife helps organize a coup, with no consequence. **These are the people who have our rights in their hands.** We must not sit by as a corrupt court takes away our rights.**** The time to reform the Court is now. [_**If you agree, please sign our petition calling for immediate reform of the Supreme Court. We need your voice on this important matter:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69466115/426237554/-220061698?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzY3MmZkZWEtMjM0Zi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zpy6enlmfK6wC8NK5heu_1c3bnfIfToGRIQvqklOUWI=&emci=7172fdea-234f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=7672fdea-234f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=1720400) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69466116/426237555/-220061698?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzY3MmZkZWEtMjM0Zi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zpy6enlmfK6wC8NK5heu_1c3bnfIfToGRIQvqklOUWI=&emci=7172fdea-234f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=7672fdea-234f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=1720400)

name: Greta Kemp Martin
subject: Our democracy hangs in the balance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
body:
Peter,

In politics, trust and transparency should be the foundation upon which democracy stands. However, Mississippians have repeatedly been let down by the system designed to ensure fair and honest elections.

Attorney General Lynn Fitch, the state's top law enforcement officer and the sole authority entrusted with enforcing campaign finance laws has fallen short of her duty during her time in office. The consequences of which undermine the very essence of our democracy.

Though the Secretary of State’s office and the Ethics Commission play a role in campaign finance in our state, Attorney General Fitch is the only state official vested with clear authority to investigate and prosecute campaign finance violations. Yet, her tenure has been marked by an alarming reluctance to fulfill this vital role.

Fitch looks the other way while her friends and donors break the law and steal money from Mississippians, just as she has with the welfare scandal that her office has consistently ignored and still, to this day, has failed to investigate. But, Fitch's office has faced repeated allegations, even from her fellow Republicans, of her failure to fulfill its responsibilities here in Mississippi while turning her attention outside of the state. This November, Mississippians can do what any employer would do when their employee fails to finish the job – fire Lynn Fitch.

This week, my campaign has rolled out our Roadmap to Restoring Public Integrity, including campaign finance reform. Mississippi's campaign finance laws serve a purpose – to bring transparency to our political process and curb the corrupting influence of big money in politics. The Attorney General’s office must be transparent with the public when investigations are complete, and violations are found, allowing citizens to play a role in holding candidates and campaigns accountable.

In the end, Mississippians deserve better. Our democracy thrives on a foundation of trust, accountability, and transparency, which I aim to do as my policy initiatives outline. The current Attorney General has failed to rise above political considerations and fulfill her duty to the people of Mississippi by disregarding campaign finance violations and many other harms to our state, which is one of the many reasons I am running to be your next Attorney General.

Our democracy hangs in the balance, and we cannot afford to let it crumble under the weight of indifference. Mississippi can’t afford another four years of Lynn Fitch.

I’m so grateful for your support. We’ll restore the Mississippi Attorney General’s office to the people. You can support my campaign directly by clicking here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gkm-fr?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230909CF_PT&amount=25

For Mississippi,

Greta

--

Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state.

DONATE TODAY: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gkm-fr?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230909CF_PT&amount=25

Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
Greta Kemp Martin for Attorney General
PO BOX 16402
Jackson, MS 39236
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/c7O9Ucx9VUa_ajDO2m2OGQ2?unsubscribedata=UPfmZCVvGW3kAkCU5N54h2EuciNhshL6A6iFA0LMlk%2BQgI4lIoA%2BRksfNpDxjum%2FwYctB2v43t3EjKrORt3HyZHRBh8XzPfIEPiNRwbghJq%2BPXclSyxMIuH5BgImqZkYJp%2B47SBn%2FEtfbGxkVtbZKHhNz%2B4skuWoq0qKoGB%2FgtYc4L8iMTxUKkV3zwwaeRPcNi9G1jb3B5nNXGaSh0iZwDTY4jFbfsSalko1eeZ6d59CcN6eqU5HitihJmvEAJzuetakmuGjJLazO3GmEXFDe4ysxKGEXz3tJrVQrljPg2wN59C%2BWawwq9dTFkiJ1S7z1g%2FRMU2iB%2FxtJSz8ZOCRXxueOdkdZVMu7UyqGtpDI9SaYUwrjwtj%2BDpyC1TvPxSXnC2WhYWn95iiEW9KEUqmL1aY2VNy4jHP9%2F9ehuDzO32MaRstTL4blKh5a3OI5Qb9 .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Greg=20Wheeler?=
subject: Sheriff Joe Arpaio Endorses Greg Wheeler for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler]( "Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler")
body:
“Greg understands the drugs and crime affecting his district have a direct link to our Southern Border.” | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9fafbadc0cd8/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-6146345?e=d6699466fe)
---
| | [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=f5fdb966de&e=d6699466fe)
---
| Peter,
---
| | **I’m excited to announce that America’s Toughest Sheriff, Joe Arpaio, has endorsed my candidacy to serve Ohioans in Congress!**

Sheriff Joe is the former Maricopa County Sheriff with a nationally renowned record of fighting against the lawlessness on our border and federal government overreach.
---
| [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=3c5b630274&e=d6699466fe)
---
| **Sheriff Joe shared the following statement: **

_“Greg Wheeler has my endorsement because he understands the drugs and crime affecting his district have a direct link to our Southern Border. I have dedicated my life to protecting Arizonans and the good people of 49 other states from the menace of illegal immigration and drugs. I look forward to seeing what Greg Wheeler does as Congressman to help solve these problems for good.” _

_**I’m deeply honored to have Sheriff Joe’s endorsement.**_ Sheriff Joe is an American legend. Not only does he have a long record of effective service to our country, he was ferocious about bringing law and order to our border and, consequently, our country. He has been a voice for victims of crime and the patriotic men and women in law enforcement who take their oaths seriously.

Our nation would not be in such dire straits right now if more politicians did what they promised to on the campaign trail. America desperately needs politicians that follow Sheriff Joe’s example: _say what you mean and do what you promise_!

**I look forward to being a champion for Ohioans** in upholding the Rule of Law, getting our national debt crisis under control and protecting their freedoms when I serve them in Congress.

[**Peter, can I count on you to join me in the mission of getting America back on the right track by offering a contribution to my campaign for any amount today?**](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=4144e27f92&e=d6699466fe)

subject: Election Day is 59 days away
body:

We need to mobilize Virginia voters, close the gap in Republican spending, and expand our power in the Virginia legislature. clean_body: Our opponents are kicking their campaigns into high gear. Gov. Youngkin’s endorsed candidates sailed through their primaries, and his PAC has already raised $8.5 million for his allies this cycle. | | | | | **We need you to read every sentence of this email and We’re in for the fight of a lifetime in Virginia. Here’s what you need to know: Democrats hold a slim majority in the Virginia Senate, and we are only THREE seats away from flipping the House this November. Our opponents are kicking their campaigns into high gear. Extreme Governor Glenn Youngkin’s endorsed candidates sailed through their primaries, and his PAC has already raised $8.5 million this cycle. Democrats are making targeted investments to win in Virginia – President Biden even directed an additional $1.2 million in resources to Virginia Dems to combat Gov. Youngkin’s outlandish spending. We need to mobilize Virginia voters, close the gap in Republican spending, and expand our power in the Virginia legislature. name: FP Team
subject: 🎉 One year ago, we proved a $15/hour minimum wage IS possible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
Now let's keep the momentum going! | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69466529/426238740/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWVlMTc1MC0yNTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IkN6REf8VIdxPTTEyrzV80Lku_d117SMrEFr4x31wIk=&emci=eca8e7fe-994d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=eaee1750-254f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=561582) | Team, One year ago, Nebraska's ballot measure to raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour was officially certified — the first milestone that set us up for victory last year! This measure was about more than just numbers. **It was about human dignity, economic fairness, and changing the unjust narrative that workers are expendable.** **[If you're as proud as we are to challenge systemic inequality and are committed to seeing more wins for workers like last year’s in Nebraska, now's the time to step up.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69466530/426238741/1622098051?&refcode=E4025-20230909-NEAnnniv-SL-Other&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWVlMTc1MC0yNTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IkN6REf8VIdxPTTEyrzV80Lku_d117SMrEFr4x31wIk=)** [CONTRIBUTE →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69466531/426238742/1622098051?&refcode=E4025-20230909-NEAnnniv-SB-Other&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWVlMTc1MC0yNTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IkN6REf8VIdxPTTEyrzV80Lku_d117SMrEFr4x31wIk=) _Here's the truth:_ Nobody should have to live paycheck to paycheck while working a full-time job. And no one should be under the constant pressure of financial stress, a burden disproportionately shouldered by women and people of color. This ballot measure was not just an abstract policy; it was a path to economic justice. _So why is this anniversary a big deal, team?_ Because it reminds us of what we're capable of — and what we still have to accomplish. **[Your contribution today will fuel our ballot measures in 2023 and 2024, setting us up for resounding successes come Election Day.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69466532/426238743/1622098051?&refcode=E4025-20230909-NEAnnniv-SL-Other&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWVlMTc1MC0yNTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IkN6REf8VIdxPTTEyrzV80Lku_d117SMrEFr4x31wIk=)** [CONTRIBUTE →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69466533/426238744/1622098051?&refcode=E4025-20230909-NEAnnniv-SB-Other&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWVlMTc1MC0yNTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IkN6REf8VIdxPTTEyrzV80Lku_d117SMrEFr4x31wIk=) Thanks for being a key part of this journey toward economic fairness. — FP Team

clean_body: Now let's keep the momentum going! | | Team, One year ago, Nebraska's ballot measure to raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour was officially certified — the first milestone that set us up for victory last year! This measure was about more than just numbers. It was about human dignity, economic fairness, and changing the unjust narrative that workers are expendable. = = Here's the truth: Nobody should have to live paycheck to paycheck while working a full-time job. And no one should be under the constant pressure of financial stress, a burden disproportionately shouldered by women and people of color. This ballot measure was not just an abstract policy; it was a path to economic justice. So why is this anniversary a big deal, team? Because it reminds us of what we're capable of — and what we still have to accomplish. = = Thanks for being a key part of this journey toward economic fairness. — FP Team Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Dear Peter, **We can accomplish _incredible_ things when we work together.** A few weeks ago, we were up at the Black Rocks in Marquette. We were taking turns jumping into Lake Superior when my younger daughter Evie asked for some help (she's always had a great instinct for self-preservation). Rather than trying to get her to jump off the highest spot, we walked down to where the water was a bit closer. After a quick pep talk, and holding hands with her dad, Evie worked up the courage to take the plunge. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69466542/426238783/1742851123?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230909_fr_JumpingIn_cand_sm_90da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjllYjMzNzktMjU0Zi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=treqiiHsm_Su7kwCr3JMjaLbQTfWoccRR0JYwl3O0Ug=)
---
The lesson?
We can accomplish more together than we do alone - when we’ve got people by our side supporting us.
This campaign takes a village. [It takes $5, or $25, from a community of people who are in your corner.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69466543/426238785/1742851123?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230909_fr_JumpingIn_cand_sm_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjllYjMzNzktMjU0Zi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=treqiiHsm_Su7kwCr3JMjaLbQTfWoccRR0JYwl3O0Ug=)
I'm grateful to be surrounded by supportive people – and for the generosity of everyday people who are ready for change in Upper & Northern Michigan.
[If you're ready for a change in representation in MI-01, consider taking the plunge and making your first contribution to our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69466544/426238786/1742851123?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230909_fr_JumpingIn_cand_sm_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjllYjMzNzktMjU0Zi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=treqiiHsm_Su7kwCr3JMjaLbQTfWoccRR0JYwl3O0Ug=)

A few weeks ago, we were up at the Black Rocks in Marquette. We were taking turns jumping into Lake Superior when my younger daughter Evie asked for some help (she's always had a great instinct for self-preservation). Rather than trying to get her to jump off the highest spot, we walked down to where the water was a bit closer. After a quick pep talk, and holding hands with her dad, Evie worked up the courage to take the plunge. | = The lesson? We can accomplish more together than we do alone - when we’ve got people by our side supporting us. This campaign takes a village. = I'm grateful to be surrounded by supportive people – and for the generosity of everyday people who are ready for change in Upper & Northern Michigan. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Together, we can accomplish great things. Gratefully and Tuebor, Callie Callie Barr Candidate for Congress in Michigan's First District. | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. Can you help send Callie to Congress by donating today? | = | Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress Callie Barr for Congress PO Box 6921 Traverse City, MI 49696 United States Callie Barr is an advocate for veterans and spouse to a former U.S. Marine. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense or the Marine Corps. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Juanita at United We Dream Action
subject: This is the power of a grassroots team
body:
| | | Peter, **United We Dream Action is built on the power of immigrant youth activists and allies.** This community has achieved incredible wins by taking collective action — whether it’s driving millions of calls and texts to our elected officials, telling our stories in the halls of Congress, or correcting disinformation in our communities. All of these actions take resources, though, and that’s where folks like you come in. Here at UWDA, we believe in the power of grassroots movements. **That means we believe that everyday folks like you and me, pitching in a few bucks here or an hour of their time there, multiplied over and over again by the size of this team, can build real power.** So we rely on folks like you to get involved, and chip in $10 or $25 when you can. Here’s how your donation can make a real impact:
* $10 can help us reach more new allies online and introduce them to the work we’re doing to uplift immigrant communities.
* $25 can help us train a new immigrant youth leader to lead actions and organize their community.
* $50 can help us lead actions across the country — hosting Weeks of Action from state capitals to Washington, DC, that target elected officials who have the power to deliver change.

And anything beyond that can power our fight to secure legislative protections for DACA recipients and all undocumented people. **Peter, if every single person reading this email steps up today and chips in just $10, we’ll have what we need to fund all these actions and more. We’re counting on your support, so please, if you’re able, consider chipping in today.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8YAqyNwYURZ1viGDyEajd5kt9IgVdSWel_Mk4Ae2O4Lj4gvo0MC18k30fWRT_ToF7ZG-zFxOAMcZHfnkWiJedzUOHNBQRLKJ3kc8BHZN_RlKPNAmSnaBJFUKxWJbVNM0GhV1dHnsuebrieBPCskjOXTnuw_1O_tOsFnzmLI_-0KfZ-olp9DoO6Vg1FbbUUWDhahUyY8Tko2vQZah7v0mrDmPvVx-MuAUmeQVVvjmjCb6mMgtSKybY76LmUGGm-mpaJiEzPXR_dcjV6iJdheecqc8Hhdt56svpmYZNWZxj_ys3In8Tgb1Fj7nVqgAHmorOgYtyxT9UeZ-QMLnuFDaGLM9G6uwzW9IqPLgfoFn3fbb103tWoT3y4XDhXHZqR3LrEtNRQ9IuxdMy6VbPiAdYwA/3zg/O2JJDRwsSHmul18-zbiRYQ/h0/8xS8Zsg42aH1JIMA9MJr-BFjb3nMVbbx2hLBgmhMh8c)

subject: Video: Katie surprises grassroots donors!

body:
Because our campaign is people-powered, Katie spends her time surprising real people with thank you calls.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=29579%2E3422442%2E3r8J07)
The other week Katie surprised some of our grassroots donors with a thank you call! From reaching a middle school teacher during class, to talking to the firemen, coffee shop workers, and retired folks who power our campaign, Katie loves getting to make these calls. [**Check out this quick video of her calling supporters here**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230909-1?refcode=EMAL09_1_VID_20230909_V1_F&refcode2=29579_3422442_3r8J07&akid=29579%2E3422442%2E3r8J07) ⬇️

name: Jon Tester
subject: Not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hey there, this is Senator Jon Tester from Montana. Tina asked me to reach out. Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m currently the only statewide-elected Democrat IN Montana! That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them. Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, **I will always work for you.** When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us. **[So, if you can, I’m personally asking you to split a $10 or more donation between Tina Smith and my campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal. clean_body: | Hey there, this is Senator Jon Tester from Montana. Tina asked me to reach out. Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m currently the only statewide-elected Democrat IN Montana! That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them. Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, I will always work for you. When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Tester and Tina Smith will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Politics isn’t a game. Lives and livelihoods are put at stake when Washington Republicans continuously choose shady donors over everyday Americans. That’s why I’m fighting so hard for working families in Montana and across the country. — Jon Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

subject: Ryan revs up for new events!
body:
https://secure.winred.com/binkley-for-president-2024/donate-now?mc_cid=6a21000113&mc_eid=UNIQID

** Campaign News and Views
------------------------------------------------------------

Binkley for President 2024 keeps up the pace in Iowa and New Hampshire. Ryan prepares for two exciting new events.

** Campaign Milestones
------------------------------------------------------------
Binkley 2024 is on a roll! Ryan continues to meet with voters across Iowa and New Hampshire. Two major events are on the horizon: the Iowa Faith & Freedom Coalition Banquet and the New England College Town Hall!

** Loos Tales Podcast
------------------------------------------------------------

Ryan was interviewed by Trent Loos, a 6th generation farmer who connects food producers and customers. They talked about the frailty of our economy, the dangers of CO2 pipelines, and the importance of relationships in grassroots movements.
Watch (https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/trent-loos/episodes/Loos-Tales-Special-Report-Sept-6--2023-Ryan-Binkley-Texas-businesman-and-pastor-running-for-President-of-the-United-States-e290bed?mc_cid=6a21000113&mc_eid=UNIQID) here (https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/trent-loos/episodes/Loos-Tales-Special-Report-Sept-6--2023-Ryan-Binkley-Texas-businesman-and-pastor-running-for-President-of-the-United-States-e290bed?mc_cid=6a21000113&mc_eid=UNIQID)

https://youtu.be/vfO3HHIIFgw?feature=shared&mc_cid=6a21000113&mc_eid=UNIQID

** Heartland Zoom Event
------------------------------------------------------------

The Fighting for the Heartland Zoom event is over, but you can watch the replay here. (https://zoom.us/rec/play/ERokADzcBOeg1tZbV-3gx9QHO4DGq4kS4p2gMFXYjXvjti-8kMtA8w_G7AF3ddbQFvJyOo0f-dNvGqE3.fMQYlAB5_2o0ypxh?canPlayFromShare=true&from=share_recording_detail&continueMode=true&componentName=rec-play&originRequestUrl=https%3A%2F%2Fzoom.us%2Frec%2Fshare%2Ft1A5pPf5Qm3n832tKx7B4cFuQL54o9NO44tvBCJxe8ngDA36Z1KBNzLhILJK7Hls.gYdw-hgSwDxvQFNU&mc_cid=6a21000113&mc_eid=UNIQID) Several guests shared vital information on the CO2 pipelines: how potential leaks can devastate farmlands and how big business is threatening property rights across multiple states.
Watch the (https://zoom.us/rec/play/ERokADzcBOeg1tZbV-3gx9QHO4DGq4kS4p2gMFXYjXvjti-8kMtA8w_G7AF3ddbQFvJyOo0f-dNvGqE3.fMQYlAB5_2o0ypxh?canPlayFromShare=true&from=share_recording_detail&continueMode=true&componentName=rec-play&originRequestUrl=https%3A%2F%2Fzoom.us%2Frec%2Fshare%2Ft1A5pPf5Qm3n832tKx7B4cFuQL54o9NO44tvBCJxe8ngDA36Z1KBNzLhILJK7Hls.gYdw-hgSwDxvQFNU&mc_cid=6a21000113&mc_eid=UNIQID) event (https://zoom.us/rec/play/ERokADzcBOeg1tZbV-3gx9QHO4DGq4kS4p2gMFXYjXvjti-8kMtA8w_G7AF3ddbQFvJyOo0f-dNvGqE3.fMQYlAB5_2o0ypxh?canPlayFromShare=true&from=share_recording_detail&continueMode=true&componentName=rec-play&originRequestUrl=https%3A%2F%2Fzoom.us%2Frec%2Fshare%2Ft1A5pPf5Qm3n832tKx7B4cFuQL54o9NO44tvBCJxe8ngDA36Z1KBNzLhILJK7Hls.gYdw-hgSwDxvQFNU&mc_cid=6a21000113&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Coming Up...

** College Town Hall
------------------------------------------------------------

Ryan is the featured speaker at New England College's Town Hall Meeting on September 13th. He will share his plans for uniting our nation and preserving our freedoms for the next generation. The event will air on C-SPAN. More details to follow.

** Iowa Faith & Freedom
------------------------------------------------------------

Ryan will speak to over 1000 state GOP leaders in Des Moines at the Iowa Faith & Freedom Coalition's Presidential Town Hall on Saturday, September 16th.
Reserve tickets here (https://ffciowa.com/upcoming-events?mc_cid=6a21000113&mc_eid=UNIQID)
How Can I Help?
• LIKE AND COMMENT on all social media posts
• A simple "I support Ryan Binkley for President" goes a long way!
• Ignore any argumentative comments that may follow
• Lastly, DONATE & SHARE the link with everyone you know!
We are asking anyone who sees this message to take one moment to donate and send the link to 10 new people to reach our new goal. BE THE CHANGE that allows Ryan's message to reach the nation!
Contribute Today! (https://secure.winred.com/binkley-for-president-2024/donate-now?mc_cid=6a21000113&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Coming up: Click here (https://binkley2024.com/events/?mc_cid=6a21000113&mc_eid=UNIQID) to stay up to date with events.

subject: We’re in a strong position. Here’s why→
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Cinde Warmington
body:
| Hi there, we wanted to make sure you saw our campaign manager’s message. Team Cinde wants to hear from our top supporters today to learn what’s driving them to stand with Cinde in 2024.

Click here to answer→

**_[https://go.cindewarmington.com/a/why-i-stand-with-cinde](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69468242/426245272/-588667215?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230909_PT_executivecouncil_1.2_1MO_cm_na_na_news&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjBkM2NmMy0yOTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryY538SSe1-Z2d_-ZNrW_JEbOhJx9XSKKoEiadAxz14=&emci=5f14e108-b04d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=160d3cf3-294f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=45626166)_**
* * *
**_Original Email From Philip:_**

Hi there,

Cinde has a long track record of fighting back against radical proposals put forth by Governor Sununu and Frank Edelblut, the Department of Education Commissioner. We fought against their controversial PragerU plan, spreading the word about how harmful it would be for New Hampshire students.

_Now, just this week, Edelblut announced that he’s not running against us for governor._

**Make no mistake: The strong campaign we’re building for New Hampshire is making right wing candidates worried about their chances to win in 2024.

_[We know that Cinde is the candidate who is able to take the corner office. But now we want to hear from our top supporters about why you stand with Cinde. Will you answer our short survey before the end of the week to fill us in on the issues most important to you in this race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69468243/426245277/-588667215?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230909_PT_executivecouncil_1.2_1MO_cm_na_na_news&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjBkM2NmMy0yOTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryY538SSe1-Z2d_-ZNrW_JEbOhJx9XSKKoEiadAxz14=&emci=5f14e108-b04d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=160d3cf3-294f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=45626166)_** | | **[Answer Here→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69468250/426245278/-588667215?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230909_PT_executivecouncil_1.2_1MO_cm_na_na_news&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjBkM2NmMy0yOTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryY538SSe1-Z2d_-ZNrW_JEbOhJx9XSKKoEiadAxz14=&emci=5f14e108-b04d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=160d3cf3-294f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=45626166)**
---

In Wednesday’s Executive Council meeting, Cinde stood up against Sununu and Edelblut’s plan to continue funneling public funds to private schools and further pushed back against the proposal to incorporate the right wing PragerU platform in our schools.

Recent polling shows that Cinde is viewed positively by a lot of Granite Staters and that’s in no small part due to her work standing up for public education in New Hampshire.

But the polling also shows that there are a number of undecided voters we still need to reach. Personal accounts of why our supporters stand with Cinde and the issues that are most critical in this race are key as we develop our plan to reach them.

Can we count on you to answer the call?

**[_https://go.cindewarmington.com/a/why-i-stand-with-cinde_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69468253/426245285/-588667215?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230909_PT_executivecouncil_1.2_1MO_cm_na_na_news&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjBkM2NmMy0yOTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryY538SSe1-Z2d_-ZNrW_JEbOhJx9XSKKoEiadAxz14=&emci=5f14e108-b04d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=160d3cf3-294f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=45626166)**

Thank you,
Philip Stein
_Campaign Manager_

* * *

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69468383/426245573/-664199346?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTkwOWYxYy0yYTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gf6D8R_7C1g8CmbJ8-USCChW2CbzBbKarKjJSZbzS-0=)
**DEVELOPING: Republicans are trying to OUST GA Attorney General Fani Willis over her investigation of Donald Trump’s election interference**

**Your Signature Missing:** [Add your name now to stand with GA Attorney General Fani Willis >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69468384/426245574/-1746637518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTkwOWYxYy0yYTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gf6D8R_7C1g8CmbJ8-USCChW2CbzBbKarKjJSZbzS-0=&emci=4c882314-2a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=b9909f1c-2a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=26828920) | | **[SIGN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69468385/426245575/-1746637518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTkwOWYxYy0yYTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gf6D8R_7C1g8CmbJ8-USCChW2CbzBbKarKjJSZbzS-0=&emci=4c882314-2a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=b9909f1c-2a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=26828920)**
---
* * *

Team,

As Donald Trump faces indictment after indictment, Republicans at _all_ levels of government are attempting to undermine the judicial process by targeting the prosecutors who are holding Donald Trump accountable.

Their latest stunt includes investigating Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis, the prosecutor who handed Trump his latest indictment for interfering in Georgia's 2020 election.

**In Congress, Jim Jordan, Trump’s MAGA ally JUST opened a House inquiry into Will’s latest indictments against Trump →**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69468386/426245576/-1746637518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTkwOWYxYy0yYTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gf6D8R_7C1g8CmbJ8-USCChW2CbzBbKarKjJSZbzS-0=&emci=4c882314-2a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=b9909f1c-2a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=26828920)**
**And at the state level? Top Republicans in the GA legislature are going as far to try and REMOVE Willis from her post →**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69468387/426245577/-1746637518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTkwOWYxYy0yYTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gf6D8R_7C1g8CmbJ8-USCChW2CbzBbKarKjJSZbzS-0=&emci=4c882314-2a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=b9909f1c-2a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=26828920)**
We cannot allow GOP extremists to sabotage the judicial process in a twisted effort to appease Donald Trump. **We MUST allow prosecutors like Fani Willis to do their jobs.**

[Last week, we sent around a petition asking our supporters to stand with Fani Willis in the face of these unwarranted attacks but it looks like we’re still missing your signature. Can you add your name now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69468388/426245578/-1746637518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTkwOWYxYy0yYTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gf6D8R_7C1g8CmbJ8-USCChW2CbzBbKarKjJSZbzS-0=&emci=4c882314-2a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=b9909f1c-2a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=26828920) | **[SIGN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69468389/426245579/-1746637518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTkwOWYxYy0yYTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gf6D8R_7C1g8CmbJ8-USCChW2CbzBbKarKjJSZbzS-0=&emci=4c882314-2a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=b9909f1c-2a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=26828920)**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: When we organize, hold those in power accountable, and fight righteous fights, we can continue to make positive change.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends, I’m running for re-election because there’s a lot we’ve got to do in order to save our country from extremists and make real change for our working families. And I’m going to keep fighting my heart out for this.
Here’s a few of the ideas I believe in:
We need to pass a wealth tax.
Supreme Court Justices should follow a basic code of ethics.
Quality child care should not eat up an entire paycheck.
Big bank executives should not be able to gamble with consumers’ livelihoods.
The filibuster must be abolished so we can pass the laws that the majority of Americans are calling for, like protecting abortion rights and enacting gun safety laws.
[**If you’re with me, will you pitch in to support my re-election and The Long Run today? In order to run our campaign for these plans, we need to hit our quarterly fundraising goals, and we’ve got an important one coming up at the end of this month. So please split $5 or anything you can between my campaign and The Long Run so I can keep up this fight in the Senate.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.-45zWj&refcode=em230909-1-t3&t=1&akid=4817%2E196590%2EFBuimn)
Your support will help ensure that we can keep building our movement for big, structural change. That we can get our message out there and campaign for these plans across the country.
Powerful special interests and extremist Republicans will be against us. But when we organize, hold those in power accountable, and fight righteous fights, we can continue to make positive change.
Additionally, the special interests we’re up against will use our fundraising results to gauge what they’re up against. So how about we give them something to worry about?
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t powerfully important that we hit our goal: Please split $5 or any amount between my campaign and The Long Run to help power our fight.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.-45zWj&refcode=em230909-1-t3&t=2&akid=4817%2E196590%2EFBuimn)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.-45zWj&refcode=em230909-1-t3&t=3&akid=4817%2E196590%2EFBuimn)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=4817%2E196590%2EFBuimn). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=4817%2E196590%2EFBuimn)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=4817_196590_FBuimn&akid=4817%2E196590%2EFBuimn)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=4817%2E196590%2EFBuimn)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:**
September 9, 2023
Contact: [press@tellitlikeitispac.com](mailto:press@tellitlikeitispac.com?subject=null&body=null)
**Tell It Like It Is PAC On New Poll Showing Christie & DeSantis Tied For Second Place Nationally****
****ARLINGTON, VA —** Today, Bill Palatucci, Chair of Tell It Like It Is PAC, released the following statement after a new [Rasmussen Reports ](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=e323cdc43e&e=d0a9afa930) poll showed Governor Chris Christie tied for second place with Governor Ron DeSantis among likely Republican primary voters:
“A mere ninety days into the race, Chris Christie is tied with Governor DeSantis and in front of all other GOP challengers to the former president. Christie’s record of conservative accomplishments in a deep blue state is unmatched among the rest of the field. With President Joe Biden’s approval rating and handling of the economy hitting all-time lows, this country is crying out for a different leader with a winning record of attracting independent voters and that can’t come from the Trump apologists who are flailing.”

-###-

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Despite the attacks, Summer has held firm on Palestinian rights while in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
We’re already seeing well funded right-wing Super PACs pouring money into the 2024 elections. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvTMKQIkRa0oia5JL2cRuCewBLuFThBTXdE0L6gP-SFOHQjAP6wK07eM2gsabtUmniQRJ4r7akwKycwYZuHdCt23sTOEjmY_XiZj6lj68M0PDt32qK03gpzLjKYhdpQ161Tg1xt7q4TLpmFfnyviEshdQdtYxq8dv1gmYapgawt4P2SsXo1TELDTBzTtABsryZegFPhRB7rra-oecW4jCOJPKoztz6afOuOExOrGXnm0DQ7dDebtNV8pP26mmgojVagRFvRMKks_PYLW41HdWQp7q85kZRkGaEz3aZuLUuNis/3zg/yLAmFA0nQGy8tVRySx1fsg/h0/5Kqs6OCSsWxItz0DfQRMTP-ZrUdXCoAykzkaYtwYF7I)
