Friend, I’m proud to support my sister in service Summer Lee as she launches her campaign for re-election. Like me, Summer was a community organizer and state legislator before running for Congress. For years, she’s taken on corporate polluters and fought for workers’ rights in deep partnership with her community. In Congress, we’ve introduced the _OLIGARCH Act_ to tax extreme wealth and the _Justice For All Act_ to expand our civil rights. **We’re taking on powerful special interests that are trying to keep working class Black women like Summer out of office.** **Summer made history last year when she became the first Black Congresswoman elected in Pennsylvania, beating out millions of dollars in PAC spending against her—including $4 million from anti-Palestinian AIPAC’s network.** Despite the attacks, Summer has held firm on supporting the human dignity of Palestinians while in Congress. [**Can you split a $5 donation between our campaigns today to send us back to Congress to fight for you and working class families?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKw4CgPtiDSXkrPijXbd1rNzerMhdUm5DpAVBOrMyGRK8hsG7JalKY6KrpCAf1BEsTZlTejjlZgt9wTg7s1uHLdls_bTY0tjM_hZDoBWh3GWmKcfTkdopYJJY54P3vNxis4b7CP54wWHiLYvs20rcTRC0S4QSeaeaRP3u25Wj4UtW-Smpmkvh8rEos2YfO1LNCJnlkhSu9CaIYGsRPnllZfIjP9tFJyqIWNOcWRrSo2BcX3sqhr5pWrdo9sGLmLBaeaQccKokJXi9QKosxOvjoNpVswlbgER8HW7FszmzY-bgUr-IvwZIQXOkxfkW0h4DkaKE8ss2yKr0FQnkHawXVfy7KKY_Ss5cPm7bx8HvhjEvXWyf-akwXEAjSexA-0-F4JbmU92_zHsDPjATBFmJHyEL8gmQwv09n-FjNk0hHd7skP9xfzXgzE2ek7dBWKBbc/3zg/yLAmFA0nQGy8tVRySx1fsg/h1/1uFwIYW8QTgAZJfO7XruylV30McLKDfg35MOQ6cddmQ) | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKw4CgPtiDSXkrPijXbd1rNxvw5Er2G57vBFyaWjI0cQEvZO1gGYacNH16W-YjauiCbjnk92--S8b-SPNDQWFlqNHZFzX125egKvEVhiMPlZdAvRIlPUVF55wMH7-1nsp88525ua97sFWjA3axZw9AwHeipWonrssZixaafPLiXnyZBS7cLbuxU9tUNae7Y2apW8jI9k1j3Amyjlc0ItS4Hq4lE3a9p9L9T69o46UQOEtgiNuZ5auGum5a7kzjympna7xa3s_w1piJcaDR5i7KlAybJjvcZZoiMmgueTThFOrHFUW7WBLeUY3okpWIRfOcdIIGBbhDStfHiv-Z167xL1__q1yVQ51hHD5E_QqulunXV9JHW5dEtPU-ds4QTa06Vik-U1j7u8PsyNm7PheK5q2DMc0hQVfQf4z5ImnAvzfixnS-uH9mh-vUVn92ny0O/3zg/yLAmFA0nQGy8tVRySx1fsg/h2/KLgj5sNLt8wJAOzPdT6lGYQdgQgzu6YHYH8y-1uAzD4)
---
**Unlike many of our colleagues in Congress, Summer has lived the same struggles that everyday people face across the country.** That means she understands how urgently our communities need bold changes.
As an activist, she’s fought for fair working conditions and environmental justice. She continues to stand in solidarity with workers, and I’m proud to co-sponsor her _Hazard Pay for Health Care Workers Act_ to keep workers safe during emergencies.
By my side in Congress, Summer is helping to build the multi-racial democracy we all deserve, where everyone can thrive.
**Because we’re taking on the unjust status quo, powerful special interests see us as a threat.** We’re already seeing well funded right-wing Super PACs pouring money into the 2024 elections. We’ve beat them before—let’s do it again.
[**Please split a donation today between my and Rep. Summer Lee’s re-election campaigns, so we can keep fighting for the rights of marginalized communities in the U.S and around the world.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKw4CgPtiDSXkrPijXbd1rN7IHuybS53QoSBdRO8F2ocnDd3-D1K1_WsZT46EJu_zOEg5iC07AzuqmiSMwguI5EGj1AMgY0Q1OcuwX4S4NO6aoZixUAOYs7SbOHgTy9qbaaMPIFHkfTVSVLlJDs9EOd3iszm2jMH3mRmo8uHyEZz2otcNrPGr06E6alS2h87GVF8zUyBOqn93BpMkC38h4L5srGplIYucmziyUbq_q9F1N-zz1pF0ysf-DfEhAVxgyf8bOT93NMXKTngHlpRXh3-AG8ePo5snZmZB_4EC947ruSmJ-UOmt9iKvR6WE6VMx1kqgrg1v7WuQKTj3DdArWOd0MVTk0Zx7i5lsxDr9Pz6ra8zakityUBB8vBMBV68U1fhYWEl9z9Yo7J5ahQGbb4PIXeAIMHq1X1cWRVf-P0o1C1xz3em936Bs5InIZdPj/3zg/yLAmFA0nQGy8tVRySx1fsg/h3/OchGWmwIbH2Ek361PZVHokRqc1x7BjG1ruS-ekgPKDw)

In Congress, we’ve introduced the OLIGARCH Act to tax extreme wealth and the Justice For All Act to expand our civil rights. We’re taking on powerful special interests that are trying to keep working class Black women like Summer out of office. Summer made history last year when she became the first Black Congresswoman elected in Pennsylvania, beating out millions of dollars in PAC spending against her—including $4 million from anti-Palestinian AIPAC’s network. Despite the attacks, Summer has held firm on supporting the human dignity of Palestinians while in Congress. | Unlike many of our colleagues in Congress, Summer has lived the same struggles that everyday people face across the country. That means she understands how urgently our communities need bold changes. As an activist, she’s fought for fair working conditions and environmental justice. She continues to stand in solidarity with workers, and I’m proud to co-sponsor her Hazard Pay for Health Care Workers Act to keep workers safe during emergencies. By my side in Congress, Summer is helping to build the multi-racial democracy we all deserve, where everyone can thrive. Because we’re taking on the unjust status quo, powerful special interests see us as a threat. We’re already seeing well funded right-wing Super PACs pouring money into the 2024 elections. We’ve beat them before—let’s do it again. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Summer Lee and Rashida Tlaib | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. Neither of us take any money from corporate PACs, so every donation matters. In service, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: VoteVets
subject: Warrior Poets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Tuberville needed to respond to the Secretary of the Navy yesterday. He took his best shot.
#
Well, guess Tuberville needed to respond to the Secretary of the Navy's remarks from earlier this week. He took his best shot.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-sept23.AXrwBB&refcode=em230909-1-90-NOR&t=1&akid=15754%2E3013755%2EunLEba)
Poems on aircraft carriers.
Wait until this guy finds out about the U.S. Navy Band. Yes, Tommy, they have people playing instruments, too! They even sing songs.
It’s easy to joke here, but this is actually serious. War has always been intertwined with art, with song, and yes, with poetry. Even General George S. Patton wrote poetry. These things deepen a warrior’s humanity and their connection to home, the reasons they put their lives on the line for their comrades and their countrymen.
Warrior poets are a proud and honored tradition.
If Tuberville read a book once in his life he’d know that.
But he’s a politician, through and through. And he’s going to keep injecting politics into our Military, undermining our Armed Forces at the same time he works to restrict the rights of our Veterans.
[**This is the fight of the year. VoteVets is hard at work. So please, if you can afford it, chip in $3 and support our mission. We can’t beat Tuberville and the GOP without your help.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-sept23.AXrwBB&refcode=em230909-1-90-NOR&t=2&akid=15754%2E3013755%2EunLEba)**

I need you to see this message, friend. Everywhere I go, folks tell me that they’re upset with Ken Buck’s propensity to flip flop on some of the most important issues facing our country. One of those issues is protecting our democracy and whether or not a potentially convicted criminal should be allowed to become president again. | | | I need you to see this message, friend. Everywhere I go, folks tell me that they’re upset with Ken Buck’s propensity to flip-flop on some of the most important issues facing our country. One of those issues is protecting our democracy and whether or not a potentially convicted criminal should be allowed to become president again. **They’re upset because he’s busy worrying about Donald Trump and not dealing with the immediate issues of low wages, lack of access to health care, and the climate crisis.** I want to fight for the Fourth District the way that Ken Buck hasn’t. But I need your help. **[Will you chip in any amount that makes sense to help me get it done?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=199c96b6dc2d4576abe8f3196725e65c&_e=HBu9qErR48vPEOynFUzO-SD8EW48RelF9FjeIbgTF57GycUYXh09ZEbBxvkD738kZJF2UIxoV9_H-F4Prc2IYYB9CeHFLbBAhRUQrsffIQQqcI5pSukzMH9CwPrx0todGfyKe4EBV_5_7KsHNxleXp8Vb9NAowvwHHpLk-iUrigYXFQN0vn67QwWsrruE9HVVK9uNxgS7eOLRb2UOShBrN9Kc8GZCmL9bkT4o2pWNpL8HHv4PZGcVA6g8g4R_r0oTRe0GgnHPWPdXH3A6L5IEvaPeY2_QzXbcW-9MrfJGPbMeAsBHrnXS7OWbmF2INJ8CAyxr3Ms8HqmhMWyOe3KoiFvqseX7h-SleJcJtw6xk_7K6JruM4DEfaq55gmMIVdxxUl_A_RU8SSY7-hXKn4eQ%3D%3D)** Thank you, John \------- Begin Original Message ------- [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=199c96b6dc2d4576abe8f3196725e65c&_e=HBu9qErR48vPEOynFUzO-SD8EW48RelF9FjeIbgTF57GycUYXh09ZEbBxvkD738kZJF2UIxoV9_H-F4Prc2IYYB9CeHFLbBAhRUQrsffIQQqcI5pSukzMH9CwPrx0todGfyKe4EBV_5_7KsHNxleXp8Vb9NAowvwHHpLk-iUrigYXFQN0vn67QwWsrruE9HVVK9uNxgS7eOLRb2UOShBrN9Kc8GZCmL9bkT4o2pWNpL8HHv4PZGcVA6g8g4R_r0oG7_t4d50ZVhzjehJLOrGwWge8jiGm5e5zDD0Gf4LKdjX_BhXWhJy_G9aytpzBenkR77zVmu4oTmZYoyKowFV6otVm5rQfKyqRv5lFyemsbarG6eNoRuVJ7bUiGdb0I9oYlKeq4QyuSfIIOMUc9WOdg%3D%3D) Ken Buck is trying to change his tune on Donald Trump, folks. In the aftermath of the 2020 Election, Buck was happy to go along with the extremists in the Republican Party who called the election rigged and said that Donald Trump was the real winner. _He was happy to stand alongside the rhetoric that eventually caused the January 6th Insurrection that nearly destroyed our democracy forever._ **That is, until it became less popular to do so.** You see, Ken Buck is a fair weather fan of Donald Trump – and only wants to be on his side when it’s politically advantageous to do so. So if he’s trying to destroy our democracy, but he’s popular? Ken Buck is all in. Now that he’s got several indictments against him and he’s seen as a little more dangerous, Ken Buck wants to act like he has the moral high ground. But we know the truth. body:
Running for Congress can get expensive. There are a lot of costs involved, like hiring staff, paying for a website, running ads to help get our message out, and so much more.

| I know it’s a Saturday, but I just wanted to send a quick message to explain a little bit more about why fundraising is so important to me and my team.

Running for Congress can get expensive. There are a lot of costs involved, like hiring staff, paying for a website, running ads to help get our message out, and so much more.

And while my extremist opponent, Beth Van Duyne, has over **_$1 million_** in her campaign’s war chest, we don’t. Instead of selling out to corporate donors and special interest groups, our campaign relies on grassroots support from everyday folks like you to fuel our success.

[_**We face a crucial FEC public fundraising deadline at the end of this month, so every dollar we raise is critical. With that in mind, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can today to support our campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69469574/426249890/425462096?refcode=BLU-SEC-20230909-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNTEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzAxODJmMmItMmM0Zi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=W-Ogw9ukia6NWlZ3eHbOcIfcZKP7ynzF4gy6LGHk4aA=)

clean_body: Running for Congress can get expensive. There are a lot of costs involved, like hiring staff, paying for a website, running ads to help get our message out, and so much more. | = | I know it’s a Saturday, but I just wanted to send a quick message to explain a little bit more about why fundraising is so important to me and my team. Running for Congress can get expensive. There are a lot of costs involved, like hiring staff, paying for a website, running ads to help get our message out, and so much more. And while my extremist opponent, Beth Van Duyne, has over $1 million in her campaign’s war chest, we don’t. Instead of selling out to corporate donors and special interest groups, our campaign relies on grassroots support from everyday folks like you to fuel our success. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Sam * | | = Paid for by Sam Eppler for Congress Sam Eppler for Congress 3419 Westminster Ave Box #268 Dallas, TX 75205 United States | | ---|--- = = Communicating by email is a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with you, but if you no longer would like to receive emails, you can click here to

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

| | Hey Peter it’s Dave, Angela’s campaign manager. Now that we’re officially a few weeks out from our second-ever FEC deadline, I want to share a quick update straight from our campaign HQ. **[(If you’re in a hurry but still want to show Angela some support, you can make a quick $25 contribution here.)](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5622?t=10&amount=25&akid=440%2E52803%2EOOKpdP)** | | | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5622?t=11&amount=25&akid=440%2E52803%2EOOKpdP)
---
Angela’s been shattering expectations from day one of this race. Last quarter, she made Maryland history by raising over $1.7 million in the first seven weeks of this campaign.
And she’s been crushing it ever since. She’s earned over 90 endorsements from elected officials – **including Maryland’s Sen. Chris Van Hollen** – as well as contributions from every single jurisdiction in Maryland.
**Despite so much positive momentum, I do have some concerns, Peter: We fell short of our fundraising target in August, which raises the stakes of this End-of-Quarter goal dramatically.**
Our numbers will go public on September 30th. Together, we’ll show everyone watching – **including Angela’s self-funding multi-millionaire opponent** – that we’re not messing around when it comes to winning this race.
**[Can we count on you to donate $25 today and help us start September strong?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/5622?t=12&amount=25&akid=440%2E52803%2EOOKpdP)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

Hi friend,

Throughout our time on the campaign trail and in the halls of Congress, we have built a powerful and diverse coalition and earned the support of folks in every corner of the district.

Last cycle, Greg garnered support from labor unions, advocacy groups, political organizations, religious communities, and the hundreds of thousands of voters who believed in a better future for our children and families.

**But now as Greg’s re-election campaign gains momentum, we are still missing the most important endorsement: Yours.**

This campaign has always been – _and will continue to be_ – about you and the community of hardworking folks across Southwest Ohio. Knowing Greg has your support would mean the world.

[**So please, if you’re ready to keep Southwest Ohio blue and keep Greg fighting for us in Congress, will you officially endorse Greg today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69470093/426251681/-993658826?refcode=em_eng_2023.09.09_b1_tl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTYzZDg2OC0yZDRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZnBsQDE1SNJAJGk0sGHT2O1_zdg7ORm28sDF9mnU76o=&emci=98f3e149-7e4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=0163d868-2d4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=10283101) | [Endorse Greg >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69470094/426251682/-993658826?refcode=em_eng_2023.09.09_b1_tl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTYzZDg2OC0yZDRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZnBsQDE1SNJAJGk0sGHT2O1_zdg7ORm28sDF9mnU76o=&emci=98f3e149-7e4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=0163d868-2d4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=10283101)

subject: I want to tell you a bit about me:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
This is an email about why our work is *so* important to me.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69470489/426253334/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjk4ZjIxYy0yZTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whAr4VSmKzK-PLKyFaKlaauJdk1eLZKdgym8TaPqhys=)
---
Hey Peter, I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about why this work is so important to me personally. [I really hope you’ll read the whole thing and consider chipping in $3 to support my work in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69470490/426253335/-717493931?amount=3&amounts=3,10,25&refcode=RTFC_20230909_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjk4ZjIxYy0yZTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whAr4VSmKzK-PLKyFaKlaauJdk1eLZKdgym8TaPqhys=) | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69470492/426253337/-717493931?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&refcode=RTFC_20230909_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjk4ZjIxYy0yZTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whAr4VSmKzK-PLKyFaKlaauJdk1eLZKdgym8TaPqhys=)
---
I’m not a typical Congressman, Peter.

I’m not a millionaire who was born into powerful connections.

**I’m a kid from the Bronx who was raised by a single mother on the minimum wage, so I’ve _lived_ the experiences that many other politicians just talk about.**

I’ve experienced food and housing insecurity.
I’ve faced racism and homophobia firsthand.
People I love have been ensnared by the criminal justice system.

Peter, people like me don’t usually end up in the halls of power.

**But despite all of the odds,_I won_ and became the first openly gay Afro-Latino to be elected to Congress.**

And every time I walk into my office, I feel the weight of history on my shoulders -- because I know how much work we have to do.

We were given a mandate by the American people in 2020, and it’s _our duty_ to make the most of it.

We have _a duty_ to end child poverty.
We have _a duty_ to create safe housing.
We have _a duty_ to protect our nation’s most vulnerable.

So we need to prepare now to protect it.

I’m in Congress to fight for the people of this country. **So I really need help from grassroots donors like you.**

[My team wants to raise $10,000 this month, and at our current pace, I don’t know if we’ll make it. Can you rush $3 to help get us where we need to be to win?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69470493/426253338/-717493931?amount=3&amounts=3,10,25&refcode=RTFC_20230909_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjk4ZjIxYy0yZTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whAr4VSmKzK-PLKyFaKlaauJdk1eLZKdgym8TaPqhys=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69470499/426253344/-717493931?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20230909_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjk4ZjIxYy0yZTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whAr4VSmKzK-PLKyFaKlaauJdk1eLZKdgym8TaPqhys=)

[Or a custom donation »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69470501/426253346/-717493931?amount=10&amounts=3,7,10&refcode=RTFC_20230909_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Zjk4ZjIxYy0yZTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=whAr4VSmKzK-PLKyFaKlaauJdk1eLZKdgym8TaPqhys=)
Peter, if you made it all the way to the end of this email, thank you.

I really appreciate your support,

_Ritchie_

www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

body:

from our sponsor.

Hi,

This is big…

You are now learning about the future of testosterone therapy.

Men, imagine this…

Clinical grade hormone support without painful needles,
terrible side effects or expensive doctors visits.

In fact, this form of testosterone is now available over the
counter (no script needed) and can be used orally, no more
painful needles.

Plus, it is 1/10th the cost of TRT (with no documented side
effects)

You could be days away from normal test-levels (at any age)

incredible clinical study.

Here is everything you need to know

Clint Winters, Life Scientist

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: I’m running to defeat Rick Scott
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Friends,
My name is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. I’m an immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. And I’m officially running to defeat Sen. Rick Scott and serve as Florida’s next U.S. Senator.
Rick Scott has failed us in Florida, and I refuse to sit back and watch him push my state and country backward. I’m prepared to fight to protect our rights, our economy, and our very democracy — and even more, I’m prepared to win.
But this race will be one of the most competitive Senate races in 2024, and we’re up against a deep-seated Republican incumbent who spent $64 million of his personal fortune to buy this seat last time around. The only way I can compete — and win — is with the support of grassroots Democrats like you.
I've set an ambitious goal to raise $50,000 by midnight to defeat Rick Scott, and I need your help to reach it. Please, will you split a donation between my campaign and Serve America right now to flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
When I was 14, my mom, my three sisters, and I left our home in Ecuador to find a better life in America. We lived in a one room apartment. My mom worked double-shifts during the day and took classes at night to learn English. I picked up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help make ends meet.
Those years weren’t easy. But thanks to my mother’s relentless belief in a brighter future for her children, I went on to graduate from college, become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and write the bill to expand Medicare Advantage coverage.
My story — coming from a one room apartment to walking the halls of Congress — is only possible in America. But Rick Scott has spent his time in Washington doing everything he can to destroy the country that gave my family a shot at a better life.
Rick Scott has a net worth up to nearly a quarter of a billion dollars, yet he’s proposed tax increases on working families and the middle class. He’s pushed for a nationwide abortion ban. And he wrote the GOP plan to end the Social Security and Medicare that so many rely on.
That’s why I’m running to defeat him next November. Experts say that Rick will be one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot — which means that if we build a powerful grassroots team full of people like you, friend, we can take him down.
So please, I’m personally asking: Will you become one of my very first grassroots donors by splitting a gift between my campaign and Serve America today? Every dollar gets us one step closer to defeating Rick Scott and defending our Senate majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Thank you for joining me in this fight for a better Florida and a better future for all of us.
With gratitude,
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell

name: Wiley Nickel For Congress
subject: re: update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Team –
We’re bumping Mariah’s note from yesterday because it’s going to take all of us doing our part to end this quarter on a high. After yesterday, we still need to raise $1,395 before the end of the day today to get to our $2,500 goal.
Can you rush in a $25 donation right now to help us get there? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2309-q3-wn?refcode=230909-email&amount=25]
Thanks, team.
Wiley Nickel For Congress
------ Original Message ------
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2309-q3-wn?refcode=230909-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2309-q3-wn?refcode=230909-email]Hi there –
We are officially in the last month of Q3, and before you know it, we’ll be just one year away from Election Day.
We are just slightly behind where we should be in order to reach our EOQ goal, but if we can bring in just $2,500 over the next 48 hours, we’ll be back on track.
Can you rush in a $25 donation right now to help us get there? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2309-q3-wn?refcode=230909-email&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2309-q3-wn?refcode=230909-email]
As Wiley’s Finance Director, it’s my job to ensure that each and every goal is met. These goals help us afford digital ads, events, and overall outreach to every part of the district.
With a race like Wiley’s, we can’t afford to sit back and wait to see if we’re going to have enough cash in the bank. We need to be proactive and raise as much as we can so we can continue amplifying our message.
Last year, we flipped this seat and sent the message that NC-13 wants a representative who believes in democracy, voting rights, women’s reproductive freedom, accessible health care, and affordable housing. We must keep up this fight to ensure Wiley can continue working for us in Washington.
So, Peter, can you chip in right now to help us raise $2,500 over the next 48 hours? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2309-q3-wn?refcode=230909-email]
Thank you for being here.
Mariah Morgan
Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today!

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: my story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=1133%2E35263%2E7aYL2Y ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

It’s Tammy here. My friend Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running for the U.S.
Senate in Florida and she's counting on our support. Read her message
below and [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dmp.RYg70l&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=1133%2E35263%2E7aYL2Y ]chip in, if you can.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Peter, I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator — and I
hope you’ll give me a moment to share why.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dmp.RYg70l&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=1133%2E35263%2E7aYL2Y ]My husband and three children.My husband and three children.

I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and
me to America in search of a better life.

We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother
worked double shifts as a home health care provider and at night, she took
classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at
the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet.

My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope
made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South
American immigrant to serve in Congress. She taught me that a better
education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we
never give up. This is the promise of America.

And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better,
and we’ve got to fight for it.

Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like
my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable amongst
us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no
wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably.

With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up
for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the
promise of America — but not without all hands on deck.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dmp.RYg70l&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=1133%2E35263%2E7aYL2Y ]So please, will you join the fight for a better future by splitting a
donation of $10 between Tammy Baldwin and my campaign? If we win in
Florida, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Tammy Baldwin will go through
immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-dmp.yOrXNk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=1133%2E35263%2E7aYL2Y ]SPLIT $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-dmp.mghO0i&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=1133%2E35263%2E7aYL2Y ]SPLIT $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-dmp.35xlCe&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=1133%2E35263%2E7aYL2Y ]SPLIT $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-dmp.vo-rUp&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=1133%2E35263%2E7aYL2Y ]SPLIT $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2158?c0=tbe-em-dmp.ISX0sH&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=1133%2E35263%2E7aYL2Y ]SPLIT $250 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dmp.RYg70l&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=1133%2E35263%2E7aYL2Y ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for joining me in this fight. I’m so grateful to have you by my
side.

Debbie

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: On freezing my eggs when I got elected to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends - I’m setting aside my Sara-the-Congresswoman hat to share some of the deeply personal, reproductive health choices I’ve made in the hopes we can demystify and destigmatize these conversations. (And if you’re just here for the policy insights, I promise those come into play later in the email, too, so keep reading.)
I’ve been transparent about my decision to freeze my eggs, and earlier this year I shared more about that experience with the publication Refinery29 (you can read that here! [https://www.refinery29.com/en-us/2023/02/11284127/rep-sara-jacobs-fertility-my-body-my-data-act] ) . Here’s the short version: My career was hitting a critical milestone right when I had to make some key decisions about my fertility timeline. So, at 32 and in my first year in Congress, I decided to freeze my eggs.
Just like so many others in my generation, I was told growing up that you can either prioritize your career or have a family - you can’t do both.
But we’re rejecting those societal constraints thanks to advancements in medicine, technology, and health care - and the realities of reproductive health have changed so much in the past few decades.
For example, I’ve lived my entire life with the constitutional right to contraception and I’ve exercised it for nearly as long. From the birth control pills I used as a teenager to address debilitating cramps, to the IUD I’ve relied on for years, or the Plan B I’ve picked up over the counter when I needed it. Like so many of my friends, I use apps to track my periods and my fertility. And of course, I’m grateful that I have access to health care professionals with whom I can make these important decisions.
The process of freezing my eggs was difficult - physically, emotionally - and was incredibly expensive. And here’s where I put my Congresswoman hat back on: Freezing your eggs requires immense resources that very few people have access to, and yet everyone should be afforded the dignity to make the decisions that are right for them and their family.
I’m privileged and lucky that I was able to pay out of pocket for this option, but most people can’t do that, and insurance mostly doesn’t cover this process.
Freezing my eggs gave me agency over my own life in a way that was incredibly empowering, and I believe everyone should have the option to choose what’s right for them - whether that's fertility preservation, undergoing fertility treatments, deciding not to have a child, or choosing adoption.
As a millennial woman in a historically older, male-dominated U.S. Congress, I feel a responsibility to address the challenges facing our generation right now, and to anticipate the challenges of the future. I get to break boundaries and take on a lot of firsts - like becoming the first person in the last 35 years (and maybe ever) to talk about their own period on the House floor!
I’m also helping educate my colleagues about fertility treatments, period tracking apps, and reproductive issues in general so that these topics become commonplace - because there’s no way we can successfully expand access to reproductive health care (and ensure it’s affordable, accessible, and stigma-free!) without first engaging in these conversations.
Talking openly about all this is an important step - that’s why I’m glad to share my story with you directly, and I hope you’ll feel free to do the same with me. If you’d like to share a personal story about balancing fertility and a career, making reproductive health choices throughout your life, or anything else that’s on your mind, reply to this email. I’d be honored to read what you have to say.
Thanks for reading along and sharing in my truth.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

Kevin McCarthy and his super PAC allies know their path to keeping the House majority hinges on holding Republican-held seats where local Democrats are surging. And since our race was recently moved to a “Toss Up,” they also know that CA-41 is going to come down to the wire -- _and that every dollar is going to matter here._ **[In light of this news, we're humbly asking you to make your first $3 donation today. When Will ran against Ken Calvert in 2022, he surprised everyone by nearly flipping this seat. But in the end, Calvert’s corporate cash was too much to overcome after the primary when Will became the Democratic nominee.
**Headed into 2024, McCarthy knows Calvert is vulnerable.** That’s why their goal is to overwhelm us with outside spending, and effectively _buy_ the gavel for another two years.

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.

clean_body: "I will NEVER let the Deep State bureaucrats lock you down" - Gov. Ron DeSantis | | | | | | | | | | Friend, You experienced COVID hysteria under a Democrat President AND under a Republican President... Unless you lived in Florida in 2020, what you didn't experience is Ron DeSantis leading his state out of the crisis and refusing to let unelected bureaucrats and the radical Left control American lives. Wondering how he managed to create a thriving economy during a time of nationwide economic turmoil, fight back against the radical imposition of mandates and lockdowns, and turn Florida into a refuge for sanity and a citadel of freedom? | | | This is what we need to see from our President, Friend. Governor Ron DeSantis is the ONLY leader who has proven that he means it when he promises... "I will NEVER let the deep state bureaucrats lock you down" -- Gov. Ron DeSantis. Gov. DeSantis knew that the Left would try to bring the COVID hysteria back, and that's why he signed the STRONGEST medical freedom bill in the nation into law in May. He has been ahead of the curve all along, fighting to make sure freedom wins--every time. He will fight back against every bogus attempt the Left makes to expand government control. He will fight back for YOU.********** In Freedom, Team DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Pics from the summer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi Peter!
We've been busy this summer talking to voters, attending events, and building the groundwork for a winning campaign. We're a grassroots powered operation, and none of this would be possible without your support.
I wanted to take a moment to share some shots from the campaign trail. Check them out below!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act]
I spoke at the Protect Our Care bus tour about the importance of protecting Medicare and lowering healthcare costs.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act]
While this wasn't campaign-related, dropping Helene off at college was a big part of our August — and a reminder of how important access to a strong education is!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act]
I attended the IATSE Local 415 Labor Union Town Hall. Workers' rights are the backbone of our economy!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act]
I spent a productive and empowering afternoon hosting the Reproductive Rights Roundtable with Mayor Regina Romero, Minority Whip Nancy Gutierrez, Pima County Supervisor Adelita Grijalva, and Dr. Amalia Luxardo.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act]
We must support and invest in public higher education. This was one of the main topics I focused on while speaking at the Youth Empowerment Caucus at the University of Arizona.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act]
It was so great to join Senator Mark Kelly, Gabby Giffords, Mayor Regina Romero, and Yolanda Bejarano yesterday evening for a wonderful happy hour event with the Arizona Democratic Party and supporters.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act]
We spent Labor Day celebrating unions and workers' rights.
It has been a great summer. There's incredible grassroots energy in our district, and tons of folks ready to fight for better jobs, climate action, and reproductive rights.
Our campaign has had a great start, but we'll need to work hard to keep up this momentum.
We're one of the few flippable seats in the House. It's a huge opportunity for Democrats, but it also means that Republican super PACs will pour millions into protecting my opponent, Juan Ciscomani.
If we get outspent 6:1 again, we'll be in serious trouble.
Will you help us take on the special interests and corporate donors funneling money into my opponent's campaign by chipping in? Every dollar you chip in helps us get ready for 2024. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act]
In Congress, I will always put my constituents first.
— Kirsten
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_090923_CampaignUpdate_act]

name: Team Kaptur
subject: A target on our district 🎯
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS

If the far-right gets their way here in Pennsylvania, they’ll try every trick in the book to roll back Pennsylvanians’ real freedoms, including the freedom to choose. _**We won’t let that happen.**_ [_**Read Josh’s message on how he’s delivering real freedom for every Pennsylvanian, then chip in $10 or more to support this fight. It’s going to take _all of us_ to ensure Pennsylvanians continue to have the real freedom we deserve.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69473297/426262583/-1162444457?refcode=email_090923_Real-freedom-kicker&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTlkYjE4OC0zNTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nK8vc447v_Q-0nIC_w42riIHpaDsTtV4dOo7k4-u3bM=) | | [Chip in →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69473298/426262584/-1162444457?refcode=email_090923_Real-freedom-kicker&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTlkYjE4OC0zNTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nK8vc447v_Q-0nIC_w42riIHpaDsTtV4dOo7k4-u3bM=)

Begin Forwarded Message:
From: Josh Shapiro
Subject: the freedom to thrive
Derek – you’ve probably heard me talk about bringing “real freedom” to every corner of our Commonwealth. Here’s what I mean:
Real freedom means being respected no matter where you’re from, what you look like, or who you do or do not pray to.
It means the freedom to raise a family on a living wage.
It means that our children feel safe and are safe, and receive a high-quality public education no matter where they live.
**And it means the freedom to make your own health care decisions, without a radical politician trying to stand in the way.**
Since day one as Governor, I’ve fought for real freedom in every corner of Pennsylvania – **and our work is far from done.**
[_**If you believe _every_ Pennsylvanian ought to have real freedom to thrive, will you chip in $15 to support this grassroots movement? I’m working day and night to deliver much-needed progress and real freedom throughout our Commonwealth, but I can’t do it without you.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69473299/426262585/-1162444457?refcode=email_090923_Real-freedom-kicker&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTlkYjE4OC0zNTRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nK8vc447v_Q-0nIC_w42riIHpaDsTtV4dOo7k4-u3bM=)

clean_body: Did you see this, Derek? Josh Shapiro just outlined what real freedom means to him – and why he’s fighting for it across our Commonwealth. We’ve accomplished so much together so far, but we can’t take our progress for granted. If the far-right gets their way here in Pennsylvania, they’ll try every trick in the book to roll back Pennsylvanians’ real freedoms, including the freedom to choose. We won’t let that happen. = | | = – Team Shapiro Begin Forwarded Message: From: Josh Shapiro Subject: the freedom to thrive Derek – you’ve probably heard me talk about bringing “real freedom” to every corner of our Commonwealth. Here’s what I mean: Real freedom means being respected no matter where you’re from, what you look like, or who you do or do not pray to. It means the freedom to raise a family on a living wage. It means that our children feel safe and are safe, and receive a high-quality public education no matter where they live. And it means the freedom to make your own health care decisions, without a radical politician trying to stand in the way. Since day one as Governor, I’ve fought for real freedom in every corner of Pennsylvania – and our work is far from done. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you for your support, Derek. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. Hey Derek, My name is Olivia Field, and I wanted to take the time to introduce myself to you. I'm the Finance Director here on Team Deluzio, and I've been a proud supporter of Chris since he first ran for Congress in 2021. My job is to make sure that Chris has the resources he needs to continue being a strong voice for the people of Western PA. This frees up Chris to focus on the most important part of serving in Congress – listening to and delivering results for PA-17. He knocks on doors, joins union picket lines, talks to small business owners, gets funding for our community, and stands up to right-wing bullies and corrupt lobbyists in Washington. **Chris is in one of the most competitive races in the country – and it's getting tighter by the day. name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: That's it: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Peter.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---

name: Shawn Wilson
subject: Please — I’m only asking for $5
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
Let me explain.

I’ll get straight to the point, Peter — We’re 5 weeks out from our primary here in Louisiana, and we need all hands on deck to prepare for the tough fight ahead. The truth is: I don’t like asking for money. **But after national Republicans dropped $1 million on an ad campaign smearing my record, it’s clear they mean business.** They want to flip the governor’s seat and put Louisiana — one of the _last_ Southern states with a Democratic governor — under MAGA control and drive our state into the dirt. I’ll admit it, they’re fighting hard to win this race. But that’s why we have to fight _harder_ , because we can’t trust a GOP extremist with our future. **_[So with 5 weeks to go, I’m asking you for $5 — just $1 per week — to help our campaign contact more voters, put up more yard signs, and keep critical momentum going into the primary. Can I count on you to chip in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69474172/426265839/218720461?amount=5&refcode=ea.d060b1b2-3a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.d060b1b2-3a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDA2MGIxYjItM2E0Zi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JnS054ow5iC52_l9REeGg-W1YYX7MbNcvsh95rvmLDs=)_** **[CHIP IN $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69474173/426265841/218720461?amount=5&refcode=ea.d060b1b2-3a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.d060b1b2-3a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDA2MGIxYjItM2E0Zi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JnS054ow5iC52_l9REeGg-W1YYX7MbNcvsh95rvmLDs=)** **[CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69474186/426265843/218720461?refcode=ea.d060b1b2-3a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.d060b1b2-3a4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDA2MGIxYjItM2E0Zi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JnS054ow5iC52_l9REeGg-W1YYX7MbNcvsh95rvmLDs=)** I know we can beat the GOP on the issues. clean_body: Let me explain. I’ll get straight to the point, Peter — We’re 5 weeks out from our primary here in Louisiana, and we need all hands on deck to prepare for the tough fight ahead. The truth is: I don’t like asking for money. But after national Republicans dropped $1 million on an ad campaign smearing my record, it’s clear they mean business. They want to flip the governor’s seat and put Louisiana — one of the last Southern states with a Democratic governor — under MAGA control and drive our state into the dirt. I’ll admit it, they’re fighting hard to win this race. But that’s why we have to fight harder , because we can’t trust a GOP extremist with our future. = = = I know we can beat the GOP on the issues. In fact, they know it too — their frontrunner didn’t even show up to debate me because he knows we’ll run circles around his policies and expose him for the extremist he is. But that won’t stop GOP bosses from flooding our race with their out-of-state MAGA money, and it certainly won’t stop voters from seeing their bogus, truth-distorting ads on TV and social media. We need to fight back against the GOP’s false narrative, and I can’t do that without grassroots support from folks like you, Peter! = = = It’s our time, Louisiana. Let’s get after it and win this primary. Thank you, Shawn Wilson = = = | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: LA Times Poll: U.S. Senate race is close, but Adam is ahead!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| The latest Los Angeles Times poll of California’s U.S. Senate race shows that Adam is ahead, but this race is neck and neck:
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3795%2E5257348%2EvatcgD)
BREAKING NEWS, Derek —
**The latest _Los Angeles Times_ poll of California’s U.S. Senate race shows that Adam is ahead, but _this race is neck and neck:_**
Schiff: **20%**
Porter: **17%**
Lee: **7%**
Garvey: **7%**
Bradley: **7%**
Early: **5%**
**[Derek, roughly a third of voters surveyed said they were still undecided. Will you rush a $10 contribution to Adam’s campaign to help us speak to those voters ahead of this month’s critical FEC fundraising deadline?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=sep2023_abs_em.y9rZjs&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3795%2E5257348%2EvatcgD)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $3](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=sep2023_abs_em.IJi5iz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=3795%2E5257348%2EvatcgD)

| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=sep2023_abs_em.mBNd8z&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=3795%2E5257348%2EvatcgD)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=sep2023_abs_em.H56YJI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=3795%2E5257348%2EvatcgD)
---
This FEC deadline will be our campaign’s next big test, and with roughly a third of voters still undecided, it’s our most important yet.
**Since the last poll of this race, House Republicans passed a bogus censure of Adam under threat from Donald Trump.**
**You stood with Adam, and because of it he was able to respond by hitting the campaign trail to meet face-to-face with as many Californians as possible.**
It’s clear that Adam’s efforts — from standing up to Trump and his cronies to building a campaign to make the economy work for everyone — are resonating deeply within the Golden State.
But with numbers like these, it’s clear we still have work to do. **[That’s why we’re asking — will you chip in $10 or any amount to Adam’s campaign right now to help us communicate with undecided voters?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=sep2023_abs_em.y9rZjs&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=3795%2E5257348%2EvatcgD)**
Thanks for lending your support. Together, we will give the U.S. Senate the leadership that California and the American people deserve.
— Team Schiff

body:
The FIRST-IN-THE-NATION...
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGL2zAQhX-NfLORZxRZOfiQVORiWEopdNtLUKVxMsGSjS3X3X9fHLK9fu8xvI9xcRq4_2hFcxYAdw6LABB4EgCdOr-_6e5HZ8uvm1al1Qe17Sl8EQD5Y6L_1deViqLjYaeNLUIL3oD3BbW1PiowoBtZ3FsiaWpDqFBqJU3oTTCNA6qD6xtpmoJbkIDyKI-1kQoOlURljgp7c2hAAyqh5MapCmNyQ3jkeY1T5cdYDO0952l5TroIuCzk15mqjdNMYW_szP2h0kWa2bvyMXLKZb-mMDteON1KP8bIORMJuCQ_oJOqdtKDR4dG_xZ4WXO8Rgq8RoH25at3uIzr7Emg9Xx1L-ZdnBzfkkD76fSZjClTygJtLUHt9JoGDgLt-fTobu9_z9_fnvD5ErST-_Zr7U6Pn8XchmnjYeBFN0LJ2z5hl_sXAAD__yPZjF0)

Friend,
My next stop is Iowa – home of the First-In-The-Nation Caucus – to attend the Hawkeyes vs. Cyclones football game and watch one of the biggest sports rivalries in the nation.
_It’s going to be a great time!_
Speaking of rivalries, I want to give you an update on our own scoreboard in the Iowa Caucus, which really isn’t shaping up to be much of a competition at all.
One poll now shows us winning Iowa by **37 POINTS!**
But there’s another poll that I find even more interesting...
**_...A poll commissioned by our OPPONENT’s Super PAC shows that we gained an additional 4 POINTS over their candidate ever since the low-ratings GOP debate._**
Our support is so strong that a RINO Super PAC that skirts federal election laws can’t even spend millions of dollars to try and fudge the numbers to hide our lead.
But, even with our massive lead, I’m not taking anything for granted.
That’s why I’m in Iowa today to keep fighting to ensure we win the FIRST-IN-THE-NATION CAUCUS, lock up the Republican nomination, and turn 100% of our attention to winning back the White House.
Too much hangs in the balance to get complacent. I will NEVER stop fighting to save our country.

clean_body: The FIRST-IN-THE-NATION... | | | Friend, My next stop is Iowa – home of the First-In-The-Nation Caucus – to attend the Hawkeyes vs. Cyclones football game and watch one of the biggest sports rivalries in the nation. It’s going to be a great time! Speaking of rivalries, I want to give you an update on our own scoreboard in the Iowa Caucus, which really isn’t shaping up to be much of a competition at all. One poll now shows us winning Iowa by 37 POINTS! But there’s another poll that I find even more interesting... ...A poll commissioned by our OPPONENT’s Super PAC shows that we gained an additional 4 POINTS over their candidate ever since the low-ratings GOP debate. Our support is so strong that a RINO Super PAC that skirts federal election laws can’t even spend millions of dollars to try and fudge the numbers to hide our lead. But, even with our massive lead, I’m not taking anything for granted. That’s why I’m in Iowa today to keep fighting to ensure we win the FIRST-IN-THE-NATION CAUCUS, lock up the Republican nomination, and turn 100% of our attention to winning back the White House. Too much hangs in the balance to get complacent. I will NEVER stop fighting to save our country. (If you’re doing poorly right now due to the very corrupt people in charge of our country right now, just ignore the contribution request and simply enjoy my major polling update on our standing in the First-In-The-Nation Caucus!) | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: A huge step toward legalizing cannabis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
We saw great progress last week. Will you add your name to support cannabis legalization? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69474979/426267962/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDMxYzQzZS0zYjRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gVfqwFs5hi35RRnAHZY4-aIXh2-nE8YRc-7Jfi683eU=&emci=2831c43e-3b4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=4431c43e-3b4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=252045)
---
The Biden administration just recommended that the Drug Enforcement Administration reschedule cannabis under the _Controlled Substances Act_ , which would significantly ease federal cannabis restrictions. **We have already legalized cannabis in New Mexico, and this is a huge step toward legalizing cannabis in the United States. But we won’t win without a big grassroots movement, so I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll raise your voice with me:** **[If you agree that we should legalize cannabis on the federal level, will you add your name next to mine?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69474980/426267963/-1721238959?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDMxYzQzZS0zYjRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gVfqwFs5hi35RRnAHZY4-aIXh2-nE8YRc-7Jfi683eU=&emci=2831c43e-3b4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=4431c43e-3b4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=252045)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69474981/426267964/-1721238959?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDMxYzQzZS0zYjRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gVfqwFs5hi35RRnAHZY4-aIXh2-nE8YRc-7Jfi683eU=&emci=2831c43e-3b4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=4431c43e-3b4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=252045)
---
**The truth is that the draconian laws spurred by the War on Drugs have not strengthened our country or made us safer.**
Instead, people of color are arrested for cannabis possession at disproportionate rates. Families are separated, careers are ruined, and taxpayer money is wasted through incarceration. Entire communities and states are held back from economic growth.
Last week’s move from the Biden administration was an important step forward, but we can’t stop there. We need to legalize cannabis across the United States.
**[Please add your name next to mine if you agree>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69474982/426267965/-1721238959?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230909_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDMxYzQzZS0zYjRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gVfqwFs5hi35RRnAHZY4-aIXh2-nE8YRc-7Jfi683eU=&emci=2831c43e-3b4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=4431c43e-3b4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=252045)**

| | The GOP won’t stop at banning abortion. They’ve already gone further.

In Alabama, the Attorney General said that people who help women travel to seek an abortion can be prosecuted as criminals.

**You read that correctly – Alabama wants to send people to jail for driving a woman to a reproductive healthcare appointment across state lines.**

The GOP is telling us loud and clear what we already know: their extreme anti-abortion laws are intended to punish women and limit their rights.

[**_We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot across the country to stop the GOP’s extreme agenda. | | **_AMAZING UPDATE:_
Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand leads fight to certify the Equal Rights Amendment and enshrine reproductive rights in the Constitution**
