**Right now, she's counting on 75,000 Democrats to stand with her and add their names in support of the ERA _[before midnight tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69475126/426268469/-155894841?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4418-su-nd&refcode=jtk4418-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjRkYmQ2Ni0zYjRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fbmJS0vRTHDGfAc7UR3_pisa-HhIHbAmSL5nnR459CA=&emci=e0c9a2a0-554e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=ef4dbd66-3b4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=7659029)_

Friend, activists have been fighting _tooth and nail_ for over 100 years to add the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) to our Constitution — a landmark amendment that would ensure that our civil rights can't be taken away or infringed upon on the basis of gender.
But since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and denied half of the population the right to essential reproductive care, gender discrimination is now the law of the land — **and we can't afford to wait any longer for these vital protections.**
Thirty-eight states have already ratified the ERA, so we're closer than ever to enshrining it in our Constitution. But a single arbitrary deadline is keeping us from finally certifying this amendment!
**Luckily, Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has introduced legislation that would allow us to ignore this deadline — finally ratifying the ERA and enshrining gender equity in our Constitution.** But to get the job done, it's going to take bipartisan cooperation, filibuster reform and a _huge_ outpouring of grassroots support.
Right-wing extremists are doing everything they can to undermine Kirsten's work — **and she's depending on dedicated Democrats like you to stand with her.** **[Please, before midnight tonight, will you add your name to show Kirsten that you back the ERA? We need 75,000 signatures to show the GOP we aren't backing down.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69475129/426268472/-155894841?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4418-su-nd&refcode=jtk4418-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjRkYmQ2Ni0zYjRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fbmJS0vRTHDGfAc7UR3_pisa-HhIHbAmSL5nnR459CA=&emci=e0c9a2a0-554e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=ef4dbd66-3b4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=7659029)**

name: Jon Tester
subject: They can’t beat me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
I'll be honest, folks—
Fundraising is one of the worst parts of this job, but just a few moments from now I’ll have to ask you to make a donation.
Give me a chance to explain: I’m not asking this often because I like it. I do it because national Republicans and out-of-state super PACs are pledging to spend outrageous amounts of money to attack my character and the only chance we have to respond is by collecting grassroots donations from a whole lot of people.
Folks, my opponents will try to turn me into someone I'm not, because they can’t beat who I am.
I’m a third-generation farmer, the Senate’s only working dirt farmer, and I’ll never stop fighting for the hardworking people that call Montana home.
Since we officially launched my reelection campaign, tens of thousands of people all over the country have chipped in to support us. That’s something I’m proud of, and it means that I’ll have a fighting chance to stand up to the millions of dollars the GOP will spend against me.
But we can’t slow down, not even for a minute, because experts are already saying that this will be the most expensive election in Montana’s history.
So with all eyes on our race, I have to ask, can I count on you to make a split donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton right now to help us reach our goal in a few days? This is important. I need your help. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Thanks for everything you do for our campaign. We’ve built a great team in Montana that relies on grassroots donations to keep us in the fight. Your support really makes a huge difference. I hope you know that.
All my best,
Jon
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

That’s something I’m proud of, and it means that I’ll have a fighting chance to stand up to the millions of dollars the GOP will spend against me. But we can’t slow down, not even for a minute, because experts are already saying that this will be the most expensive election in Montana’s history. So with all eyes on our race, I have to ask, can I count on you to make a split donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton right now to help us reach our goal in a few days? This is important. I need your help. [] Donate [] Thanks for everything you do for our campaign. We’ve built a great team in Montana that relies on grassroots donations to keep us in the fight. Your support really makes a huge difference. I hope you know that. All my best, Jon [] Donate [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress Contributions to Seth Moulton For Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. An individual or federal PAC may contribute up to $2,900 per election; $5,800 per cycle. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal government contractors, and foreign nationals (non-citizens without “green cards”) are prohibited. Federal law requires our best efforts to obtain and report the name, address,occupation, and employer of individual contributors. Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

Peter, I know this past weekend was a time full of sales and barbeques and time with family and friends, but I want to take a moment to talk about the importance of working families and unions to our political process. Unions are about being in community and solidarity with other workers, fighting for the rights of the many rather than upholding the power of the few — and that’s exactly what inspired me to get into this race in the first place. **[Will you make a contribution to this campaign and help fight for more pro-worker representation in Congress? When I get to Washington, I’ll be a voice for the working people of the Rio Grande Valley, and with attacks on working families coming from all sides, that’s exactly what we We need someone who is going to go all-out to strengthen the position of unions and working families — and Monica De La Cruz has proven time and again that she does not represent working families in Congress.
In fact, Monica has co-sponsored national right-to-work legislation that undermines collective bargaining and takes away rights from working people. The real purpose of this kind of legislation is to shift the balance of power in favor of corporations and rig the system against working people.
Hard working South Texans deserve an economy that works for them, not only for the people at the top. Unions are a crucial part of protecting the interests of working people, and we need representatives in Congress who will protect the interests of working people everywhere.
**[Peter, I’ll never stop fighting for mi gente. But to get to Washington where I can fight to protect working people and unions, I need your support. clean_body: Solidarity forever. | | | Peter, I know this past weekend was a time full of sales and barbeques and time with family and friends, but I want to take a moment to talk about the importance of working families and unions to our political process. Unions are about being in community and solidarity with other workers, fighting for the rights of the many rather than upholding the power of the few — and that’s exactly what inspired me to get into this race in the first place. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll instantly process your contribution to Michelle Vallejo: | We need someone who is going to go all-out to strengthen the position of unions and working families — and Monica De La Cruz has proven time and again that she does not represent working families in Congress. In fact, Monica has co-sponsored national right-to-work legislation that undermines collective bargaining and takes away rights from working people. The real purpose of this kind of legislation is to shift the balance of power in favor of corporations and rig the system against working people. Hard working South Texans deserve an economy that works for them, not only for the people at the top. Unions are a crucial part of protecting the interests of working people, and we need representatives in Congress who will protect the interests of working people everywhere. ¡Vamos por Quince! Michelle Vallejo | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

**We rely on grassroots supporters like you, to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents.**

name: Sepi Shyne
subject: When I was five years old, my family and I fled the Iranian revolution.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Today, I'm running for Congress.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69481079/426272844/-1233768706?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=230909_ss_bio_resend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmEzZjM2OGUtNDE0Zi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nYdvBtPX63_KMEJ8tDVNt7nJxQn3QExjut2HBSMs1dg=)
---
Friend, When I was five years old, I fled the Iranian revolution with my family, carrying nothing more than a stuffed elephant. **Today, I'm running for Congress.** The fact that I'm here today is an American Dream realized, friend. It's a testament to the value of education, hard work, and determination. It's a testament to the sacrifices my parents made to build a better life for their children, and to the strength of the communities we find and the ones we create for ourselves. It wasn't always easy. When I arrived in the United States, I spoke no English. I was the only brown girl in my kindergarten class; I experienced harassment, prejudice, and outright discrimination. I was undocumented until I was 16 years old. **But these challenges helped make me the person I am today. They renewed my determination to build a better nation, where no one has to face the same barriers our family went through.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69481084/426272845/-1233768706?refcode=230909_ss_bio_img&refcode2=fa3f368e-414f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ms=230909_ss_bio_resend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmEzZjM2OGUtNDE0Zi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nYdvBtPX63_KMEJ8tDVNt7nJxQn3QExjut2HBSMs1dg=)** So I worked hard. I went to law school. I spent more than two decades fighting for civil rights, as co-president of the LGBT Bar Association of Los Angeles, as a board member of the Human Rights Campaign, and as a member of the City of West Hollywood's LGBTQ+ Advisory Board. Then, in 2020, we made history. I was elected to the West Hollywood City Council, becoming the first woman of color in history to hold that office, as well as the first openly-LGBTQ Iranian to hold public office in the world. Today, I have the honor of serving our City as Mayor. I go to work everyday, fighting to make sure everyone has the same opportunities to thrive, regardless of skin color, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, nationality, age, disability, or socioeconomic status. And with our civil liberties under unprecedented attack, that fight is more urgent now than ever. [**_I'm running for Congress to be a champion for all of us, friend, because I know what it's like to feel powerless. Will you join clean_body: Today, I'm running for Congress. | | = Friend, When I was five years old, I fled the Iranian revolution with my family, carrying nothing more than a stuffed elephant. Today, I'm running for Congress. The fact that I'm here today is an American Dream realized, friend. It's a testament to the value of education, hard work, and determination. It's a testament to the sacrifices my parents made to build a better life for their children, and to the strength of the communities we find and the ones we create for ourselves. It wasn't always easy. When I arrived in the United States, I spoke no English. I was the only brown girl in my kindergarten class; I experienced harassment, prejudice, and outright discrimination. I was undocumented until I was 16 years old. But these challenges helped make me the person I am today. They renewed my determination to build a better nation, where no one has to face the same barriers our family went through. = So I worked hard. I went to law school. I spent more than two decades fighting for civil rights, as co-president of the LGBT Bar Association of Los Angeles, as a board member of the Human Rights Campaign, and as a member of the City of West Hollywood's LGBTQ+ Advisory Board. Then, in 2020, we made history. I was elected to the West Hollywood City Council, becoming the first woman of color in history to hold that office, as well as the first openly-LGBTQ Iranian to hold public office in the world. Today, I have the honor of serving our City as Mayor. I go to work everyday, fighting to make sure everyone has the same opportunities to thrive, regardless of skin color, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, nationality, age, disability, or socioeconomic status. And with our civil liberties under unprecedented attack, that fight is more urgent now than ever. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = With gratitude, Mayor Sepi Shyne #WomanLifeFreedom | Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today. Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress? = = PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: Gale (via Working Families Party)
subject: What I learned at WFP’s Campaign Camp
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU53pyEPU4nY3RQ2SzSZ4-mqizttEsx6xT39b_gIxfq6wYY42XK3ayVJ6Je2SVq1R0gdPEu--6BGnlu1ViN0Woz4wYHyNZp3MDE2k5sWBpobHZu-pbIaDomx9KrWF24Wau9B29l3yEBUoNEdCBRxHTVLKc9kMM7OmrrQHLO5Z5VGGAm88iix9ANeTo7_RrUDjVqpgg5ggs46TeGONI0Xc6i1s5OGl9krAa2q320cyCVIok9p9e7XSVbS-M8ERLppLKH8yq9QqWcGGtwtSoNZL3U-ZCvLCiHNHCmvWKCJUaLtcd1trXVzBiaujvcx9_hZ5aq6ELkf_OtPyBHdU27Q_nkg/3zg/cuTwJCc3TnGtzqd32JoL-w/h0/jQPjuZ9GEVKx8sJ1Ewt3JVxwQgvaPRkw6YDGuTKfRt4)Hi Peter, My name is Gale, and I’m a retired public interest lawyer, Working Families Party member, and volunteer leader living in North Carolina. With three grown children and one grandchild, I want to build a better country for my family. So when the Working Families Party got involved in flipping two Senate seats in Georgia in January of 2021, I decided to go all in as a volunteer! **I’ve stayed with WFP because of what the party stands for — universal child care, affordable housing, a clean environment, and the ability for all working people to earn a living wage.** (And because I enjoy helping elect inspiring progressive candidates to office!) I’ve also stayed because of the respect and appreciation that the Working Families Party shows for its volunteers — including the opportunity to be involved as much or as little as we want. WFP offers great training and education for volunteers at every step. **In June of 2022, I enrolled in WFP’s Campaign Camp — a series of free online trainings designed to provide supporters, volunteers, and campaign staff with the tools they need to win elections and continue fighting for the working class.** At Campaign Camp, I learned about so many behind-the-scenes details that I never knew, and I had a great time meeting other people in our WFP community. So this year, I decided to return as a volunteer Camp Counselor, to be able to experience it again, learn more, and to help put on another successful event! During my time at Campaign Camp, my fellow campers and I learned about topics like fundraising, communications tactics, voter contact, and so much more from experienced activists, organizers, and campaigners. Camp is open to anyone interested in learning about running a campaign. This includes organizers, activists, experienced candidates, and people considering a run for office. We even know of some participants who decided to run for office after attending! Programs like WFP’s Campaign Camp are so valuable because they help train and grow grassroots leaders throughout the country who are fighting for what our communities need — and gets us closer to achieving our dream of building a multiracial populist movement. To date, more than 1,000 activists have attended a Campaign Camp training, with a majority of campers identifying as poor or working class and 42% of campers identifying as a person of color. **[If you want to make sure we can keep growing our grassroots movement through these training sessions, will you make a donation to the Working Families Party today?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU53pyEPU4nY3RQ2SzSZ4-mqizttEsx6xT39b_gIxfq6wYY42XK3ayVJ6Je2SVq1R0DU1l98Yihhi2-4diDWQWA_jagngxGzcgdnyxX-swLOo0vbAjdvg9a30pv_ANJhtJxaV5Odnd9JbzbhTypmvJkf8CZRFMYclYmvYQ8IJHLdbqQIy-eBOHn1I61vXhfOwwF5hlEbRANTDyEhhVXchBL6eskhcA2iK2K6gZGyQ2-nd9AIdENuOpZM5-zOf_riq4vxi3a9SjUxHa1YGcG4LP3VHx2UWCOYr1EA6ISvF-OsnKXsNBIV9KNoUVcOGMXRH_ZSBG6BeFplJGPJYRop4RDA/3zg/cuTwJCc3TnGtzqd32JoL-w/h1/61iUswxzzt39ZGD-T4itl34JUQXhcW2aLCDF1gBlBU8)** Your contribution will support future trainings like Campaign Camp so we can continue to elect more progressive candidates to office and build a country where working families can thrive, not just survive. **[Donate »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU53pyEPU4nY3RQ2SzSZ4-mqizttEsx6xT39b_gIxfq6wYY42XK3ayVJ6Je2SVq1R0ob7-Spwik7KTx-hPvJP9fFSXi8XCoi-u5cJyGTmVGEdZ9wmGZ3ydgFBI3v_T0Duwj_nOo-RFVqWecHjX2mGtTuyX4wZPjg9Nm1MSNY1aTUuQP-Oke9naigE2xE6YZNORtUNfvWW_smZCrxVL2N1Lg53ahvfbptM2HqmE5H6uIoEEWgKoaKFOFyGF_WwUMWQIVQrk2qMdWuBW_xhWvZh9H_h1Oogb741UZb7LtzvPkgCiR88CQuvBiugHXev5T4zsbJp2DtfKtwWi1MJOuJTnHw/3zg/cuTwJCc3TnGtzqd32JoL-w/h2/QTecwqltZ6-bbid6n33L50hMbIgOnIdHgOU3t4RYj0E)** In solidarity, Gale Collins

clean_body: | | | Peter, My name is Gale, and I’m a retired public interest lawyer, Working Families Party member, and volunteer leader living in North Carolina. With three grown children and one grandchild, I want to build a better country for my family. So when the Working Families Party got involved in flipping two Senate seats in Georgia in January of 2021, I decided to go all in as a volunteer! I’ve stayed with WFP because of what the party stands for — universal child care, affordable housing, a clean environment, and the ability for all working people to earn a living wage. (And because I enjoy helping elect inspiring progressive candidates to office!) I’ve also stayed because of the respect and appreciation that the Working Families Party shows for its volunteers — including the opportunity to be involved as much or as little as we want. WFP offers great training and education for volunteers at every step. In June of 2022, I enrolled in WFP’s Campaign Camp — a series of free online trainings designed to provide supporters, volunteers, and campaign staff with the tools they need to win elections and continue fighting for the working class. At Campaign Camp, I learned about so many behind-the-scenes details that I never knew, and I had a great time meeting other people in our WFP community. So this year, I decided to return as a volunteer Camp Counselor, to be able to experience it again, learn more, and to help put on another successful event! During my time at Campaign Camp, my fellow campers and I learned about topics like fundraising, communications tactics, voter contact, and so much more from experienced activists, organizers, and campaigners. Camp is open to anyone interested in learning about running a campaign. This includes organizers, activists, experienced candidates, and people considering a run for office. We even know of some participants who decided to run for office after attending! Programs like WFP’s Campaign Camp are so valuable because they help train and grow grassroots leaders throughout the country who are fighting for what our communities need — and gets us closer to achieving our dream of building a multiracial populist movement. To date, more than 1,000 activists have attended a Campaign Camp training, with a majority of campers identifying as poor or working class and 42% of campers identifying as a person of color. Your contribution will support future trainings like Campaign Camp so we can continue to elect more progressive candidates to office and build a country where working families can thrive, not just survive. In solidarity, Gale Collins Campaign Camp Counselor Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . Your feedback today will help guide our work in the weeks and months ahead, and here’s why:
As Governor, Gretchen works every day to deliver for Michiganders. But as you know, this isn’t something she can do alone. We need your voice to make sure your priorities are at the center of our work.
From passing the _Reproductive Health Act_ to enacting a 100% clean energy standard to safeguarding next year’s elections, we’ve got a lot of important fights ahead of us.
It’s important for us to know what issues matter most to you and your family right now so we can best fight for you.
**That’s why we’re asking for your input directly. Your thoughts, ideas, and opinions matter. They inform and influence the decisions we make every single day:**
**[Can you take a minute (or two, tops!) to complete our Official September Priorities Survey? name: Mark Warner
subject: My recess recap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
running all around the Commonwealth

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69483436/426276695/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTU2OTI0MS00ODRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eA7Jj6Ck6_ApOJK9JznwILo5PM4qE5HzxRlR1-qFW7Q=&emci=64957131-934e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=e1569241-484f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, I just wrapped up an August work period where I traveled all across Virginia. Sometimes called the “August Recess,” it’s a critical time for me to look ahead to the Senate’s final months in session and hear from Virginians about what they want Congress to work on. My team and I made our way all the way from Northern Virginia, to Big Stone Gap, to Danville and back. I spent the time hearing from local business owners, manufacturers, farmers, elected officials, and even a high school basketball team. We talked about our legislative priorities for the session, including broadband, affordable housing, green job creation, the upcoming elections in Virginia, and more. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69483437/426276696/-595410123?refcode=mw_em_230909_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTU2OTI0MS00ODRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eA7Jj6Ck6_ApOJK9JznwILo5PM4qE5HzxRlR1-qFW7Q=) There’s nothing I love more than talking to Virginians to hear about the things they want to see me address in Washington – my next steps are guided by your input – so these conversations are a crucial piece of the puzzle. **That’s why I want to make sure you saw my survey I sent late last week, asking for you to share with me what you envision for the path ahead.** _****[If you haven’t had a chance to share your top priorities with me for this next session of Congress, I’d really appreciate it if you took just a few minutes to let me know now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69483438/426276697/1179159458?refcode=mw_em_230909_1&ms=mw_em_230909_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTU2OTI0MS00ODRmLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eA7Jj6Ck6_ApOJK9JznwILo5PM4qE5HzxRlR1-qFW7Q=&emci=64957131-934e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=e1569241-484f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=4568237)****_ Thank you for joining me on the road last month. I’m looking forward to making more progress on the things that matter most to you. \- Mark Warner
P.S. And by the way, do you want to know what I **never** heard in all my stops throughout Virginia? “I want the government to shut down.” I’m going to keep fighting to keep our government running and avoid another Republican shutdown debacle.

* * *
---
|
---
| Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States

name: Indiana Dems
subject: Ready
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, In just two weeks, the first absentee ballots for the November local elections will be sent out. Our candidates in cities and towns, large and small, are getting ready by talking to voters and spreading their messages. name: Bob Casey
subject: Hoodies vs. suits
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=604%2E552475%2Ei1yyDW)
Hey Peter,
You may have noticed by now that my friend and fellow Pennsylvania Senator John Fetterman and I have different tastes in style.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230909-1?refcode=em20230909-1&refcode2=604_552475_i1yyDW&akid=604%2E552475%2Ei1yyDW)
_As long as I've got my suit and tie...and John's got his hoodie and shorts..._
It's true, PA's dynamic Senator duo is split between #TeamSuits and #TeamHoodies.
What we do have in common is much more important: **our determination to fight for the hardworking people of Pennsylvania.**
Something else we have in common is, just like how they came after John last year, national Republicans are coming after me -- so we need your help today.
John and I are teaming up to make sure we can **_outfit_** our campaign with a “Hoodies + Suits” fundraising drive, and we're setting a goal to raise $50,000 before the end of September. We're even embracing our style differences and hosting a “Hoodies + Suits” event this week, and we're hoping to make a big dent towards our fundraising goal before the event begins.
**[Will you chip in to help us reach our goal? Every dollar you give will help defend our Senate majority and keep me fighting hard for working families in Washington.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230909-1?refcode=em20230909-1&refcode2=604_552475_i1yyDW&akid=604%2E552475%2Ei1yyDW)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230909-1?refcode=em20230909-1&refcode2=604_552475_i1yyDW&akid=604%2E552475%2Ei1yyDW)**
Thank you, Peter. Your support means even more than this time I got John to join me on #TeamSuits.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230909-1?refcode=em20230909-1&refcode2=604_552475_i1yyDW&akid=604%2E552475%2Ei1yyDW)
With gratitude,
Bob

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=604%2E552475%2Ei1yyDW)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=604%2E552475%2Ei1yyDW)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

clean_body: Trump’s false promises| | | | | Another day, another unfulfilled promise from Donald J. Trump, Folks. If I had a dollar for every time Trump failed to deliver, I’d have enough dollars to build the border wall. We need it too because, despite Trump’s promises to make Mexico pay for the border wall, we haven’t seen a single peso from Mexico. We’ve had unused border wall materials sitting around and being wasted since Trump’s presidency – and Joe Biden is only continuing Trump’s legacy of dropping the ball. It’s time to build the wall, secure our border, and stop the criminals, human traffickers, and cartels who are taking advantage of our weak leaders. Thank you, Chris Christie | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---

body:
Let's Wake Them Up!
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f8OfxUwV-/c?w=e-tiG4VAxkbJ4mRk_gcUzMuLOUsLsW5IuDWBI_pE7_k.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvL2Y4T2Z4VXdWLT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImIxMzVmZDQ2LTk5MmEtNDI4Yi1hOWMwLTJmMDRkOTgwNTVjZSJ9)_**

| | |
---
| | Calling All ParentsSept 17: 1-4pmWatsonville6 Speakers / FREE Event
---
| |
---
| | If you live in California, your children are in danger. Don't take my word for it, look at the legislation that is passing: [AB665](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f8OfxUwV-/c?w=MZ0m0oVHtSgD8PPgMkfckJsb7PHpYEAbdQurvZGNOO0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sZWdpbmZvLmxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmNhLmdvdi9mYWNlcy9iaWxsTmF2Q2xpZW50LnhodG1sP2JpbGxfaWQ9MjAyMzIwMjQwQUI2NjUiLCJyIjoiOWY0ZTAxNzMtNTNkZi00Mzc5LTA1YmYtNjEyYjJiOTZmYTI5IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiYjEzNWZkNDYtOTkyYS00MjhiLWE5YzAtMmYwNGQ5ODA1NWNlIn0) That's just ONE bill. There are numerous others that penalize a parent for not affirming their child's preferred gender identity pronoun, if you're a foster parent same deal... And if you thought your child was safe because they are home schooled, that is not accurate. Simply living in California will allow you child, as of 12 years old, to be removed from your home at their request, and placed in a state run facility. We are hosting a venue at a beautiful location in Watsonville- Speakers: Erin Friday, Tracy Henderson, Carina Powers, Anthony Cabasa, Max Bonilla, and Jennifer Grinager. We are asking you to bring your friends who are still not fully aware of what's going on. Free event, free food, non-partisan. RSVP for exact address: 831-531-6714 or CallingAllParents@proton.meLet's keep waking people up! Their children's lives depend on it.God Bless!Dalila

body:
| | | Peter, The United States of America is the Greatest Nation in the World. We have come out on top of world wars, economic disasters, pandemics, and countless other troubling trials.

And now, we are being invaded at our southern border, and Joe Biden and Kamala Harris seem unbothered.

Violent criminals and drugs are flowing across our border EVERY DAY. Great things are worth protecting and our southern border is the front line of protecting our kids from these harmful drugs and criminals.

**Republicans want to build the wall and SECURE our border. But we can’t do that if we don’t WIN in 2024.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Todd=20Watson=2C=20NEGOP=20Political=20Director?=
subject: Biden enjoys 2 Labor Days every week 👎🏻
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
But he needs a ‘break’ before visiting the ecological disaster in East Palestine, Ohio | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12649716?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=9cfd8bc1dd&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Joe Biden is living the life we all dream of, a Labor Day that isn’t just one day in the year but two days of every work week!

Yet the Commander-in-Chief says he hasn’t visited the disaster in East Palestine, Ohio the last six months _because he hasn’t had enough of a break to fit it in yet. _

When he is ‘back on the job’ the Big Guy is shelling out billions of U.S. taxpayer dollars to Ukraine, helping illegals cross the southern border and weaponizing federal agencies to go after any American who highlights his family’s ‘business dealings’.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=eb14ef46ec&e=25844e23a8)
---
| Americans continually have to take a number and stand in line when it comes to having a U.S. President who has their concerns front and center.

**As Nebraskans and proud Republicans,** it is our duty to ensure that our state remains strong and resilient. We must rally at the local level so to grow our _county parties_ so they can support proven Constitutional and Platform Republicans, who will be there to fight on behalf of We The People.

Your support for the Republican Party of Nebraska is crucial in these challenging times.

**Your contribution will go directly towards building the infrastructure of the state and county parties and furthering our principles that will safeguard our state's future.**

**Let us stand united and show the nation that Nebraskans are committed to putting America first. **
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TODAY »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=5248824942&e=25844e23a8 "CONTRIBUTE TODAY »")
---
| For America,

Todd Watson - Political Director
Republican Party of Nebraska

Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | Here’s where you can watch >> Did you hear, Friend? Senator Cassidy will be on Meet the Press with Chuck Todd tomorrow! It’s shaping up to be a great discussion, so if you’re available, we hope you can tune in. As always, thank you for your continued support. Have a great weekend! –Team Cassidy | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild. | Bill is working for all of Louisiana | DONATE BY MAIL Bill Cassidy for US Senate PO BOX 80505 Baton Rouge, LA 70898 Can’t donate? Don’t worry - There are other ways you can help! | Media Alert (via Team Cassidy) PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898 = \- =

| Hi, it’s Jane Fonda.

My team at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and I recently held our annual retreat, and I wanted to share some things with you. We had an incredibly successful first year, thanks to your overwhelming support, and now, we’re planning to take things up a few notches as we approach this year’s November elections and scale up for 2024!

**And here are some exciting details I wanted to share with you first:** **🚪 **We’ll be launching a neighbor-to-neighbor field organizing program to help take the fight against Big Oil door-to-door in key districts and elect climate champions down the ballot.

**📋 **We'll hire more staff and recruit more volunteers to help us knock on doors, make phone calls, and get out the vote for our climate champions.

**🚫 **We'll do everything we can to prevent Big Oil from drilling near schools, homes, and communities in my home state of California. _**This is an ambitious plan,** **and we cannot do this without your support.**_ You are an essential member of our movement as we fight to secure a livable future and we need you on our side to make the impact we need.

clean_body: You are an essential member of our movement as we fight to secure a livable future. | | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. My team at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and I recently held our annual retreat, and I wanted to share some things with you. We had an incredibly successful first year, thanks to your overwhelming support, and now, we’re planning to take things up a few notches as we approach this year’s November elections and scale up for 2024! And here are some exciting details I wanted to share with you first: 🚪 We’ll be launching a neighbor-to-neighbor field organizing program to help take the fight against Big Oil door-to-door in key districts and elect climate champions down the ballot. 📋 We'll hire more staff and recruit more volunteers to help us knock on doors, make phone calls, and get out the vote for our climate champions. 🚫 We'll do everything we can to prevent Big Oil from drilling near schools, homes, and communities in my home state of California. This is an ambitious plan, and we cannot do this without your support. You are an essential member of our movement as we fight to secure a livable future and we need you on our side to make the impact we need. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s fight like hell together, Jane Fonda = | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. body:
We cannot continue to let individuals with little respect for our military, national security, and institutions endanger our servicemembers.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69484230/426279628/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230909-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWUzODAxOGUtNTM0Zi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j-KVU8U6Zm4woHvNOXJ7BUn2RRCVB0Zc7nz6s_EENzA=)
---
| Peter,

_**I have spent my entire career in service to our country.**_ I respect the institutions that protect us, and I will do whatever it takes to protect our servicemembers. Unfortunately, Senator Tuberville has blocked more than 300 military confirmations, threatening our military readiness for a political stunt. _**Even worse, he doesn’t care about his actions' repercussions.**_
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69484231/426279629/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230909-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWUzODAxOGUtNTM0Zi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j-KVU8U6Zm4woHvNOXJ7BUn2RRCVB0Zc7nz6s_EENzA=)
_**We cannot continue to let individuals with little respect for our military, national security, and institutions endanger our servicemembers.**_ We need leaders who want to protect our national interests, not jeopardize them. We need accountability.

So long as I am serving, I will advocate for policies that strengthen our national security and military readiness. I respect the institutions that protect us, and I will do whatever it takes to protect our servicemembers. Unfortunately, Senator Tuberville has blocked more than 300 military confirmations, threatening our military readiness for a political stunt. Even worse, he doesn’t care about his actions' repercussions. = We cannot continue to let individuals with little respect for our military, national security, and institutions endanger our servicemembers. We need leaders who want to protect our national interests, not jeopardize them. We need accountability. Friend,
People always say it's an incredibly fun and surreal experience when they finally get to meet President Trump.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Sign The Petition: Stop the bloody massacre of innocent bears and cubs
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1975939?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | A series of loud, consecutive bangs. Rapid-fire lead bullets ripping and piercing through the fur and skin of an innocent mama bear who left the den to find food for her babies. She yelps and wails in agony before eventually thumping dead to the ground. The blood puddles around her deceased corpse, covering the forest floor red. Hiding in the distance, baby cubs are watching and trembling in fear, whimpering helplessly while looking in horror at their mama’s mangled and disfigured carcass. _**How will these fragile baby bear cubs survive now that mama bear has been brutally shot to death by ruthless trophy hunters?**_ Friend, this gruesome scene could be happening right now while you’re reading this email. Trophy hunters are violently massacring harmless mama bears and leaving their orphaned cubs to **die of starvation or hypothermia** , often even **targeting and killing** the harmless cubs themselves. _And in some U.S. states, this barbaric trophy hunting of precious grizzly bears is COMPLETELY LEGAL._ What’s worse is that extremist politicians, in bed with Big Polluters and the hunting lobby, are actively trying to **STRIP AWAY** the remaining Endangered Species Act (ESA) protections that these poor animals have left. Without these critical safeguards to protect grizzly bears from callous trophy hunters, this beloved species could soon be _**WIPED OUT**_ forever. [**Helpless bear cubs are counting on you to defend them today, Friend. Won’t you do something while there’s still time left to SAVE grizzly bears from EXTINCTION? Take action now to fight back >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1975940?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1975941?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Even though grizzly bears are protected within Yellowstone, the states bordering the park lack the necessary _life-saving protections_ that grizzlies need to defend them against merciless trophy hunters. These innocent animals don’t understand state boundaries, so as soon as they set even a single paw across the line, they are **fair game to be brutally slaughtered.**
Ever since 2016 when ESA protections for grizzlies were rolled back, it's been legal to blow up sleeping bear cubs in their dens, among other inhumane and cruel hunting methods. Now, lawmakers in these states are continuing to push their anti-bear agenda aggressively, attempting to give trophy hunters __**a license to indiscriminately KILL**__ one of North America’s most treasured mammals.
If we’re going to STOP the senseless killing of precious grizzlies and bear cubs, we need the U.S. Fish & Wildlife Service (FWS) to step up with bold federal action. It is the agency’s duty to protect vulnerable keystone species like grizzly bears, but FWS hasn’t responded to our demands for action yet, and time is quickly running out to save these defenseless animals from brutal trophy hunters. That’s why we’re upping the public pressure by calling on _**3,814 more activists**_ like you to sign our urgent petition by _**11:59 P.M. TONIGHT.**_ [**Voiceless bear cubs desperately need ALL of us to speak up and fight for them, Friend. Please don’t let them down. Add your name right now >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1975942?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1975943?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for speaking up in defense of bears,
Friends of the Earth **
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---

[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D257851&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)

Peter, Rick Scott has _got to go_ — and this is Democrats’ BEST opportunity to show him the door.

**Experts at _CNN_ and _FiveThirtyEight_ are saying Rick Scott is one of the MOST VULNERABLE senators up for reelection next year. And even better, they’re predicting that if we defeat him, Democrats are all but _guaranteed_ to defend the Senate!**

**Now, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell has officially launched her campaign to flip Florida BLUE. And polling puts her ONE POINT AHEAD in a head-to-head matchup with Rick Scott.**

But last time around, Scott spent $64 million of his own fortune to buy Florida’s Senate seat by a mere 10,033 votes. Democrats can FLIP this seat, but only with a grassroots movement strong enough to compete with Scott’s multi-million dollar war chest. Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will fight for democracy, our economy, and the basic civil rights that extremists like Scott are constantly attacking. Experts at CNN and FiveThirtyEight are saying Rick Scott is one of the MOST VULNERABLE senators up for reelection next year. And even better, they’re predicting that if we defeat him, Democrats are all but guaranteed to defend the Senate! Now, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell has officially launched her campaign to flip Florida BLUE. And polling puts her ONE POINT AHEAD in a head-to-head matchup with Rick Scott. But last time around, Scott spent $64 million of his own fortune to buy Florida’s Senate seat by a mere 10,033 votes. Democrats can FLIP this seat, but only with a grassroots movement strong enough to compete with Scott’s multi-million dollar war chest. = | = Rick Scott has spent his time in Washington trying to DESTROY Medicare and Social Security, working to raise taxes on working families, and advocating for a nationwide abortion ban. He’s so extreme that even Mitch McConnell has condemned Scott’s dangerous agenda. Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will fight for democracy, our economy, and the basic civil rights that extremists like Scott are constantly attacking. She’ll fight to stop gun violence, just as she has through her work with Gabby Giffords. And she’ll fight to pave the way for a brighter future for families everywhere. With Rick Scott more unpopular than ever, it’s clear that Floridians are ready to send him into retirement. Debbie is our best hope to flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate. name: Katie Porter
subject: Junk fees cost every Americans an average of $1,000 per year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=29541%2E3422442%2EKydJZA)
_What could you do with an extra $1,000 per year?_
**I’ll leave it to you to figure it out—but that’s the average each American spends annually on junk fees.**
Junk fees are deceptive charges meant to confuse or hide the full price from customers. They range from bank overdraft fees to resort fees at hotels, extra charges at restaurants or fees to pay a bill.
As a consumer protection attorney, I’ve been excited that the Biden Administration is finally cracking down on big corporations that use junk fees to line CEO pockets. They’re pushing Wall Street to lower overdraft and credit card fees, cracking down on deceptive internet prices, and holding airlines accountable for price transparency and banning fees for parents to sit with their child.
[**What junk fees have you come across in your life? Click here to let me know.**](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp-email-20230909-junk-fees/?source=EMAL09_2_FEE_20230909_V1_F&t=2&akid=29541%2E3422442%2EKydJZA)
[What junk fees have you seen?](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp-email-20230909-junk-fees/?source=EMAL09_2_FEE_20230909_V1_F&t=3&akid=29541%2E3422442%2EKydJZA)
There’s still more to do, and I’m excited to partner with the President to keep holding corporations accountable and keeping more money in the pockets of Americans. **Standing up to corruption will be one of my number one priorities in the Senate.**
Thanks so much for being a part of Team Porter.
Katie
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230909-2?refcode=EMAL09_2_FEE_20230909_V1_F&refcode2=29541_3422442_KydJZA&akid=29541%2E3422442%2EKydJZA)

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAL09_2_FEE_20230909_V1_F&t=4&refcode2=29541_3422442_KydJZA&akid=29541%2E3422442%2EKydJZA)**

And now, the final leg of our campaign is starting. We need all paws on deck to reach out to voters to elect one of my favorite humans, Brandon Presley, to the governor’s mansion. Can you throw us a bone and chip in $25 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69485069/426282436/974620941?amount=25&refcode=ea.5af3c036-5b4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.5af3c036-5b4f-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWFmM2MwMzYtNWI0Zi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P07gFCSa9wA7JESPoRSOFAFNsMgE-cXoykicxf6FheQ=) Here’s the deal: Tate Reeves (grr) is leading a dog-eat-dog race and spending big to howl lies about Brandon on the TV and over the internet. Everyone on Team Presley is working like a dog to share Brandon’s message and bury Tate’s lies — they barely have any time to focus on their main job of giving me belly rubs. The good news is the plan to get Brandon to the governor’s mansion (and its huge lawn) relies on taking me to every corner of Mississippi — and then persuading, mobilizing and helping voters cast their ballots for Brandon Presley. **But we can’t paw-ccomplish any of that without you, Peter.** [Everything that you contribute — $25 (or a dog treat for me) — goes directly toward putting Tate Reeves in the doghouse. clean_body: Our team needs all paws on deck! | = Hi Peter, It’s Harper — Brandon Presley’s (un)official campaign dog. I have a busy day of chasing squirrels and napping when I’m not working in the campaign offices so I’ll keep it quick. = = Here’s the deal: Tate Reeves (grr) is leading a dog-eat-dog race and spending big to howl lies about Brandon on the TV and over the internet. Everyone on Team Presley is working like a dog to share Brandon’s message and bury Tate’s lies — they barely have any time to focus on their main job of giving me belly rubs. The good news is the plan to get Brandon to the governor’s mansion (and its huge lawn) relies on taking me to every corner of Mississippi — and then persuading, mobilizing and helping voters cast their ballots for Brandon Presley. But we can’t paw-ccomplish any of that without you, Peter. = | = Woof woof, Harper 🐾 | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. | _**Having a ruff day? Looking for a dog-gone good time?**_

We can paws-itively help!

Come to our September meeting this Tuesday, September 12th. Unfortunately, there are no puppies at the meeting, but we will certainly have a fun night as fellow Republican women and supporters, fur real.

Sign up now!

---
|
# **_REMINDER_
SEPTEMBER MONTHLY MEETING**
**Tuesday, September 12th, 2023
5:30 PM - 8:00 PM
Red Rock Country Club**
The Active Republican Women of Las Vegas (ARW) invites you to the September monthly meeting. We are off to a fresh start with all new leadership, but we maintain the same passion and commitment that has allowed ARW to be the longest standing Republican Women's Club in Las Vegas (since 1970!).

Who is speaking? We are, and we hope you will, too! We are calling this first meeting our "Town Hall" meeting because we want to hear from you: our members and supporters! We have an exciting lineup of speakers starting with our October meeting, but this meeting is about ARW, its mission, and our vision going forward.

Get your ticket now, as there are _**only 50 spots**_ available!
---

body:
To state the obvious, the wealthy and well-connected contribute so much to Kyrsten Sinema because she uses her power and privilege of her office to protect them.
#

Peter -
To state the obvious, the wealthy and well-connected contribute so much to Kyrsten Sinema because she uses the power and privilege of her office to protect them.
This is how she raises her millions.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230909-2-asp&t=1&akid=1167%2E734936%2EzsiC1t)
If that doesn’t make you furious — if Kyrsten Sinema selling her voters down the river so she can raise millions of dollars doesn’t burn you up — I don’t know what to tell you.
We get just about every single dollar we raise from emails like this one, from people like you.
I'm proud to be running a people-powered campaign.
Now, you don’t have to contribute to every email we send. That would be ridiculous. But we need to defeat Senator Sinema and her private equity backers, and ahead of our FEC deadline at the end of the month, we’ve fallen behind.
So we’re hoping you can chip in to this one.
[**Please contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford today to help us hit our goal and post a big number with the FEC at the end of this month. Hello,
Lauren Boebert is everything that’s wrong with Washington: Extremism. Dysfunction. Self-interest. She’s the epitome of the angertainment industry.
**Last year, Adam Frisch nearly defeated Boebert. After a recount, Adam lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes in what was the closest race in the entire country.**
Adam could have won. He _should have_ won. But the simple truth is that Adam was out-spent by Boebert and her Super PACs by millions and millions of dollars.
Now, Adam is running again, and a brand-new poll shows Adam LEADING Boebert: 50% to 48%.
Lauren Boebert and her Washington allies are already attacking Adam and trying to smear him with lies. **We’ve set a goal to raise another $45,000 for Adam’s campaign, but the only way we’ll be able to go up against their millions and hold Boebert accountable is if grassroots donors like you give now:**
[**Adam’s not taking any money from corporate PACs, so we have nowhere else to turn. name: Kirsten
subject: a red wave in New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69485572/426284213/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230909_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjk1ZTA1MDctNWY0Zi1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JntpzwP-4hjEjwg_-FyyuTuGWIoQ_htjemxX32Suqgc=)
---
Peter, if you care about any of the issues that Democrats are fighting for, then you need to care about New York. The truth is, my state was just hit by a red wave – one strong enough to help hand control of the House to Kevin McCarthy. Last year, Republicans here had their best election in _decades_ , flipping four congressional seats red and coming within striking distance of the governor's mansion. **Now, they're targeting my seat for defeat and gearing up to expand on their gains last year. Rep. Elise Stefanik, one of Trump's most loyal supporters, just announced a brand-new battleground fund dedicated to reelecting New York Republicans like George Santos and flipping even more seats red.** If Democrats want to defend our Senate majority or retake the House, we _must_ win in New York. And as the only statewide Democrat at the top of the ticket next year, I'm working overtime to make sure that happens. **But with GOP money pouring in already, I need your help.** [_**Please, will you split $10 or more between my campaign and HER Time to invest in this must-win state? clean_body: | = Peter, if you care about any of the issues that Democrats are fighting for, then you need to care about New York. The truth is, my state was just hit by a red wave – one strong enough to help hand control of the House to Kevin McCarthy. Last year, Republicans here had their best election in decades , flipping four congressional seats red and coming within striking distance of the governor's mansion. Now, they're targeting my seat for defeat and gearing up to expand on their gains last year. Rep. If Democrats want to defend our Senate majority or retake the House, we must win in New York. name: CaucusRoom
subject: ☀️ CaucusRoom Weekend Edition
body:
What you missed this week. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-ajyoe-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### **Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared.**
* **[Cars are bad](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-y/)** and racist.
* **[Biden doesn't have time](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-j/)** to visit East Palestine.
* Ukraine **[wants US to pay](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-t/)** for their election.
* **[What's going on](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-i/)** in Wyoming?
* Biden is **[homeless](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-d/).**
* These Neo**-[Nazis LOVE Joe](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-h/).**
* Kamala is**[ready to step in](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-b/).**
* This Texas city **[doesn't want you to call 911](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-n/).**
* Is this really**[against the law](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-p/)?**
* Poll**:[Which group are you in](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-x/)?**
* Biden is**[breaking the law](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-m/).**
* Another**[company to boycott](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-c/).**
* Democrats are**[freaking out](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-q/) **about polls.

### **Say It Isn't So**
Nancy **[Pelosi will seek a 20th term](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-a/)** in the House of Representatives. The Babylon Bee wrote about this **[turn of events](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-f/).**
### **Sorry, Texas**
The Biden administration is**[considering forcing migrants who cross into the United States illegally to remain in Texas](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-z/) **while they wait out their asylum screening. Gov. Abbott has **[responded with his plan](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-v/)**. **Will They Vote Yes?** Rep. Comer suggests that **[Democrats secretly want the GOP](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-e/)** to impeach Biden. 😆 [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-s/) 😆 [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajyoe-trhiujldw-w/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
1100 Johnson Rd #18546Golden, CO 80402 You are receiving this email because you are a member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-ajyoe-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-yh) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-u-ajyoe-trhiujldw-yk/)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I’d like your feedback: What issues do you want Democrats to fight for?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
The next few weeks are going to be busy in Washington, and Congress has plenty of urgent matters on the to-do list.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=53%2E4032634%2EW6GBLW)
---
The next few weeks are going to be busy in Washington, and Congress has plenty of urgent matters on the to-do list. That includes preventing a government shutdown at the end of the month. And keeping millions of families from losing their child care. And passing disaster relief funding along with aid for Ukraine. All those fights would be a whole lot more straightforward if MAGA Republicans weren’t running the House of Representatives. They’re willing to drag their feet and make unrealistic demands in order to cause a shutdown, harming the economy and American citizens for political gain. We’re working on a bipartisan basis in the Senate to pass this spending bill, and I’m going to do everything in my power to urge the House to do the same. And at the same time, I’m pushing for the real, systemic changes we need as a nation. **[So as Congress discusses what to prioritize in this spending bill and beyond, I want to hear from you: What are the top issues you want Democrats to fight for? Please fill out this quick two-minute survey to let me know.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-ak-em-issues-survey/?source=EMZ16O_SUR_E_20230909_V1S1_AK_F19&t=8&akid=53%2E4032634%2EW6GBLW)** | [**TAKE SURVEY**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-ak-em-issues-survey/?source=EMZ16O_SUR_E_20230909_V1S1_AK_F19&t=9&akid=53%2E4032634%2EW6GBLW)
---
Your voice is front and center in our movement. With each response we get to surveys like this one, my team and I can better know what the members of this grassroots team want me to focus on.
I don’t work for powerful interests and giant corporations that can buy themselves the biggest megaphones — I work for working people who need a government that’s on their side.
Whether it’s getting an idea from someone in a selfie line or being inspired by an answer to a survey like this one, I always appreciate getting to hear from people who don’t always get heard in Washington.
I’m fired up to continue making big, structural change. And I’m grateful to have your feedback as we take on this fight together.
**[What are you most determined to keep fighting for? Click here to submit a response and send me your thoughts.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/wfs-ak-em-issues-survey/?source=EMZ16O_SUR_E_20230909_V1S1_AK_F19&t=10&akid=53%2E4032634%2EW6GBLW)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---

body:
Are you still an America First conservative? | Peter - Joe Biden, his corrupt Department of Justice, and Merrick Garland are back at targeting me.

[**_Do you know what this is about?_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=516f40e30db9431888b30a31e7174b7a&_e=O2kHPJd1pnd1nNMQPwb2-2SxVFvo8QZ48NsP95hV7271A4rrqZKtxa8qSbxtHcG0TH_Ob7lFqkxzGGl381Vt7sHfsfuMwPTgo1sINd1cSj5ul2BCoij_Fe74LSl4mNjQ7AGaHb0GnibDxcVx82BAI3dcTXl6Iz4qCvaLfZVEW9zaNGVY62fhTkcT53rUP0X46JDBI98-WcgTSULK47zMAMaCFqZGAQYCJ_Hyovu46BPhLJixsJ2SzesbEJbgt-XSg2YmxJVeVNV-tNycTnzkQEHyhVBu62BznFevNEirnft9LQe0lMvFOsDdagF4CVd8kew8jeU-eA7ndXD3cWhPQfaUZfXQxmMW0uOwh2UswE6d4umjGblRnecu5BG6IRBdSMi7EhMRdr4Ypo2xpvRFFA594zHc8X0hpvbXCmP5xdV0NsAgQz0RWYCvuWg_lae_)
This witch hunt is because they know they can’t beat me. They think they can distract me from America First and a **_VERY SAD attempt at removing me from this election._**

**Peter, I need your support now, more than ever!**

[**ADD YOUR NAME IF YOU’RE WITH ME**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=516f40e30db9431888b30a31e7174b7a&_e=O2kHPJd1pnd1nNMQPwb2-2SxVFvo8QZ48NsP95hV7271A4rrqZKtxa8qSbxtHcG0TH_Ob7lFqkxzGGl381Vt7sHfsfuMwPTgo1sINd1cSj5ul2BCoij_Fe74LSl4mNjQ7AGaHb0GnibDxcVx82BAI3dcTXl6Iz4qCvaLfZVEW9zaNGVY62fhTkcT53rUP0X46JDBI98-WcgTSULK47zMAMaCFqZGAQYCJ_Hyovu46BPhLJixsJ2SzesbEJbgt-XSg2YmxJVeVNV-tNycTnzkQEHyhVBu62BznFevNEirnfu5tkPsuOGxyPVKjFVeESnOwepdiwgmzifGnMQlFEPGKxr50CnxSdVKUo3hRpIibBA1xCqzF-tXQURu8VHesStCYW0k456qFEjb2J_p_VhWHf7hpgKivXOtBp-cXKrteUHVg2Kz3yhBBvbDCz-80Wh-)
This is __unprecedented even after all I’ve been through already.__ I wonder how many more losses sleepy Joe and unmerited Merrick can take before they give up. Joe may not remember but I do, when:

First, they **illegally spied on my campaign and threw false and slanderous accusations about me and my family** \- nothing but hoaxes!

Then the FBI (following Biden’s Instructions) Agents raided Mar-a-Lago and **refused to let my lawyers oversee the search.**

Finally, **they impeached me TWICE** (I won both with a little thanks to some America First allies in the Senate!) and nothing ever came of it.

**I’M NOT BACKING DOWN UNTIL WE RETAKE THE SENATE AND WHITE HOUSE**

Biden and the cronies in the DOJ and Merrick Garland represent fraud of the highest degree. These meaningless indictments are scams. An attempt to distract me from one thing - representing the good people of this great country and Making America Great Again! [**Stand with me today and we will take back the Senate and White House!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=516f40e30db9431888b30a31e7174b7a&_e=O2kHPJd1pnd1nNMQPwb2-2SxVFvo8QZ48NsP95hV7271A4rrqZKtxa8qSbxtHcG0TH_Ob7lFqkxzGGl381Vt7sHfsfuMwPTgo1sINd1cSj5ul2BCoij_Fe74LSl4mNjQ7AGaHb0GnibDxcVx82BAI3dcTXl6Iz4qCvaLfZVEW9zaNGVY62fhTkcT53rUP0X46JDBI98-WcgTSULK47zMAMaCFqZGAQYCJ_Hyovu46BPhLJixsJ2SzesbEJbgt-XSg2YmxJVeVNV-tNycTnzkQEHyhVBu62BznFevNEirnfs1uRbJX-IH471C0DOJm7fFN9il6QNOsQU60SQ2XFslQ7ibZ1AoWJPgPUhA2JB4jylfqJtk8h1YAbdK5N3fCSg_qyDB2Rfcy93e-qlebpImCWVpI4VzIv9F-aN-QkYjWm-QoowzeHBjpJuC73gIiHY1)

**Your support is instrumental in achieving these ends, Peter.**

[**DON’T BACK DOWN –
ADD YOUR NAME TO SHOW YOU’RE WITH ME**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=516f40e30db9431888b30a31e7174b7a&_e=O2kHPJd1pnd1nNMQPwb2-2SxVFvo8QZ48NsP95hV7271A4rrqZKtxa8qSbxtHcG0TH_Ob7lFqkxzGGl381Vt7sHfsfuMwPTgo1sINd1cSj5ul2BCoij_Fe74LSl4mNjQ7AGaHb0GnibDxcVx82BAI3dcTXl6Iz4qCvaLfZVEW9zaNGVY62fhTkcT53rUP0X46JDBI98-WcgTSULK47zMAMaCFqZGAQYCJ_Hyovu46BPhLJixsJ2SzesbEJbgt-XSg2YmxJVeVNV-tNycTnzkQEHyhVBu62BznFevNEirnfsbatFvvtnaOfFGXTo_iszXP77Vy5E9WuRVEaeTSm8EQ1sa5hReiFExpKkKSvrMYgbsBbivyQy3G5rH3o2opAPGkXQyqEGUNfns7CUfFIPFj55RI8FmjigNzD4vYYxkH5avGhncAVijBbO-CamoJjZf)

This isn’t the time to ignore **INJUSTICE.**
This attack on me is an attack on all of us. _They’re coming for**you** next._ We can’t let them surprise us with another baseless attack.

**Act quickly. Act now.**

Thanks,

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=516f40e30db9431888b30a31e7174b7a&_e=O2kHPJd1pnd1nNMQPwb2-2SxVFvo8QZ48NsP95hV7271A4rrqZKtxa8qSbxtHcG0TH_Ob7lFqkxzGGl381Vt7sHfsfuMwPTgo1sINd1cSj5ul2BCoij_Fe74LSl4mNjQ7AGaHb0GnibDxcVx82BAI3dcTXl6Iz4qCvaLfZVEW9zaNGVY62fhTkcT53rUP0X46JDBI98-WcgTSULK47zMAMaCFqZGAQYCJ_Hyovu46BPhLJixsJ2SzesbEJbgt-XSg2YmxJVeVNV-tNycTnzkQEHyhVBu62BznFevNEirnftzfkKdE5jFJzdZPNLwdaW93stq61j1fSb1XYL9P-4-4BDf8M4UdisH5uJEb_k5C82C6097JRdfOL9X724v6CeXubbUsLN-eCVZuyHikR2fTVQBma_7Wou61CVw4R-oZcddTNnYmcQBv4iZc9GRilFV)
Donald J. Trump
45th President of the United States
